How to Use the Pixel Tool by Aamir Buneri
Download the tool by using the download link provided below.
Extract all files to your desktop to ensure accessibility.
Run the tool as an administrator to give it necessary permissions.
Once open, select the device model from the interface, which doesn't require the device to be connected.
The Current IMEI for both slots (1 and 2) will display automatically.
Input the new IMEI numbers for both slots.
Click on the "Replace IMEIs" button to initiate the update.
After the success message, locate the “devinfo.img” file in the model’s folder for flashing.

How to Flash the "devinfo.img" File
Once the "devinfo.img" file is prepared, follow these steps to flash it onto your device:

Reboot into Fastboot Mode: Open a command prompt or terminal and run the command adb reboot bootloader.
Verify Fastboot Connection: Ensure the device is detected with fastboot devices. Troubleshoot any connection issues if necessary.
Flash the devinfo.img: Use the command fastboot flash devinfo devinfo.img.
Reboot: Restart your device by typing fastboot reboot.
Verify Changes (Optional)
After rebooting, you may confirm that the new IMEI information is in effect by navigating to the device settings or using diagnostic tools.

f_mqejq50u_s8ozfetax.description:
Step 1: Prepare Your Device
Connect Phone to PC:

Insert a SIM card with a working data connection into your phone.
Use a USB cable to connect your phone to the PC.
Enable USB Debugging:

Go to Settings > About Phone.
Tap Build Number (or MIUI Version) 7 times to enable Developer Options.
Go to Settings > Additional Settings > Developer Options.
Enable USB Debugging.
Allow OEM Unlock:

In the Developer Options, enable OEM Unlocking.
Set Default USB Configuration:

In Developer Options, set Default USB Configuration to File Transfer.


Step 2: Prepare for Bootloader Unlock
Check Mi Unlock Status:

Open Settings > Additional Settings > Developer Options > Mi Unlock Status.
Sign in with your Mi Account. If you don’t have one, create a new account.
Download and Extract Mi Unlock Tool:

Download the Xiaomi Unlock Bootloader Tool on your PC.
Extract the downloaded files to a folder.
Copy APK Files to Phone:

Inside the extracted folder, look for the APK files corresponding to your Android version (e.g., Android 13 or 14).
Copy these APK files to your phone using the file transfer mode.
Install APK Files:

Open the file manager on your phone.
Locate and manually install the copied APKs

Step 3: Bypass Debugging Restrictions
Run Bypass Command:

In the extracted folder, locate the php folder and run the bypass.cmd file.
When prompted on your device, allow USB Debugging.
Recheck Mi Unlock Status:

Return to Settings > Mi Unlock Status.
Add your Mi Account again. If it fails, try again until the bypass.cmd progress log shows success.

Step 4: Unlock the Bootloader
Open Mi Unlock Tool:

Close any unnecessary applications.
Open the Mi Unlock Tool program from the extracted folder.
Reboot to Fastboot Mode:

Power off your device.
Press and simultaneously hold the Volume Down + Power Button to enter Fastboot Mode.
Connect to Unlock Tool:

Use the Mi Unlock Tool dashboard to detect your phone in Fastboot Mode.
Unlock the Bootloader:

Follow the on-screen instructions in the Mi Unlock Tool to unlock the bootloader.
This process may take a few minutes and might require internet connectivity.


Note:
Unlocking the bootloader will erase all data on your device. Ensure you have a backup before proceeding.

var _escCache={};var _pendingRenderRAF=null;var _dataVersion=0;var _lastRenderVersion=-1;var _initialDataLoaded=false;var _childrenCache={_v:-1};var _filesInCache={_v:-1};var _imagesInCache={_v:-1};var _toolsInCache={_v:-1};var _linkGroupDragSrc=null;var _dataLoadState={folders:false,files:false,settings:false,ratings:false,images:false,onlineTools:false};var _userRatings=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('MobileFTP24_user_ratings')||'{}');var _ivState={imageId:null,zoomLevel:1,lensSize:'big',lensZoom:2};var _otLoadState={url:'',retries:0,maxRetries:3,timeoutMs:15000,timer:null,iframe:null};

var _loaderLoaded={};var _loaderFadeOutStarted=false;var _loaderFallbackTimer=null;

function updateLoadingProgress(stepKey){if(_loaderFadeOutStarted)return;_loaderLoaded[stepKey]=true;var totalWeight=0,loadedWeight=0,nextLabel='Loading...';for(var i=0;i<_loaderSteps.length;i++){var step=_loaderSteps[i];totalWeight+=step.weight;if(_loaderLoaded[step.key])loadedWeight+=step.weight;}for(var i=0;i<_loaderSteps.length;i++){if(!_loaderLoaded[_loaderSteps[i].key]){nextLabel=_loaderSteps[i].label;break;}}var percent=Math.min(100,Math.round((loadedWeight/totalWeight)*100));var bar=document.getElementById('loader-progress-bar'),pct=document.getElementById('loader-percent'),status=document.getElementById('loader-status');if(bar)bar.style.width=percent+'%';if(pct){pct.textContent=percent+'%';pct.classList.remove('pop');void pct.offsetWidth;pct.classList.add('pop');}if(status)status.textContent=nextLabel;if(percent>=100&&!_loaderFadeOutStarted){_loaderFadeOutStarted=true;if(pct)pct.textContent='100%';if(status)status.textContent='Ready!';if(bar)bar.style.width='100%';clearTimeout(_loaderFallbackTimer);setTimeout(function(){var loader=document.getElementById('app-loader');if(loader){loader.style.opacity='0';setTimeout(function(){loader.style.display='none';},600);}},500);}}

function escHtml(s){var key=s;if(_escCache[key]!==undefined)return _escCache[key];var r=String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"').replace(/'/g,''');if(Object.keys(_escCache).length>2000)_escCache={};_escCache[key]=r;return r;}
function invalidateCache(){_dataVersion++;_childrenCache={_v:-1};_filesInCache={_v:-1};_imagesInCache={_v:-1};_toolsInCache={_v:-1};}
function genId(){return 'f_'+Date.now().toString(36)+'_'+Math.random().toString(36).substr(2,9);}
function normPid(p){return(!p||p==='null'||p==='undefined')?'':p;}
function fmtDate(ts){if(!ts)return '\u2014';var d=new Date(ts);return d.toLocaleDateString('en-CA')+' '+d.toLocaleTimeString('en-GB',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});}
function fmtTimeAgo(ts){if(!ts)return'';var diff=Date.now()-ts,mins=Math.floor(diff/60000);if(mins<1)return'Just now';if(mins<60)return mins+'m ago';var hrs=Math.floor(mins/60);if(hrs<24)return hrs+'h ago';return Math.floor(hrs/24)+'d ago';}
function slugify(text){return text.toString().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'-').replace(/[^\w\-]+/g,'').replace(/\-\-+/g,'-').replace(/^-+/,'').replace(/-+$/,'');}
function copyToClipboard(text){if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText){navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(function(){toast('Copied to clipboard','success');}).catch(function(){fallbackCopy(text);});}else{fallbackCopy(text);}}
function fallbackCopy(text){var ta=document.createElement('textarea');ta.value=text;ta.style="position:fixed";ta.style.left="-9999px";document.body.appendChild(ta);ta.select();try{document.execCommand('copy');toast('Copied to clipboard','success');}catch(e){toast('Copy failed','error');}document.body.removeChild(ta);}
function copyCredById(elId){var el=document.getElementById(elId);if(!el)return;copyToClipboard(el.dataset.real||el.textContent);}
function toggleCredVis(elId,btn){var el=document.getElementById(elId);if(!el)return;if(el.dataset.shown==='1'){el.dataset.shown='0';el.textContent='\u2022'.repeat(Math.min((el.dataset.real||'').length,16));btn.innerHTML='<i class="fa-solid fa-eye"></i>';}else{el.dataset.shown='1';el.textContent=el.dataset.real||'';btn.innerHTML='<i class="fa-solid fa-eye-slash"></i>';}}

function getChildren(pid){if(_childrenCache._v===_dataVersion&&_childrenCache[pid]!==undefined)return _childrenCache[pid];if(_childrenCache._v!==_dataVersion){_childrenCache={_v:_dataVersion};}var p=normPid(pid),r=[];if(!S.folders||typeof S.folders!=='object'){_childrenCache[pid]=r;return r;}var ks=Object.keys(S.folders);for(var i=0;i<ks.length;i++){var k=ks[i],f=S.folders[k];if(!f||!f.name)continue;if(normPid(f.parentId)===p)r.push([k,f]);}r.sort(function(a,b){return(a[1].order||0)-(b[1].order||0);});_childrenCache[pid]=r;return r;}
function getFilesIn(fid){var key=normPid(fid);if(_filesInCache._v===_dataVersion&&_filesInCache[key]!==undefined)return _filesInCache[key];if(_filesInCache._v!==_dataVersion)_filesInCache={_v:_dataVersion};var id=key,r=[];if(!S.files||typeof S.files!=='object'){_filesInCache[key]=r;return r;}var ks=Object.keys(S.files);for(var i=0;i<ks.length;i++){var k=ks[i],f=S.files[k];if(!f||!f.name)continue;if(normPid(f.folderId)===id)r.push([k,f]);}r.sort(function(a,b){return(b[1].lastModified||b[1].createdAt||0)-(a[1].lastModified||a[1].createdAt||0);});_filesInCache[key]=r;return r;}
function getImagesIn(fid){var key=normPid(fid);if(_imagesInCache._v===_dataVersion&&_imagesInCache[key]!==undefined)return _imagesInCache[key];if(_imagesInCache._v!==_dataVersion)_imagesInCache={_v:_dataVersion};var id=key,r=[];if(!S.images||typeof S.images!=='object'){_imagesInCache[key]=r;return r;}var ks=Object.keys(S.images);for(var i=0;i<ks.length;i++){var k=ks[i],img=S.images[k];if(!img||!img.url)continue;if(normPid(img.folderId)===id)r.push([k,img]);}r.sort(function(a,b){return(b[1].createdAt||0)-(a[1].createdAt||0);});_imagesInCache[key]=r;return r;}
function getOnlineToolsIn(fid){var key=normPid(fid);if(_toolsInCache._v===_dataVersion&&_toolsInCache[key]!==undefined)return _toolsInCache[key];if(_toolsInCache._v!==_dataVersion)_toolsInCache={_v:_dataVersion};var id=key,r=[];if(!S.onlineTools||typeof S.onlineTools!=='object'){_toolsInCache[key]=r;return r;}var ks=Object.keys(S.onlineTools);for(var i=0;i<ks.length;i++){var k=ks[i],t=S.onlineTools[k];if(!t||!t.name)continue;if(normPid(t.folderId)===id)r.push([k,t]);}r.sort(function(a,b){return(b[1].createdAt||0)-(a[1].createdAt||0);});_toolsInCache[key]=r;return r;}

function getAllDesc(fid){var ids=[fid],ch=getChildren(fid);for(var i=0;i<ch.length;i++){var sub=getAllDesc(ch[i][0]);for(var j=0;j<sub.length;j++)ids.push(sub[j]);}return ids;}
function isNew(file){if(!file)return false;var ts=file.createdAt||file.lastModified;if(!ts)return false;return(Date.now()-ts)<(7*24*60*60*1000);}
function getLatestFileId(){var latest=null,latestTs=0;var fiks=Object.keys(S.files||{});for(var i=0;i<fiks.length;i++){var f=S.files[fiks[i]];if(!f||!f.name)continue;var ts=f.createdAt||f.lastModified||0;if(ts>latestTs){latestTs=ts;latest=fiks[i];}}return latest;}
function shouldShowNewBadge(fileId){var file=S.files?S.files[fileId]:null;if(!file)return false;if(getLatestFileId()===fileId)return true;return isNew(file);}
function newBadgeHtml(fileId){return shouldShowNewBadge(fileId)?'<span class="new-badge"><i class="fa-solid fa-bolt"></i>NEW</span>':'';}
function unpubBadgeHtml(file){return isFilePublished(file)?'':'<span class="unpub-badge"><i class="fa-solid fa-eye-slash"></i>UNPUBLISHED</span>';}
function getFileLinks(f){if(f.links&&Array.isArray(f.links)&&f.links.length>0){if(f.links[0]&&f.links[0].urls){var result=[];for(var i=0;i<f.links.length;i++){var group=f.links[i];if(group.urls)for(var j=0;j<group.urls.length;j++)result.push({label:group.label,url:group.urls[j].url,password:group.urls[j].password||''});}return result;}return f.links;}if(f.link)return[{label:'Download',url:f.link}];return[];}
function getFileLinkGroups(f){if(f.links&&Array.isArray(f.links)&&f.links.length>0){if(f.links[0]&&f.links[0].urls)return f.links;var groups={},order=[];for(var i=0;i<f.links.length;i++){var key=f.links[i].label||('Version '+(i+1));if(!groups[key]){groups[key]={label:key,urls:[]};order.push(key);}groups[key].urls.push({url:f.links[i].url,password:f.links[i].password||''});}return order.map(function(k){return groups[k];});}if(f.link)return[{label:'Download',urls:[{url:f.link,password:''}]}];return[];}
function getFileByPublishUrl(url){if(!url)return null;var fks=Object.keys(S.files||{});for(var i=0;i<fks.length;i++){if(S.files[fks[i]].publishUrl===url)return fks[i];}return null;}
function getImageByPublishUrl(url){if(!url)return null;var iks=Object.keys(S.images||{});for(var i=0;i<iks.length;i++){if(S.images[iks[i]]&&S.images[iks[i]].publishUrl===url)return iks[i];}return null;}
function getOnlineToolByPublishUrl(url){if(!url)return null;var tks=Object.keys(S.onlineTools||{});for(var i=0;i<tks.length;i++){if(S.onlineTools[tks[i]]&&S.onlineTools[tks[i]].publishUrl===url)return tks[i];}return null;}
function findFileIdByName(fileName){if(!fileName)return null;var fks=Object.keys(S.files||{});for(var i=0;i<fks.length;i++){if(S.files[fks[i]]&&S.files[fks[i]].name===fileName)return fks[i];}return null;}
function findFileByBrokenUrl(brokenUrl){if(!brokenUrl)return null;var fks=Object.keys(S.files||{});for(var i=0;i<fks.length;i++){var f=S.files[fks[i]];if(!f)continue;var links=getFileLinks(f);for(var j=0;j<links.length;j++){if(links[j].url===brokenUrl)return fks[i];}if(f.link===brokenUrl)return fks[i];}return null;}
function getBaseUrl(){return S.settings.websiteUrl?S.settings.websiteUrl.replace(/\/+$/,''):window.location.origin+window.location.pathname.replace(/\/+$/,'');}
function getFilePostUrl(fileId){var f=S.files?S.files[fileId]:null;if(!f)return'';var base=getBaseUrl();if(f.publishUrl)return base+'?p='+encodeURIComponent(f.publishUrl);return base+'?id='+encodeURIComponent(fileId);}
function getFileRating(fileId){var r=S.ratings[fileId];return r?{avg:r.avg||0,count:r.count||0}:{avg:4.5,count:1024};}
function getFakeBtns(){if(!S.settings.fakeDownloadBtns||!Array.isArray(S.settings.fakeDownloadBtns))S.settings.fakeDownloadBtns=[];return S.settings.fakeDownloadBtns;}
function isUrlExcluded(url){if(!url)return false;var ex=S.settings.excludeUrls||[];for(var i=0;i<ex.length;i++){if(!ex[i])continue;var c=ex[i].replace(/\/+$/,'');if(url.indexOf(c)===0)return true;}return false;}
function buildDownloadUrl(originalUrl){if(!originalUrl)return'#';if(isUrlExcluded(originalUrl))return originalUrl;if(S.settings.redirectEnabled&&S.settings.redirectUrl){return S.settings.redirectUrl.replace(/\/+$/,'')+'?redirect='+encodeURIComponent(originalUrl);}return originalUrl;}
function extractYoutubeId(url){if(!url)return'';var m=url.match(/(?:youtu\.be\/|youtube\.com\/(?:embed\/|v\/|watch\?v=|watch\?.+&v=))([^&\n?#]+)/);return m?m[1]:url;}
function generateSitemapXml(){var base=getBaseUrl(),now=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];var h=['<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>\n<urlset xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9">\n'];h.push('  <url>\n    <loc>'+escHtml(base)+'</loc>\n    <lastmod>'+now+'</lastmod>\n    <changefreq>daily</changefreq>\n    <priority>1.0</priority>\n  </url>\n');var fiks=Object.keys(S.files||{});for(var i=0;i<fiks.length;i++){var fi=S.files[fiks[i]];if(fi&&fi.name&&isFilePublished(fi)){var fileUrl=fi.publishUrl?(base+'?p='+encodeURIComponent(fi.publishUrl)):(base+'?id='+encodeURIComponent(fiks[i]));h.push('  <url>\n    <loc>'+escHtml(fileUrl)+'</loc>\n    <lastmod>'+(fi.lastModified?new Date(fi.lastModified).toISOString().split('T')[0]:now)+'</lastmod>\n    <changefreq>weekly</changefreq>\n    <priority>0.9</priority>\n  </url>\n');}}h.push('</urlset>');return h.join('');}
function generateFirebaseRules(){return '{\n  "rules": {\n    "admins": { ".read": true, ".write": true, ".indexOn": ["email"] },\n    "settings": { ".read": true, ".write": true },\n    "socialBar": { ".read": true, ".write": true },\n    "emailSettings": { ".read": true, ".write": true },\n    "folders": { ".read": true, ".write": true, ".indexOn": ["parentId", "order"] },\n    "files": { ".read": true, ".write": true, ".indexOn": ["folderId", "isLink", "publishUrl"] },\n    "images": { ".read": true, ".write": true, ".indexOn": ["folderId", "publishUrl"] },\n    "onlineTools": { ".read": true, ".write": true, ".indexOn": ["folderId", "publishUrl"] },\n    "footerPages": { ".read": true, ".write": true },\n    "ads": { ".read": true, ".write": true },\n    "homeAds": { ".read": true, ".write": true },\n    "analytics": { ".read": true, ".write": true },\n    "visitors": { ".read": true, ".write": true },\n    "copyrightRequests": { ".read": true, ".write": true, ".indexOn": ["status", "createdAt"] },\n    "brokenLinkReports": { ".read": true, ".write": true, ".indexOn": ["status", "createdAt"] },\n    "ratings": { ".read": true, ".write": true }\n  }\n}';}

function sendAutoEmail(toEmail,subject,message){var es=S.emailSettings||{};if(!es.enabled||!es.serviceId||!es.templateId||!es.publicKey||!toEmail)return;try{emailjs.init(es.publicKey);emailjs.send(es.serviceId,es.templateId,{to_email:toEmail,to_name:toEmail.split('@')[0]||'User',from_name:es.fromName||'MobileFTP24 Admin',subject:subject,message:message}).catch(function(err){console.error('Email send failed:',err);});}catch(e){console.error('EmailJS error:',e);}}

function toast(m,t){t=t||'info';var c=document.getElementById('toast-container'),el=document.createElement('div');el.className='toast toast-'+t;var ic={success:'fa-check-circle',error:'fa-times-circle',info:'fa-info-circle'};el.innerHTML='<i class="fa-solid '+(ic[t]||'fa-info-circle')+'"></i> '+m;c.appendChild(el);setTimeout(function(){el.style.opacity='0';el.style.transform='translateX(100%)';el.style.transition='all .3s';setTimeout(function(){if(el.parentNode)el.parentNode.removeChild(el)},300)},3800);}
function showModal(h){document.getElementById('modal-content').innerHTML=h;document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.add('show');}
function closeModal(){document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.remove('show');}

function showPage(n){S.page=n;var ps=document.querySelectorAll('.page');for(var i=0;i<ps.length;i++){ps[i].classList.remove('active');ps[i].style.display='none';}var el=document.getElementById('page-'+n);if(el){el.classList.add('active');el.style.display='flex';}if(n==='dashboard')renderDashboard();updateThemeIcons();}

function viewSite(){var url=S.settings.websiteUrl||'https://mobileftp24.blogspot.com';window.open(url,'_blank');}

function initTheme(){var saved=S.settings.activeTheme||localStorage.getItem('MobileFTP24_theme')||'light';document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme',saved);updateThemeIcons();}
function toggleTheme(){var cur=document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme')||'light',nxt=cur==='dark'?'light':'dark';document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme',nxt);localStorage.setItem('MobileFTP24_theme',nxt);updateThemeIcons();toast(nxt==='dark'?'Dark mode enabled':'Light mode enabled','info');}
function updateThemeIcons(){var dk=document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme')==='dark';var ic=dk?'fa-sun':'fa-moon',tx=dk?'Light Mode':'Dark Mode';var di=document.getElementById('dash-theme-icon'),dt=document.getElementById('dash-theme-text');if(di)di.className='fa-solid '+ic+' w-4 text-center';if(dt)dt.textContent=tx;}
function applyFavicon(){var url=S.settings.faviconUrl||'';var link=document.getElementById('dynamic-favicon');if(!link)link=document.querySelector("link[rel~='icon']");if(link)link.href=url||'data:,';}
function updateConnUI(on){firebaseConnected=on;var indicator=document.getElementById('conn-indicator');if(!indicator)return;indicator.className='conn-indicator '+(on?'conn-on':'conn-off');indicator.title=on?'Connected to Firebase':'Disconnected from Firebase';}
function updateNavBadges(){var cpP=0,blP=0;var cpk=Object.keys(S.copyrightRequests||{});for(var i=0;i<cpk.length;i++){if(S.copyrightRequests[cpk[i]].status==='pending')cpP++;}var blk=Object.keys(S.brokenLinkReports||{});for(var i=0;i<blk.length;i++){if(S.brokenLinkReports[blk[i]].status==='pending')blP++;}var cpB=document.getElementById('copyright-badge'),blB=document.getElementById('brokenlinks-badge');if(cpB){cpB.style.display=cpP>0?'flex':'none';cpB.textContent=cpP;}if(blB){blB.style.display=blP>0?'flex':'none';blB.textContent=blP;}}

function debouncedForceRender(){invalidateCache();_dataVersion++;if(_pendingRenderRAF)return;_pendingRenderRAF=requestAnimationFrame(function(){_pendingRenderRAF=null;forceRender();});}
function forceRender(){if(_lastRenderVersion===_dataVersion&&S.page!=='dashboard')return;_lastRenderVersion=_dataVersion;if(S.page==='dashboard')renderDashboard();}

function showDashSection(sec){S.dashSection=sec;var bs=document.querySelectorAll('.dn-item[data-section]');for(var i=0;i<bs.length;i++)bs[i].classList.toggle('active',bs[i].getAttribute('data-section')===sec);var mNav=document.getElementById('dash-mobile-nav');if(mNav)mNav.value=sec;renderDashboard();}
function renderDashboard(){var c=document.getElementById('dash-inner-content');if(!c)return;switch(S.dashSection){case 'overview':c.innerHTML=rOverview();break;case 'analytics':c.innerHTML=rAnalytics();break;case 'folders':c.innerHTML=rFolders();break;case 'files':c.innerHTML=rFiles();break;case 'images':c.innerHTML=rImages();break;case 'onlinetools':c.innerHTML=rOnlineTools();break;case 'imageref':c.innerHTML=rImgRef();break;case 'pages':c.innerHTML=rPages();break;case 'seo':c.innerHTML=rSeo();break;case 'redirect':c.innerHTML=rRedirect();break;case 'fakedlbtn':c.innerHTML=rFakeDlBtn();break;case 'dlstyle':c.innerHTML=rDlStyle();break;case 'ads':c.innerHTML=rAds();break;case 'homeads':c.innerHTML=rHomeAds();break;case 'themes':c.innerHTML=rThemes();break;case 'socialbar':c.innerHTML=rSocialBarSettings();break;case 'email':c.innerHTML=rEmailSettings();break;case 'copyright':c.innerHTML=rCopyright();break;case 'brokenlinks':c.innerHTML=rBrokenLinks();break;case 'backup':c.innerHTML=rBackup();break;case 'debug':c.innerHTML=rDebug();break;case 'settings':c.innerHTML=rSettings();break;}}

/* ===== OVERVIEW ===== */
function rOverview(){var fc=Object.keys(S.folders||{}).length,fic=Object.keys(S.files||{}).length,lc=0,otc=Object.keys(S.onlineTools||{}).length;var fv=Object.values(S.files||{});for(var i=0;i<fv.length;i++)if(fv[i].isLink)lc++;var cpPending=0,blPending=0;var cpk=Object.keys(S.copyrightRequests||{});for(var i=0;i<cpk.length;i++){if(S.copyrightRequests[cpk[i]].status==='pending')cpPending++;}var blk=Object.keys(S.brokenLinkReports||{});for(var i=0;i<blk.length;i++){if(S.brokenLinkReports[blk[i]].status==='pending')blPending++;}var roots=getChildren(''),tree='';for(var i=0;i<roots.length;i++)tree+=rTreeItem(roots[i][0],roots[i][1],0);var h=['<div class="fade-up"><h2 class="text-lg font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text mb-5">Overview</h2><div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-3 mb-6"><div class="card p-4"><div class="flex items-center gap-2.5"><div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-lg bg-MobileFTP24-warn/10 flex items-center justify-center"><i class="fa-solid fa-folder text-MobileFTP24-warn text-sm"></i></div><div><p class="text-xl font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text">'+fc+'</p><p class="text-[.65rem] text-MobileFTP24-muted">Folders</p></div></div></div><div class="card p-4"><div class="flex items-center gap-2.5"><div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-lg bg-MobileFTP24-accent/10 flex items-center justify-center"><i class="fa-solid fa-file text-MobileFTP24-accent text-sm"></i></div><div><p class="text-xl font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text">'+fic+'</p><p class="text-[.65rem] text-MobileFTP24-muted">Files</p></div></div></div><div class="card p-4"><div class="flex items-center gap-2.5"><div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center" style="background:rgba(168,85,247,.1)"><i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles text-sm" style="color:#a855f7"></i></div><div><p class="text-xl font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text">'+otc+'</p><p class="text-[.65rem] text-MobileFTP24-muted">Online Tools</p></div></div></div><div class="card p-4"><div class="flex items-center gap-2.5"><div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-lg bg-MobileFTP24-success/10 flex items-center justify-center"><i class="fa-solid fa-link text-MobileFTP24-success text-sm"></i></div><div><p class="text-xl font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text">'+lc+'</p><p class="text-[.65rem] text-MobileFTP24-muted">Links</p></div></div></div></div>'];if(cpPending>0)h.push('<div class="card p-3 mb-3" style="border-left:3px solid #d29922"><div class="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap"><i class="fa-solid fa-gavel" style="color:#d29922"></i><span class="text-sm font-medium text-MobileFTP24-text">'+cpPending+' pending copyright request'+(cpPending>1?'s':'')+'</span><button onclick="showDashSection(\'copyright\')" class="btn btn-warn btn-sm ml-auto">View</button></div></div>');if(blPending>0)h.push('<div class="card p-3 mb-3" style="border-left:3px solid #f85149"><div class="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap"><i class="fa-solid fa-link-slash" style="color:#f85149"></i><span class="text-sm font-medium text-MobileFTP24-text">'+blPending+' broken link report'+(blPending>1?'s':'')+'</span><button onclick="showDashSection(\'brokenlinks\')" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm ml-auto">View</button></div></div>');h.push('<div class="card p-4 mb-5"><h3 class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-text mb-2.5">Structure</h3>'+(roots.length===0?'<p class="text-MobileFTP24-muted text-xs">No folders yet</p>':'')+'<div>'+tree+'</div></div><div class="flex flex-wrap gap-2.5"><button onclick="showAddFolderModal()" class="btn btn-accent btn-sm"><i class="fa-solid fa-folder-plus"></i> Add Folder</button><button onclick="showAddFileModal()" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm"><i class="fa-solid fa-file-circle-plus"></i> Add File</button><button onclick="showAddOnlineToolModal()" class="btn btn-purple btn-sm"><i class="fa-solid fa-wand-magic-sparkles"></i> Add Online Tool</button></div></div>');return h.join('');}
function rTreeItem(id,f,d){var ch=getChildren(id),fc=getFilesIn(id).length,ic=getFolderIcon(f);var h=['<div class="tree-item" style="padding-left:'+(d*18+6)+'px" onclick="showEditFolderModal(\''+id+'\')"><i class="'+ic+' text-MobileFTP24-warn text-[.65rem]"></i> <span>'+escHtml(f.name)+'</span> <span class="text-[.65rem] text-MobileFTP24-muted">('+fc+')</span></div>'];for(var i=0;i<ch.length;i++)h.push(rTreeItem(ch[i][0],ch[i][1],d+1));return h.join('');}

/* ===== ANALYTICS ===== */
function rAnalytics(){var a=S.analytics;var liveCount=a.liveUsers||0;var stats=[{icon:'fa-users',label:'Live Users',value:liveCount,color:'#3fb950',bg:'rgba(63,185,80,.1)',clickable:true,clickAction:'showVisitorModal(\'live\')'},{icon:'fa-eye',label:'Total Visits',value:a.totalVisits||0,color:'#388bfd',bg:'rgba(56,139,253,.1)',clickable:true,clickAction:'showVisitorModal(\'history\')'},{icon:'fa-download',label:'Total Downloads',value:a.totalDownloads||0,color:'#a855f7',bg:'rgba(168,85,247,.1)'},{icon:'fa-calendar-day',label:"Today's Visits",value:a.todayVisits||0,color:'#f97316',bg:'rgba(249,115,22,.1)'},{icon:'fa-calendar',label:"Yesterday's Visits",value:a.yesterdayVisits||0,color:'#06b6d4',bg:'rgba(6,182,212,.1)'},{icon:'fa-calendar-week',label:'Weekly Visits',value:a.weeklyVisits||0,color:'#ec4899',bg:'rgba(236,72,153,.1)'},{icon:'fa-calendar-days',label:'Monthly Visits',value:a.monthlyVisits||0,color:'#14b8a6',bg:'rgba(20,184,166,.1)'},{icon:'fa-chart-simple',label:'Yearly Visits',value:a.yearlyVisits||0,color:'#d29922',bg:'rgba(210,153,34,.1)'},{icon:'fa-cloud-arrow-down',label:"Today's Downloads",value:a.todayDownloads||0,color:'#3fb950',bg:'rgba(63,185,80,.1)'},{icon:'fa-cloud-arrow-down',label:"Yesterday's Downloads",value:a.yesterdayDownloads||0,color:'#f85149',bg:'rgba(248,81,73,.1)'},{icon:'fa-cloud-arrow-down',label:'Weekly Downloads',value:a.weeklyDownloads||0,color:'#8b5cf6',bg:'rgba(139,92,246,.1)'},{icon:'fa-cloud-arrow-down',label:'Monthly Downloads',value:a.monthlyDownloads||0,color:'#f97316',bg:'rgba(249,115,22,.1)'}];var cardsHtml='';for(var i=0;i<stats.length;i++){var s=stats[i];var clickAttr=s.clickable?'onclick="'+s.clickAction+'"':'';var clickCls=s.clickable?'visitor-clickable':'';cardsHtml+='<div class="card p-4 '+clickCls+'" '+clickAttr+'><div class="flex items-center gap-2.5"><div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center" style="background:'+s.bg+'"><i class="fa-solid '+s.icon+' text-sm" style="color:'+s.color+'"></i></div><div><p class="text-xl font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text">'+(s.value).toLocaleString()+'</p><p class="text-[.65rem] text-MobileFTP24-muted">'+s.label+'</p></div></div>'+(s.clickable?'<p class="text-[.55rem] text-MobileFTP24-accent mt-1 font-semibold"><i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-up-right-from-square mr-0.5"></i> View Details</p>':'')+'</div>';}return '<div class="fade-up"><h2 class="text-lg font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text mb-1">Analytics</h2><p class="text-MobileFTP24-muted text-xs mb-5">Track your site traffic and download statistics.</p><div class="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 mb-6">'+cardsHtml+'</div><div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-5"><div class="card p-4"><h3 class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-text mb-3"><i class="fa-solid fa-chart-line text-MobileFTP24-accent mr-1.5"></i> Quick Stats</h3><div class="space-y-2"><div class="flex items-center justify-between p-2.5 rounded-lg" style="background:var(--bg-alt)"><span class="text-xs text-MobileFTP24-muted">Total Files</span><span class="text-sm font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text">'+Object.keys(S.files||{}).length+'</span></div><div class="flex items-center justify-between p-2.5 rounded-lg" style="background:var(--bg-alt)"><span class="text-xs text-MobileFTP24-muted">Total Folders</span><span class="text-sm font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text">'+Object.keys(S.folders||{}).length+'</span></div><div class="flex items-center justify-between p-2.5 rounded-lg" style="background:var(--bg-alt)"><span class="text-xs text-MobileFTP24-muted">Total Images</span><span class="text-sm font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text">'+Object.keys(S.images||{}).length+'</span></div><div class="flex items-center justify-between p-2.5 rounded-lg" style="background:var(--bg-alt)"><span class="text-xs text-MobileFTP24-muted">Online Tools</span><span class="text-sm font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text">'+Object.keys(S.onlineTools||{}).length+'</span></div></div></div></div></div>';}

function showVisitorModal(tab){tab=tab||'live';var liveKeys=Object.keys(S.liveVisitors||{});var historyKeys=Object.keys(S.visitorHistory||{});var historyArr=[];for(var i=0;i<historyKeys.length;i++)historyArr.push(S.visitorHistory[historyKeys[i]]);historyArr.sort(function(a,b){return(b.lastVisit||0)-(a.lastVisit||0);});var liveHtml='';if(liveKeys.length===0){liveHtml='<div class="p-6 text-center text-MobileFTP24-muted text-xs"><i class="fa-solid fa-user-clock text-2xl mb-2"></i><p>No active visitors right now</p></div>';}else{for(var i=0;i<liveKeys.length;i++){var v=S.liveVisitors[liveKeys[i]];liveHtml+='<div class="visitor-row"><div class="visitor-live-dot"></div><span class="visitor-flag">'+getCountryFlag(v.countryCode)+'</span><div class="flex-1"><div class="visitor-ip">'+escHtml(v.ip||'Unknown')+'</div><div class="visitor-country">'+escHtml(v.country||'Unknown')+'</div></div><div class="visitor-time">'+fmtTimeAgo(v.timestamp)+'</div></div>';}}var histHtml='';if(historyArr.length===0){histHtml='<div class="p-6 text-center text-MobileFTP24-muted text-xs"><i class="fa-solid fa-clock-rotate-left text-2xl mb-2"></i><p>No visitor history yet</p></div>';}else{for(var i=0;i<Math.min(historyArr.length,50);i++){var v=historyArr[i];histHtml+='<div class="visitor-row"><span class="visitor-flag">'+getCountryFlag(v.countryCode)+'</span><div class="flex-1"><div class="visitor-ip">'+escHtml(v.ip||'Unknown')+'</div><div class="visitor-country">'+escHtml(v.country||'Unknown')+'</div></div>'+(v.visits?'<span class="visitor-visits">'+v.visits+'x</span>':'')+'<div class="visitor-time">'+fmtTimeAgo(v.lastVisit)+'</div></div>';}}var modalContent='<h3 class="text-base font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text mb-3"><i class="fa-solid fa-users-viewfinder mr-1.5" style="color:#388bfd"></i> Real-Time Visitors</h3>';modalContent+='<div class="flex border-b border-MobileFTP24-border mb-3"><button class="visitor-tab '+(tab==='live'?'active':'')+'" onclick="showVisitorModal(\'live\')"><i class="fa-solid fa-signal mr-1"></i> Live ('+liveKeys.length+')</button><button class="visitor-tab '+(tab==='history'?'active':'')+'" onclick="showVisitorModal(\'history\')"><i class="fa-solid fa-clock-rotate-left mr-1"></i> History ('+historyKeys.length+')</button></div>';modalContent+='<div style="max-height:400px;overflow-y:auto" class="scrollbar-thin">'+(tab==='live'?liveHtml:histHtml)+'</div>';showModal(modalContent);}

/* ===== FOLDERS ===== */
function rFolders(){var roots=getChildren(''),rows='';for(var i=0;i<roots.length;i++)rows+=rFolderRow(roots[i][0],roots[i][1],0);return '<div class="fade-up"><div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-5"><h2 class="text-lg font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text">Manage Folders</h2><button onclick="showAddFolderModal()" class="btn btn-accent btn-sm"><i class="fa-solid fa-plus"></i> Add</button></div><div class="card">'+(roots.length===0?'<div class="p-6 text-center text-MobileFTP24-muted text-xs"><i class="fa-solid fa-folder-open text-2xl mb-2"></i><p>No folders yet</p></div>':'')+rows+'</div></div>';}
function rFolderRow(id,f,d){var ch=getChildren(id),fc=getFilesIn(id).length,ic=getFolderIcon(f);var dc=depthColors[d%depthColors.length];var isExpanded=!!S._expandedDashFolders[id];var hasChildren=ch.length>0;var toggleIcon=hasChildren?(isExpanded?'fa-chevron-down':'fa-chevron-right'):'';var toggleHtml=hasChildren?'<i class="fa-solid '+toggleIcon+' text-[.55rem] w-3 text-center cursor-pointer" style="color:'+dc.accent+'" onclick="event.stopPropagation();S._expandedDashFolders[\''+id+'\']=!S._expandedDashFolders[\''+id+'\'];renderDashboard()"></i>':'<span class="w-3"></span>';var parentId=normPid(f.parentId);var siblings=getChildren(parentId);var sibIdx=-1;for(var si=0;si<siblings.length;si++){if(siblings[si][0]===id){sibIdx=si;break;}}var canMoveUp=sibIdx>0;var canMoveDown=sibIdx<siblings.length-1;var h=['<div class="drag-item flex items-center gap-2.5 px-3.5 py-2.5 border-b border-MobileFTP24-border hover:bg-MobileFTP24-rowHover" style="padding-left:'+(d*24+14)+'px;border-left:3px solid '+dc.accent+';'+(isExpanded?'background:'+dc.hover:'')+'" draggable="true" data-id="'+id+'" ondragstart="handleDragStart(event)" ondragover="handleDragOver(event)" ondragleave="handleDragLeave(event)" ondrop="handleDrop(event,\'folder\')" ondragend="handleDragEnd(event)">'];h.push(toggleHtml+'<i class="fa-solid fa-grip-vertical text-MobileFTP24-border text-xs cursor-grab"></i><i class="'+ic+' text-xs" style="color:'+dc.accent+'"></i><span class="font-medium text-sm flex-1 text-MobileFTP24-text">'+escHtml(f.name)+'</span><span class="text-[.65rem] text-MobileFTP24-muted">'+fc+' files</span>');h.push('<div class="flex items-center gap-0.5">');h.push('<button onclick="event.stopPropagation();moveFolderUp(\''+id+'\')" class="reorder-btn" title="Move Up"'+(canMoveUp?'':' disabled style="opacity:.3;cursor:default"')+'><i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-up"></i></button>');h.push('<button onclick="event.stopPropagation();moveFolderDown(\''+id+'\')" class="reorder-btn" title="Move Down"'+(canMoveDown?'':' disabled style="opacity:.3;cursor:default"')+'><i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-down"></i></button>');h.push('</div>');h.push('<button onclick="event.stopPropagation();showAddFolderModal(\''+id+'\')" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm text-[.65rem] py-0.5 px-1.5" title="Subfolder"><i class="fa-solid fa-folder-plus"></i></button><button onclick="event.stopPropagation();showEditFolderModal(\''+id+'\')" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm text-[.65rem] py-0.5 px-1.5"><i class="fa-solid fa-pen"></i></button><button onclick="event.stopPropagation();confirmDeleteFolder(\''+id+'\')" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm text-[.65rem] py-0.5 px-1.5 text-MobileFTP24-danger hover:bg-red-900/20"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i></button></div>');if(hasChildren&&isExpanded){for(var i=0;i<ch.length;i++)h.push(rFolderRow(ch[i][0],ch[i][1],d+1));}return h.join('');}

/* ===== FOLDER REORDER ===== */
async function moveFolderUp(id){var folder=S.folders?id?S.folders[id]:null:null;if(!folder)return;var parentId=normPid(folder.parentId);var siblings=getChildren(parentId);var idx=-1;for(var i=0;i<siblings.length;i++){if(siblings[i][0]===id){idx=i;break;}}if(idx<=0)return;var prev=siblings[idx-1];var updates={};updates['folders/'+id+'/order']=prev[1].order||(idx-1);updates['folders/'+prev[0]+'/order']=folder.order||idx;try{await db.ref().update(updates);toast('Folder moved up','success');}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}
async function moveFolderDown(id){var folder=S.folders?id?S.folders[id]:null:null;if(!folder)return;var parentId=normPid(folder.parentId);var siblings=getChildren(parentId);var idx=-1;for(var i=0;i<siblings.length;i++){if(siblings[i][0]===id){idx=i;break;}}if(idx===-1||idx>=siblings.length-1)return;var next=siblings[idx+1];var updates={};updates['folders/'+id+'/order']=next[1].order||(idx+1);updates['folders/'+next[0]+'/order']=folder.order||idx;try{await db.ref().update(updates);toast('Folder moved down','success');}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}

/* ===== FOLDER MODALS ===== */
function showAddFolderModal(parentId){var pf=parentId||'';var fo='<option value="">Root</option>';var fks=Object.keys(S.folders||{});for(var i=0;i<fks.length;i++){var fk=fks[i],fv=S.folders[fk];fo+='<option value="'+fk+'"'+(fk===pf?' selected':'')+'>'+escHtml(fv.name)+'</option>';}showModal('<h3 class="text-base font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text mb-3.5"><i class="fa-solid fa-folder-plus mr-1.5 text-MobileFTP24-warn"></i> Add Folder</h3><div class="space-y-3"><div><label class="block text-xs font-medium text-MobileFTP24-muted mb-1">Folder Name *</label><input id="mf-name" class="input" placeholder="e.g. Android Tools"></div><div><label class="block text-xs font-medium text-MobileFTP24-muted mb-1">Parent Folder</label><select id="mf-parent" class="input">'+fo+'</select></div><div><label class="block text-xs font-medium text-MobileFTP24-muted mb-1">Icon</label><div class="flex gap-2 items-center"><select id="mf-icon" class="input flex-1"><option value="">Default (Folder)</option>'+iconOpts('')+'</select><div class="icon-preview" id="mf-icon-preview"><i class="fa-solid fa-folder"></i></div></div></div><div id="mf-err" class="text-xs text-MobileFTP24-danger hidden"></div><div class="flex gap-2 justify-end pt-1"><button onclick="closeModal()" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm">Cancel</button><button onclick="saveNewFolder()" class="btn btn-accent btn-sm"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i> Add</button></div></div>');setTimeout(function(){document.getElementById('mf-icon').onchange=function(){var prev=document.getElementById('mf-icon-preview');prev.innerHTML=this.value?'<i class="'+this.value+'"></i>':'<i class="fa-solid fa-folder"></i>';};var el=document.getElementById('mf-name');if(el)el.focus();},120);}
async function saveNewFolder(){var n=document.getElementById('mf-name').value.trim(),p=document.getElementById('mf-parent').value,ic=document.getElementById('mf-icon').value,e=document.getElementById('mf-err');if(!n){if(e){e.textContent='Name is required';e.classList.remove('hidden');}return;}try{var id=genId();var siblings=getChildren(p);var maxOrder=0;for(var i=0;i<siblings.length;i++){if((siblings[i][1].order||0)>maxOrder)maxOrder=siblings[i][1].order;}await db.ref('folders/'+id).set({name:n,parentId:p,icon:ic,order:maxOrder+1,createdAt:Date.now(),lastModified:Date.now()});closeModal();toast('Folder created!','success');}catch(er){if(e){e.textContent=er.message;e.classList.remove('hidden');}toast('Failed: '+er.message,'error');}}
function showEditFolderModal(id){var f=S.folders?S.folders[id]:null;if(!f){toast('Not found','error');return;}var fo='<option value="">Root</option>';var fks=Object.keys(S.folders||{});for(var i=0;i<fks.length;i++){if(fks[i]===id)continue;var fv=S.folders[fks[i]];fo+='<option value="'+fks[i]+'"'+(fks[i]===f.parentId?' selected':'')+'>'+escHtml(fv.name)+'</option>';}showModal('<h3 class="text-base font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text mb-3.5"><i class="fa-solid fa-pen mr-1.5 text-MobileFTP24-accent"></i> Edit Folder</h3><div class="space-y-3"><div><label class="block text-xs font-medium text-MobileFTP24-muted mb-1">Folder Name *</label><input id="mf-name" class="input" value="'+escHtml(f.name)+'"></div><div><label class="block text-xs font-medium text-MobileFTP24-muted mb-1">Parent Folder</label><select id="mf-parent" class="input">'+fo+'</select></div><div><label class="block text-xs font-medium text-MobileFTP24-muted mb-1">Icon</label><div class="flex gap-2 items-center"><select id="mf-icon" class="input flex-1"><option value="">Default (Folder)</option>'+iconOpts(f.icon||'')+'</select><div class="icon-preview" id="mf-icon-preview"><i class="'+(f.icon||'fa-solid fa-folder')+'"></i></div></div></div><div id="mf-err" class="text-xs text-MobileFTP24-danger hidden"></div><div class="flex gap-2 justify-end pt-1"><button onclick="closeModal()" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm">Cancel</button><button onclick="updateFolder(\''+id+'\')" class="btn btn-accent btn-sm"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i> Save</button></div></div>');setTimeout(function(){document.getElementById('mf-icon').onchange=function(){var prev=document.getElementById('mf-icon-preview');prev.innerHTML=this.value?'<i class="'+this.value+'"></i>':'<i class="fa-solid fa-folder"></i>';};},120);}
async function updateFolder(id){var n=document.getElementById('mf-name').value.trim(),p=document.getElementById('mf-parent').value,ic=document.getElementById('mf-icon').value,e=document.getElementById('mf-err');if(!n){if(e){e.textContent='Name is required';e.classList.remove('hidden');}return;}try{await db.ref('folders/'+id).update({name:n,parentId:p,icon:ic,lastModified:Date.now()});closeModal();toast('Folder updated!','success');}catch(er){if(e){e.textContent=er.message;e.classList.remove('hidden');}toast('Failed: '+er.message,'error');}}
function confirmDeleteFolder(id){var f=S.folders?S.folders[id]:null;if(!f)return;var fc=getFilesIn(id).length,ch=getChildren(id).length;showModal('<h3 class="text-base font-bold text-MobileFTP24-danger mb-2">Delete Folder</h3><p class="text-xs mb-1">Delete <strong class="text-MobileFTP24-text">'+escHtml(f.name)+'</strong>?</p>'+(fc>0||ch>0?'<p class="text-xs text-MobileFTP24-warn mb-3"><i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation mr-1"></i> Contains '+fc+' files and '+ch+' subfolders. All will be deleted.</p>':'<p class="text-xs text-MobileFTP24-muted mb-3">This folder is empty.</p>')+'<div class="flex gap-2 justify-end"><button onclick="closeModal()" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm">Cancel</button><button onclick="deleteFolder(\''+id+'\')" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">Delete</button></div>');}
async function deleteFolder(id){try{var desc=getAllDesc(id);for(var i=0;i<desc.length;i++){var filesIn=getFilesIn(desc[i]);for(var j=0;j<filesIn.length;j++)await db.ref('files/'+filesIn[j][0]).remove();await db.ref('folders/'+desc[i]).remove();}var rootFiles=getFilesIn(id);for(var j=0;j<rootFiles.length;j++)await db.ref('files/'+rootFiles[j][0]).remove();await db.ref('folders/'+id).remove();closeModal();toast('Folder deleted','success');invalidateCache();_dataVersion++;}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}

async function updateOnlineTool(id){var ne=document.getElementById('ot-name'),fe=document.getElementById('ot-folder'),pe=document.getElementById('ot-publish-url'),pube=document.getElementById('ot-published'),ee=document.getElementById('ot-err');var name=ne.value.trim(),fid=fe.value,pubUrl=pe?slugify(pe.value.trim()):'',isPub=pube?pube.checked:true;var radios=document.querySelectorAll('input[name="ot-source-type"]');var sourceType='html';for(var i=0;i<radios.length;i++){if(radios[i].checked){sourceType=radios[i].value;break;}}var htmlSource='',url='';if(sourceType==='html'){var htmlEl=document.getElementById('ot-html-source');htmlSource=htmlEl?htmlEl.value.trim():'';}else{var urlEl=document.getElementById('ot-url');url=urlEl?urlEl.value.trim():'';}if(!name){if(ee){ee.textContent='Tool name is required';ee.classList.remove('hidden');}return;}if(!pubUrl){if(ee){ee.textContent='Slug is required';ee.classList.remove('hidden');}return;}var existingToolId=getOnlineToolByPublishUrl(pubUrl);if(existingToolId&&existingToolId!==id){if(ee){ee.textContent='Slug already taken!';ee.classList.remove('hidden');}return;}try{await db.ref('onlineTools/'+id).update({name:name,folderId:fid,sourceType:sourceType,htmlSource:htmlSource,url:url,publishUrl:pubUrl,published:isPub,lastModified:Date.now()});closeModal();toast('Online tool updated!','success');}catch(er){if(ee){ee.textContent=er.message;ee.classList.remove('hidden');}toast('Failed: '+er.message,'error');}}function confirmDeleteOnlineTool(id){var tool=S.onlineTools?S.onlineTools[id]:null;if(!tool)return;showModal('<h3 class="text-base font-bold text-MobileFTP24-danger mb-2">Delete Online Tool</h3><p class="text-xs mb-3">Delete <strong class="text-MobileFTP24-text">'+escHtml(tool.name)+'</strong>?</p><div class="flex gap-2 justify-end"><button onclick="closeModal()" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm">Cancel</button><button onclick="deleteOnlineTool(\''+id+'\')" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">Delete</button></div>');}
async function deleteOnlineTool(id){try{await db.ref('onlineTools/'+id).remove();closeModal();toast('Online tool deleted','success');invalidateCache();_dataVersion++;}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}

function rImgRef(){var fo='<option value="">Root</option>';var fks=Object.keys(S.folders||{});for(var i=0;i<fks.length;i++){fo+='<option value="'+fks[i]+'">'+escHtml(S.folders[fks[i]].name)+'</option>';}return '<div class="fade-up"><h2 class="text-lg font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text mb-1">Image Reference</h2><p class="text-MobileFTP24-muted text-xs mb-5">Upload a screenshot to reference while building structure.</p><div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-5"><div><div class="border-2 border-dashed onclick="document.getElementById(\'img-ref-input\').click()" ondragover="event.preventDefault();this.classList.add(\'drag-over\')" ondragleave="this.classList.remove(\'drag-over\')" ondrop="handleImageDrop(event)">'+(S.refImage?'<img src="'+S.refImage+'" class="w-full rounded">':'<div><i class="fa-solid fa-cloud-arrow-up text-3xl text-MobileFTP24-border mb-2"></i><p class="text-MobileFTP24-muted text-xs">Click or drag image</p></div>')+'</div><input type="file" id="img-ref-input" accept="image/*" class="hidden" onchange="handleImageUpload(event)">'+(S.refImage?'<button onclick="S.refImage=null;renderDashboard()" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm mt-2"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i> Remove</button>':'')+'</div><div><div class="card p-4"><h3 class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-text mb-2">Batch Import</h3><p class="text-MobileFTP24-muted text-[.65rem] mb-2.5">Format: [folder] Name / [file] Name|Size|Link / [link] Name|Link</p><textarea id="batch-input" class="input" rows="5" placeholder="[folder] Tools\n[file] Tool.7z | 315.8 MB | https://...\n[link] Docs | Import</button></div></div></div></div>';}
function handleImageUpload(e){var f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;var r=new FileReader();r.onload=function(ev){S.refImage=ev.target.result;renderDashboard();};r.readAsDataURL(f);}
function handleImageDrop(e){e.preventDefault();e.currentTarget.classList.remove('drag-over');var f=e.dataTransfer.files[0];if(!f||!f.type.startsWith('image/'))return;var r=new FileReader();r.onload=function(ev){S.refImage=ev.target.result;renderDashboard();};r.readAsDataURL(f);}
async function batchImport(){var raw=document.getElementById('batch-input').value.trim();if(!raw){toast('Enter data','error');return;}var pid=document.getElementById('batch-parent').value||'';var ls=raw.split('\n'),c=0;try{for(var i=0;i<ls.length;i++){var t=ls[i].trim();if(!t)continue;if(t.indexOf('[folder]')===0){var n=t.replace('[folder]','').trim();if(n){await db.ref('folders/'+genId()).set({name:n,parentId:pid,icon:'',order:c,createdAt:Date.now(),lastModified:Date.now()});c++;}}else if(t.indexOf('[link]')===0){var r=t.replace('[link]','').trim(),ps=r.split('|'),pn=(ps[0]||'').trim(),pl=(ps[1]||'').trim();if(pn){await db.ref('files/'+genId()).set({name:pn,folderId:pid,size:'',coverUrl:'',covers:[],password:'',unrarPassword:'',loginUsername:'',loginPassword:'',publishUrl:slugify(pn),description:'',downloads:0,link:pl,isLink:true,published:true,links:[{label:'Visit Link',urls:[{url:pl,password:''}]}],createdAt:Date.now(),lastModified:Date.now()});c++;}}else if(t.indexOf('[file]')===0){var r=t.replace('[file]','').trim(),ps=r.split('|'),pn=(ps[0]||'').trim(),psz=(ps[1]||'').trim(),pl=(ps[2]||'').trim();if(pn){await db.ref('files/'+genId()).set({name:pn,folderId:pid,size:psz,coverUrl:'',covers:[],password:'',unrarPassword:'',loginUsername:'',loginPassword:'',publishUrl:slugify(pn),description:'',downloads:0,link:pl,isLink:false,published:true,links:pl?[{label:'Download',urls:[{url:pl,password:''}]}]:[],createdAt:Date.now(),lastModified:Date.now()});c++;}}}toast('Imported '+c+' items','success');document.getElementById('batch-input').value='';}catch(er){toast('Import failed: '+er.message,'error');}}

function downloadSitemapFile(){var blob=new Blob([generateSitemapXml()],{type:'application/xml'});var url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);var a=document.createElement('a');a.href=url;a.download='sitemap.xml';document.body.appendChild(a);a.click();document.body.removeChild(a);URL.revokeObjectURL(url);toast('sitemap.xml downloaded','success');}
function copySitemapContent(){var el=document.getElementById('sitemap-xml-content');if(el)copyToClipboard(el.value);}
function copyFirebaseRules(){var el=document.getElementById('firebase-rules-content');if(el)copyToClipboard(el.textContent);}

btn-outline btn-sm px-1.5 text-MobileFTP24-danger" style="font-size:.6rem" title="Remove"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></button></div>';}}else{excludeHtml='<div class="p-3 text-center async function saveRedirectUrl(){var el=document.getElementById('redirect-url');if(!el)return;try{await db.ref('settings').update({redirectUrl:el.value.trim()});toast('Redirect URL saved!','success');}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}
async function addExcludeUrl(){var el=document.getElementById('exclude-url-input');if(!el)return;var url=el.value.trim();if(!url){toast('Enter a URL to exclude','error');return;}var excludeUrls=S.settings.excludeUrls||[];for(var i=0;i<excludeUrls.length;i++){if(excludeUrls[i]===url){toast('This URL is already excluded','info');return;}}excludeUrls.push(url);try{await db.ref('settings/excludeUrls').set(excludeUrls);toast('URL excluded from redirect!','success');renderDashboard();}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}async function removeExcludeUrl(index){var excludeUrls=S.settings.excludeUrls||[];if(index<0||index>=excludeUrls.length)return;var removed=excludeUrls.splice(index,1)[0];try{await db.ref('settings/excludeUrls').set(excludeUrls);toast('Removed "'+removed+'" from exclusion list.','info');renderDashboard();}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}

function editFakeBtnModal(btnId){var existing=btnId?getFakeBtns().find(function(b){return b.id===btnId;}):null;var posOpts='';for(var i=0;i<FAKE_BTN_POSITIONS.length;i++){var p=FAKE_BTN_POSITIONS[i];var sel=existing&&existing.position===p.value?' selected':'';posOpts+='<option value="'+p.value+'"'+sel+'>'+escHtml(p.label)+'</option>';}var name=existing?escHtml(existing.name||''):'Download Now';var url=existing?escHtml(existing.url||''):'';showModal('<h3 class="text-base font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text mb-3.5"><i class="fa-solid fa-hand-pointer mr-1.5" style="color:#ec4899"></i> '+(existing?'Edit':'Add')+' Fake Button</h3><div class="space-y-3"><div><label class="block text-xs font-medium text-MobileFTP24-muted mb-1">Button Name</label><input id="fdb-name" class="input" placeholder="e.g. Download Now" value="'+name+'"></div><div><label class="block text-xs font-medium text-MobileFTP24-muted mb-1">Button URL</label><input id="fdb-url" class="input" placeholder="https://your-link.com/page" value="'+url+'"></div><div><label class="block text-xs font-medium text-MobileFTP24-muted mb-1">Position</label><select id="fdb-position" class="input">'+posOpts+'</select></div><div id="fdb-err" class="text-xs text-MobileFTP24-danger hidden"></div><div class="flex gap-2 justify-end pt-1"><button onclick="closeModal()" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm">Cancel</button><button onclick="saveFakeBtn(\''+(btnId||'')+'\')" class="btn btn-accent btn-sm"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i> '+(existing?'Save':'Add')+'</button></div></div>');setTimeout(function(){var el=document.getElementById('fdb-name');if(el)el.focus();},120);}async function saveFakeBtn(btnId){var nameEl=document.getElementById('fdb-name'),urlEl=document.getElementById('fdb-url'),posEl=document.getElementById('fdb-position'),errEl=document.getElementById('fdb-err');var name=nameEl?nameEl.value.trim():'',url=urlEl?urlEl.value.trim():'',position=posEl?posEl.value:'top';if(!name){if(errEl){errEl.textContent='Button name is required';errEl.classList.remove('hidden');}return;}if(!url){if(errEl){errEl.textContent='Button URL is required';errEl.classList.remove('hidden');}return;}var btns=getFakeBtns();if(btnId){for(var i=0;i<btns.length;i++){if(btns[i].id===btnId){btns[i].name=name;btns[i].url=url;btns[i].position=position;break;}}}else{btns.push({id:genId(),enabled:true,name:name,url:url,position:position});}try{await db.ref('settings/fakeDownloadBtns').set(btns);closeModal();toast(btnId?'Fake button updated':'Fake button added','success');renderDashboard();}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}
async function toggleFakeBtn(btnId,on){var btns=getFakeBtns();for(var i=0;i<btns.length;i++){if(btns[i].id===btnId){btns[i].enabled=on;break;}}try{await db.ref('settings/fakeDownloadBtns').set(btns);toast(on?'Button enabled':'Button disabled','success');renderDashboard();}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}async function deleteFakeBtn(btnId){var btns=getFakeBtns().filter(function(b){return b.id!==btnId;});try{await db.ref('settings/fakeDownloadBtns').set(btns);toast('Button deleted','success');renderDashboard();}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}
