/* ===== COPYRIGHT ===== */
function rCopyright(){var keys=Object.keys(S.copyrightRequests||{});var pending=[],resolved=[],rejected=[];for(var i=0;i<keys.length;i++){var r=S.copyrightRequests[keys[i]];r._id=keys[i];if(r.status==='pending')pending.push(r);else if(r.status==='resolved')resolved.push(r);else if(r.status==='rejected')rejected.push(r);}pending.sort(function(a,b){return(b.createdAt||0)-(a.createdAt||0);});resolved.sort(function(a,b){return(b.resolvedAt||0)-(a.resolvedAt||0);});rejected.sort(function(a,b){return(b.resolvedAt||0)-(a.resolvedAt||0);});function renderReq(r,showActions){var statusBadge=r.status==='pending'?'<span class="badge" style="background:rgba(210,153,34,.12);color:#d29922"><i class="fa-solid fa-clock mr-0.5"></i>Pending</span>':r.status==='resolved'?'<span class="badge" style="background:rgba(63,185,80,.12);color:#3fb950"><i class="fa-solid fa-check mr-0.5"></i>Resolved</span>':'<span class="badge" style="background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);color:#f85149"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark mr-0.5"></i>Rejected</span>';var h=['<div class="request-card '+r.status+'"><div class="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 mb-2"><div class="flex-1"><div class="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap mb-1">'+statusBadge+'<span class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-text">'+escHtml(r.fileName||'Unknown')+'</span></div><p class="text-xs text-MobileFTP24-muted">From: <strong>'+escHtml(r.name||'N/A')+'</strong> ('+escHtml(r.email||'N/A')+')</p>'];if(r.description)h.push('<p class="text-xs text-MobileFTP24-muted mt-1">'+escHtml(r.description)+'</p>');if(r.adminNote)h.push('<p class="text-xs mt-1 p-2 rounded" style="background:var(--bg-surface);border:1px solid var(--border-c)"><strong>Admin Note:</strong> '+escHtml(r.adminNote)+'</p>');h.push('</div><div class="text-[.65rem] text-MobileFTP24-muted text-right flex-shrink-0">'+fmtDate(r.createdAt)+'</div></div>');if(showActions&&r.status==='pending'){h.push('<div class="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2 flex-wrap"><input id="cr-note-'+r._id+'" class="input text-xs" placeholder="Admin note..." style="flex:1;min-width:120px"><button onclick="unpublishCopyrightFile(\''+r._id+'\')" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm text-MobileFTP24-danger" title="Unpublish this file from the site"><i class="fa-solid fa-eye-slash"></i> Unpublish</button><button onclick="resolveCopyright(\''+r._id+'\')" class="btn btn-success btn-sm"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i> Resolve</button><button onclick="rejectCopyright(\''+r._id+'\')" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm text-MobileFTP24-danger"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i> Reject</button><button onclick="deleteCopyrightRequest(\''+r._id+'\')" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i></button></div>');}else if(r.status!=='pending'){h.push('<div class="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2"><button onclick="deleteCopyrightRequest(\''+r._id+'\')" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm text-[.65rem]"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i></button></div>');}h.push('</div>');return h.join('');}var html='<div class="fade-up"><div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-5"><h2 class="text-lg font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text"><i class="fa-solid fa-gavel mr-1.5" style="color:#d29922"></i> Copyright / DMCA</h2>'+(pending.length>0?'<span class="badge" style="background:rgba(210,153,34,.12);color:#d29922;font-size:.75rem;padding:.2rem .6rem">'+pending.length+' Pending</span>':'')+'</div>';if(pending.length>0){html+='<div class="mb-5"><h3 class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-warn mb-2"><i class="fa-solid fa-clock mr-1"></i> Pending</h3>';for(var i=0;i<pending.length;i++)html+=renderReq(pending[i],true);html+='</div>';}if(resolved.length>0){html+='<div class="mb-5"><h3 class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-success mb-2"><i class="fa-solid fa-check-circle mr-1"></i> Resolved</h3>';for(var i=0;i<Math.min(resolved.length,10);i++)html+=renderReq(resolved[i],false);html+='</div>';}if(rejected.length>0){html+='<div class="mb-5"><h3 class="font-semibold text-sm" style="color:#8b949e;margin-bottom:.5rem"><i class="fa-solid fa-ban mr-1"></i> Rejected</h3>';for(var i=0;i<Math.min(rejected.length,10);i++)html+=renderReq(rejected[i],false);html+='</div>';}if(keys.length===0)html+='<div class="card p-8 text-center text-MobileFTP24-muted"><i class="fa-solid fa-gavel text-3xl text-MobileFTP24-border mb-3"></i><p class="text-sm">No copyright requests yet</p></div>';html+='</div>';return html;}async function resolveCopyright(id){var noteEl=document.getElementById('cr-note-'+id);var note=noteEl?noteEl.value.trim():'';var req=S.copyrightRequests[id];if(!req)return;try{await db.ref('copyrightRequests/'+id).update({status:'resolved',resolvedAt:Date.now(),adminNote:note||'Resolved'});toast('Copyright request resolved','success');if(req.email){sendAutoEmail(req.email,'Copyright Request Resolved','Your copyright request for "'+req.fileName+'" has been resolved.\n'+(note?'Admin Note: '+note:''));}}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}
async function rejectCopyright(id){var noteEl=document.getElementById('cr-note-'+id);var note=noteEl?noteEl.value.trim():'';var req=S.copyrightRequests[id];if(!req)return;try{await db.ref('copyrightRequests/'+id).update({status:'rejected',resolvedAt:Date.now(),adminNote:note||'Rejected'});toast('Copyright request rejected','info');if(req.email){sendAutoEmail(req.email,'Copyright Request Rejected','Your copyright request for "'+req.fileName+'" has been rejected.\n'+(note?'Admin Note: '+note:''));}}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}
async function deleteCopyrightRequest(id){try{await db.ref('copyrightRequests/'+id).remove();toast('Request removed','info');}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}
async function unpublishCopyrightFile(reqId){var req=S.copyrightRequests[reqId];if(!req)return;var fileId=findFileIdByName(req.fileName);if(!fileId){toast('Could not find file "'+req.fileName+'" to unpublish','error');return;}try{await db.ref('files/'+fileId+'/published').set(false);await db.ref('copyrightRequests/'+reqId).update({status:'resolved',resolvedAt:Date.now(),adminNote:'File unpublished from site.'});toast('File "'+req.fileName+'" has been unpublished and request resolved!','success');if(req.email){sendAutoEmail(req.email,'Copyright Request Resolved','Your copyright request for "'+req.fileName+'" has been resolved. The file has been unpublished from the site.');}}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}
/* ===== BROKEN LINKS ===== */
function rBrokenLinks(){var keys=Object.keys(S.brokenLinkReports||{});var pending=[],resolved=[],rejected=[];for(var i=0;i<keys.length;i++){var r=S.brokenLinkReports[keys[i]];r._id=keys[i];if(r.status==='pending')pending.push(r);else if(r.status==='resolved')resolved.push(r);else if(r.status==='rejected')rejected.push(r);}pending.sort(function(a,b){return(b.createdAt||0)-(a.createdAt||0);});function renderBlR(r,showActions){var statusBadge=r.status==='pending'?'<span class="badge" style="background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);color:#f85149"><i class="fa-solid fa-clock mr-0.5"></i>Pending</span>':r.status==='resolved'?'<span class="badge" style="background:rgba(63,185,80,.12);color:#3fb950"><i class="fa-solid fa-check mr-0.5"></i>Fixed</span>':'<span class="badge" style="background:rgba(139,148,158,.12);color:#8b949e"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark mr-0.5"></i>Dismissed</span>';var h=['<div class="request-card '+r.status+'"><div class="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 mb-2"><div class="flex-1"><div class="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap mb-1">'+statusBadge+'<span class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-text">'+escHtml(r.fileName||'Unknown')+'</span></div><p class="text-xs text-MobileFTP24-muted">Broken URL: <a href="'+escHtml(r.brokenUrl)+'" target="_blank" class="text-MobileFTP24-danger hover:underline break-all">'+escHtml(r.brokenUrl)+'</a></p>'];if(r.details)h.push('<p class="text-xs text-MobileFTP24-muted mt-1">'+escHtml(r.details)+'</p>');h.push('</div><div class="text-[.65rem] text-MobileFTP24-muted text-right flex-shrink-0">'+fmtDate(r.createdAt)+'</div></div>');if(showActions&&r.status==='pending'){h.push('<div class="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2 flex-wrap"><input id="bl-note-'+r._id+'" class="input text-xs" placeholder="Admin note..." style="flex:1;min-width:120px"><button onclick="editBrokenLinkFile(\''+r._id+'\')" class="btn btn-accent btn-sm" title="Edit this file to fix the broken URL"><i class="fa-solid fa-pen"></i> Edit File</button><button onclick="fixBrokenLink(\''+r._id+'\')" class="btn btn-success btn-sm"><i class="fa-solid fa-wrench"></i> Mark Fixed</button><button onclick="dismissBrokenLink(\''+r._id+'\')" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm text-MobileFTP24-muted"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i> Dismiss</button><button onclick="deleteBrokenLinkReport(\''+r._id+'\')" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i></button></div>');}else if(r.status!=='pending'){h.push('<div class="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2"><button onclick="deleteBrokenLinkReport(\''+r._id+'\')" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm text-[.65rem]"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i></button></div>');}h.push('</div>');return h.join('');}var html='<div class="fade-up"><div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-5"><h2 class="text-lg font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text"><i class="fa-solid fa-link-slash mr-1.5" style="color:#f85149"></i> Broken Links</h2>'+(pending.length>0?'<span class="badge" style="background:rgba(248,81,73,.12);color:#f85149;font-size:.75rem;padding:.2rem .6rem">'+pending.length+' Unfixed</span>':'')+'</div>';if(pending.length>0){html+='<div class="mb-5"><h3 class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-danger mb-2"><i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation mr-1"></i> Needs Fixing</h3>';for(var i=0;i<pending.length;i++)html+=renderBlR(pending[i],true);html+='</div>';}if(resolved.length>0){html+='<div class="mb-5"><h3 class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-success mb-2"><i class="fa-solid fa-check-circle mr-1"></i> Fixed</h3>';for(var i=0;i<Math.min(resolved.length,10);i++)html+=renderBlR(resolved[i],false);html+='</div>';}if(keys.length===0)html+='<div class="card p-8 text-center text-MobileFTP24-muted"><i class="fa-solid fa-link text-3xl text-MobileFTP24-border mb-3"></i><p class="text-sm">No broken link reports yet</p></div>';html+='</div>';return html;}async function fixBrokenLink(id){var noteEl=document.getElementById('bl-note-'+id);var note=noteEl?noteEl.value.trim():'';var req=S.brokenLinkReports[id];if(!req)return;try{await db.ref('brokenLinkReports/'+id).update({status:'resolved',resolvedAt:Date.now(),adminNote:note||'Link fixed'});toast('Report marked as fixed','success');if(req.email){sendAutoEmail(req.email,'Broken Link Fixed','The broken link for "'+req.fileName+'" has been fixed.\n'+(note?'Admin Note: '+note:''));}}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}
async function dismissBrokenLink(id){var noteEl=document.getElementById('bl-note-'+id);var note=noteEl?noteEl.value.trim():'';var req=S.brokenLinkReports[id];if(!req)return;try{await db.ref('brokenLinkReports/'+id).update({status:'rejected',resolvedAt:Date.now(),adminNote:note||'Dismissed'});toast('Report dismissed','info');if(req.email){sendAutoEmail(req.email,'Broken Link Dismissed','The broken link report for "'+req.fileName+'" was dismissed.\n'+(note?'Admin Note: '+note:''));}}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}async function deleteBrokenLinkReport(id){try{await db.ref('brokenLinkReports/'+id).remove();toast('Report removed','info');}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}
function editBrokenLinkFile(reqId){var req=S.brokenLinkReports[reqId];if(!req){toast('Report not found','error');return;}var fileId=findFileByBrokenUrl(req.brokenUrl);if(!fileId){fileId=findFileIdByName(req.fileName);}if(!fileId){toast('Could not find the file associated with this broken link report','error');return;}showEditFileModal(fileId);}

/* ===== BACKUP ===== */
function rBackup(){return '<div class="fade-up"><h2 class="text-lg font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text mb-1"><i class="fa-solid fa-database mr-1.5" style="color:#a855f7"></i> Backup & Restore</h2><p class="text-MobileFTP24-muted text-xs mb-5">Export and import your data safely.</p><div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-5"><div class="card p-5"><h3 class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-text mb-3"><i class="fa-solid fa-cloud-arrow-up text-MobileFTP24-accent mr-1.5"></i> Create Backup</h3><button onclick="downloadFullBackup()" class="btn btn-accent w-full justify-center"><i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i> Download Full Backup</button></div><div class="card p-5"><h3 class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-text mb-3"><i class="fa-solid fa-cloud-arrow-down text-MobileFTP24-success mr-1.5"></i> Restore from Backup</h3><div style="border:2px dashed var(--border-c);border-radius:.5rem;padding:24px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:12px" onclick="document.getElementById(\'restore-file-input\').click()"><i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-up" style="display:block;font-size:1.5rem;margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--text-muted)"></i><p class="text-MobileFTP24-muted text-xs font-medium">Click to browse .json file</p></div><input type="file" id="restore-file-input" accept=".json" class="hidden" onchange="handleRestoreFileSelect(event)"><div id="restore-preview" style="display:none" class="mb-3"></div><div id="restore-actions" style="display:none" class="space-y-2"><div class="p-2.5 rounded-lg" style="background:rgba(248,81,73,.06);border:1px solid rgba(248,81,73,.2)"><p class="text-xs font-semibold" style="color:#f85149"><i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation mr-1"></i> Restore will overwrite existing data!</p></div><div class="flex gap-2"><button onclick="executeRestore()" class="btn btn-success flex-1 justify-center"><i class="fa-solid fa-cloud-arrow-down"></i> Restore</button><button onclick="cancelRestore()" class="btn btn-outline flex-1 justify-center"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i> Cancel</button></div></div></div></div></div>';}
var _restorePreview=null;
async function downloadFullBackup(){try{var data={folders:S.folders,files:S.files,images:S.images,onlineTools:S.onlineTools,settings:S.settings,socialBar:S.socialBar,ads:S.ads,footerPages:S.footerPages,homeAds:S.homeAds,emailSettings:S.emailSettings};var json=JSON.stringify(data,null,2);var blob=new Blob([json],{type:'application/json'});var url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);var a=document.createElement('a');a.href=url;a.download='MobileFTP24_Backup_'+new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g,'-').substring(0,19)+'.json';document.body.appendChild(a);a.click();document.body.removeChild(a);URL.revokeObjectURL(url);toast('Backup downloaded','success');}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}function handleRestoreFileSelect(e){var f=e.target.files[0];if(f)processRestoreFile(f);}
function processRestoreFile(file){if(!file.name.endsWith('.json')){toast('Please select a .json file','error');return;}var reader=new FileReader();reader.onload=function(e){try{var data=JSON.parse(e.target.result);_restorePreview=data;showRestorePreview(data);}catch(er){toast('Parse failed: '+er.message,'error');}};reader.readAsText(file);}
function showRestorePreview(data){var preview=document.getElementById('restore-preview'),actions=document.getElementById('restore-actions');if(!preview||!actions)return;var folderCount=data.folders?Object.keys(data.folders).length:0;var fileCount=data.files?Object.keys(data.files).length:0;preview.innerHTML='<div class="card p-3" style="border-left:3px solid #a855f7"><h4 class="font-semibold text-xs text-MobileFTP24-text mb-2">Preview</h4><div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2"><div class="text-center p-2 rounded" style="background:var(--bg-alt)"><p class="text-lg font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text">'+folderCount+'</p><p class="text-[.55rem] text-MobileFTP24-muted">Folders</p></div><div class="text-center p-2 rounded" style="background:var(--bg-alt)"><p class="text-lg font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text">'+fileCount+'</p><p class="text-[.55rem] text-MobileFTP24-muted">Files</p></div></div></div>';preview.style.display='block';actions.style.display='block';}
function cancelRestore(){_restorePreview=null;var preview=document.getElementById('restore-preview'),actions=document.getElementById('restore-actions');if(preview)preview.style.display='none';if(actions)actions.style.display='none';var fileInput=document.getElementById('restore-file-input');if(fileInput)fileInput.value='';toast('Cancelled','info');}async function executeRestore(){if(!_restorePreview){toast('No backup loaded','error');return;}var data=_restorePreview;try{if(data.folders)await db.ref('folders').set(data.folders);if(data.files)await db.ref('files').set(data.files);if(data.images)await db.ref('images').set(data.images);if(data.onlineTools)await db.ref('onlineTools').set(data.onlineTools);if(data.settings)await db.ref('settings').set(data.settings);if(data.socialBar)await db.ref('socialBar').set(data.socialBar);if(data.ads)await db.ref('ads').set(data.ads);if(data.footerPages)await db.ref('footerPages').set(data.footerPages);if(data.homeAds)await db.ref('homeAds').set(data.homeAds);if(data.emailSettings)await db.ref('emailSettings').set(data.emailSettings);toast('Backup restored!','success');_restorePreview=null;cancelRestore();invalidateCache();_dataVersion++;renderDashboard();}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}

/* ===== DEBUG ===== */
function rDebug(){return '<div class="fade-up"><h2 class="text-lg font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text mb-1">Debug</h2><p class="text-MobileFTP24-muted text-xs mb-5">Database diagnostics</p><div class="card p-4 mb-3"><h3 class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-text mb-2">Connection</h3><div class="flex items-center gap-2"><div class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full '+(firebaseConnected?'bg-MobileFTP24-success':'bg-MobileFTP24-danger')+'"></div><span class="text-sm" style="color:var(--text-c)">'+(firebaseConnected?'Connected':'Disconnected')+'</span></div></div><div class="card p-4 mb-3"><h3 class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-text mb-2">Test Database</h3><button onclick="testDB()" class="btn btn-warn btn-sm"><i class="fa-solid fa-flask"></i> Run Test</button><div id="test-result" class="mt-2 text-xs"></div></div></div>';}
async function testDB(){var el=document.getElementById('test-result');if(el)el.innerHTML='<span class="spinner"></span> Testing...';try{var id=genId(),d={name:'__TEST__',parentId:'',icon:'',order:0,createdAt:Date.now(),lastModified:Date.now()};await db.ref('folders/'+id).set(d);var s=await db.ref('folders/'+id).once('value');var v=s.val();if(v&&v.name){await db.ref('folders/'+id).remove();if(el)el.innerHTML='<p style="color:#3fb950"><i class="fa-solid fa-check-circle"></i> Database working!</p>';toast('Test passed','success');}else{if(el)el.innerHTML='<p style="color:#f85149"><i class="fa-solid fa-times-circle"></i> Data not readable.</p>';}}catch(er){if(el)el.innerHTML='<p style="color:#f85149"><i class="fa-solid fa-times-circle"></i> '+escHtml(er.message)+'</p>';toast('Test failed','error');}}
/* ===== SETTINGS ===== */
function rSettings(){var re=S.settings.registrationEnabled!==false;var wu=S.settings.websiteUrl||'';return '<div class="fade-up"><h2 class="text-lg font-bold text-MobileFTP24-text mb-5">Settings</h2><div class="card p-5 max-w-lg mb-4"><h3 class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-text mb-3">Registration</h3><div class="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg" style="background:var(--bg-alt)"><div><p class="text-sm" style="color:var(--text-c)">Enable Public Registration</p><p class="text-[.65rem] text-MobileFTP24-muted mt-0.5">Allow new admin accounts</p></div><label class="relative inline-flex items-center cursor-pointer"><input type="checkbox" '+(re?'checked':'')+' onchange="toggleReg(this.checked)" class="sr-only peer"><div class="w-10 h-5 bg-MobileFTP24-border peer-focus:outline-none rounded-full peer peer-checked:after:translate-x-full after:content-[\'\'] after:absolute after:top-[2px] after:left-[2px] after:bg-white after:rounded-full after:h-4 after:w-4 after:transition-all peer-checked:bg-MobileFTP24-accent"></div></label></div></div><div class="card p-5 max-w-lg mb-4"><h3 class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-text mb-3">Website URL</h3><div class="flex gap-2"><input id="set-website-url" class="input" placeholder="https://example.com" value="'+escHtml(wu)+'"><button onclick="saveWebsiteUrl()" class="btn btn-accent btn-sm flex-shrink-0"><i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i></button></div></div><div class="card p-5 max-w-lg mb-4"><h3 class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-text mb-3">Account</h3><div class="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg" style="background:var(--bg-alt)"><div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-MobileFTP24-accent/15 flex items-center justify-center"><i class="fa-solid fa-user text-MobileFTP24-accent text-sm"></i></div><div><p class="text-sm font-medium text-MobileFTP24-text">'+(S.admin?escHtml(S.admin.name):'\u2014')+'</p><p class="text-[.65rem] text-MobileFTP24-muted">'+(S.admin?escHtml(S.admin.email):'')+'</p></div></div></div><div class="card p-5 max-w-lg"><h3 class="font-semibold text-sm text-MobileFTP24-text mb-3">Danger Zone</h3><button onclick="confirmResetAll()" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm"><i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i> Reset All Data</button></div></div>';}
async function toggleReg(on){try{await db.ref('settings').update({registrationEnabled:on});toast(on?'Enabled':'Disabled','success');}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}async function saveWebsiteUrl(){var el=document.getElementById('set-website-url');if(!el)return;try{await db.ref('settings').update({websiteUrl:el.value.trim()});toast('Saved','success');}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}
function confirmResetAll(){showModal('<h3 class="text-base font-bold text-MobileFTP24-danger mb-2">Reset All Data</h3><p class="text-xs text-MobileFTP24-muted mb-4">Delete everything permanently.</p><div class="flex gap-2 justify-end"><button onclick="closeModal()" class="btn btn-outline btn-sm">Cancel</button><button onclick="resetAll()" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">Delete</button></div>');}
async function resetAll(){try{await db.ref('folders').remove();await db.ref('files').remove();await db.ref('images').remove();await db.ref('onlineTools').remove();await db.ref('admins').remove();await db.ref('settings').remove();await db.ref('footerPages').remove();await db.ref('ads').remove();await db.ref('homeAds').remove();await db.ref('socialBar').remove();await db.ref('emailSettings').remove();await db.ref('analytics').remove();await db.ref('visitors').remove();await db.ref('copyrightRequests').remove();await db.ref('brokenLinkReports').remove();await db.ref('ratings').remove();S.admin=null;sessionStorage.removeItem('MobileFTP24_admin');closeModal();toast('Reset complete','info');showPage('signin');}catch(e){toast('Failed: '+e.message,'error');}}
/* ===== DRAG & DROP ===== */
var dragSrcId=null;
function handleDragStart(e){dragSrcId=e.target.closest('.drag-item').dataset.id;e.target.closest('.drag-item').classList.add('dragging');e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed='move';e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain','');}function handleDragOver(e){e.preventDefault();var target=e.target.closest('.drag-item');if(target&&target.dataset.id!==dragSrcId)target.classList.add('drag-over');}
function handleDragLeave(e){if(e.target.closest('.drag-item'))e.target.closest('.drag-item').classList.remove('drag-over');}function handleDrop(e,type){e.preventDefault();var target=e.target.closest('.drag-item');if(!target||target.dataset.id===dragSrcId)return;target.classList.remove('drag-over');var srcId=dragSrcId,destId=target.dataset.id;if(type==='folder'){var src=S.folders[srcId],dest=S.folders[destId];if(src&&dest&&normPid(src.parentId)===normPid(dest.parentId)){db.ref('folders/'+srcId+'/order').set(dest.order);db.ref('folders/'+destId+'/order').set(src.order);toast('Folders reordered','info');}}else{var src=S.files[srcId],dest=S.files[destId];if(src&&dest&&normPid(src.folderId)===normPid(dest.folderId)){db.ref('files/'+srcId+'/order').set(dest.order||0);db.ref('files/'+destId+'/order').set(src.order||0);toast('Files reordered','info');}}}
function handleDragEnd(e){document.querySelectorAll('.dragging, .drag-over').forEach(function(el){el.classList.remove('dragging','drag-over');});dragSrcId=null;}
function lgDragStart(e){_linkGroupDragSrc=e.target.closest('.link-group-card');if(_linkGroupDragSrc){_linkGroupDragSrc.classList.add('lg-dragging');e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed='move';e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain','');}}
function lgDragOver(e){e.preventDefault();var target=e.target.closest('.link-group-card');if(!target||target===_linkGroupDragSrc)return;document.querySelectorAll('.link-group-card').forEach(function(el){el.classList.remove('lg-drag-over-top','lg-drag-over-bottom');});var rect=target.getBoundingClientRect();if(e.clientY<rect.top+rect.height/2)target.classList.add('lg-drag-over-top');else target.classList.add('lg-drag-over-bottom');}function lgDrop(e){e.preventDefault();var target=e.target.closest('.link-group-card');if(!target||!_linkGroupDragSrc||target===_linkGroupDragSrc)return;var container=document.getElementById('mfi-links-container');if(!container)return;var rect=target.getBoundingClientRect();if(e.clientY<rect.top+rect.height/2)container.insertBefore(_linkGroupDragSrc,target);else container.insertBefore(_linkGroupDragSrc,target.nextSibling);document.querySelectorAll('.link-group-card').forEach(function(el){el.classList.remove('lg-drag-over-top','lg-drag-over-bottom','lg-dragging');});}
function lgDragEnd(){document.querySelectorAll('.link-group-card').forEach(function(el){el.classList.remove('lg-drag-over-top','lg-drag-over-bottom','lg-dragging');});_linkGroupDragSrc=null;}

/* ===== OT VIEWER ===== */
function otOpen(toolId){var tool=S.onlineTools?S.onlineTools[toolId]:null;if(!tool){toast('Tool not found','error');return;}var overlay=document.getElementById('ot-viewer-overlay'),titleEl=document.getElementById('ot-viewer-title'),bodyEl=document.getElementById('ot-viewer-body');if(titleEl)titleEl.textContent=tool.name||'Online Tool';bodyEl.innerHTML='';if(tool.sourceType==='html'&&tool.htmlSource){var iframe=document.createElement('iframe');iframe.style.cssText='width:100%;height:100%;border:none;';iframe.setAttribute('sandbox','allow-scripts allow-forms allow-popups allow-modals allow-same-origin');bodyEl.appendChild(iframe);var doc=iframe.contentDocument||iframe.contentWindow.document;doc.open();doc.write('<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="utf-8"><style>*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}body{font-family:Inter,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;overflow:auto}</style></head><body>'+tool.htmlSource+'</body></html>');doc.close();}else if(tool.sourceType==='url'&&tool.url){var iframe=document.createElement('iframe');iframe.style.cssText='width:100%;height:100%;border:none;';iframe.setAttribute('sandbox','allow-scripts allow-forms allow-popups allow-modals allow-same-origin');iframe.src=tool.url;bodyEl.appendChild(iframe);}else{bodyEl.innerHTML='<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:100%;color:var(--text-muted)"><i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation" style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:12px;color:var(--border-c)"></i><p style="font-size:.9rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-c)">No source configured</p></div>';}overlay.classList.add('show');document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}
function otClose(){var overlay=document.getElementById('ot-viewer-overlay'),bodyEl=document.getElementById('ot-viewer-body');overlay.classList.remove('show');if(bodyEl)bodyEl.innerHTML='';document.body.style.overflow='';}
function otOpenFullscreen(){var bodyEl=document.getElementById('ot-viewer-body');if(!bodyEl)return;var iframe=bodyEl.querySelector('iframe');if(iframe){if(iframe.requestFullscreen)iframe.requestFullscreen();else if(iframe.webkitRequestFullscreen)iframe.webkitRequestFullscreen();}}

/* ===== IMAGE VIEWER ===== */
function ivOpen(imgId){var img=S.images[imgId];if(!img){toast('Image not found','error');return;}_ivState.imageId=imgId;_ivState.zoomLevel=1;document.getElementById('iv-title').textContent=img.title||'Image';document.getElementById('iv-image').src=img.url;document.getElementById('iv-zoom-label').textContent='100%';var shareUrl=getBaseUrl()+'?img='+encodeURIComponent(img.publishUrl||imgId);document.getElementById('iv-share-url').textContent=shareUrl;document.getElementById('iv-video-container').style.display='none';document.getElementById('iv-body').style.display='flex';document.getElementById('img-viewer-overlay').classList.add('show');document.body.style.overflow='hidden';setupZoomLens();ivApplyZoom();}
function ivClose(){document.getElementById('img-viewer-overlay').classList.remove('show');document.getElementById('iv-video-container').innerHTML='';document.body.style.overflow='';_ivState.imageId=null;}
function ivZoomIn(){_ivState.zoomLevel=Math.min(_ivState.zoomLevel+0.5,5);ivApplyZoom();}
function ivZoomOut(){_ivState.zoomLevel=Math.max(_ivState.zoomLevel-0.5,0.5);ivApplyZoom();}
function ivResetZoom(){_ivState.zoomLevel=1;ivApplyZoom();}
function ivApplyZoom(){var img=document.getElementById('iv-image');if(img)img.style.transform='scale('+_ivState.zoomLevel+')';document.getElementById('iv-zoom-label').textContent=Math.round(_ivState.zoomLevel*100)+'%';}
function ivHandleWheel(e){e.preventDefault();if(e.deltaY<0)ivZoomIn();else ivZoomOut();}
function ivToggleLensSize(){_ivState.lensSize=_ivState.lensSize==='big'?'small':'big';var lens=document.getElementById('iv-zoom-lens');if(_ivState.lensSize==='big'){lens.classList.add('big');document.getElementById('iv-lens-size-label').textContent='Small Lens';}else{lens.classList.remove('big');document.getElementById('iv-lens-size-label').textContent='Big Lens';}}
function ivCopyShareUrl(){copyToClipboard(document.getElementById('iv-share-url').textContent);}
function setupZoomLens(){var overlay=document.getElementById('iv-prot-overlay'),img=document.getElementById('iv-image'),lens=document.getElementById('iv-zoom-lens');overlay.onmousemove=function(e){var rect=overlay.getBoundingClientRect();var x=e.clientX-rect.left,y=e.clientY-rect.top;lens.style.display='block';var lensW=lens.offsetWidth/2,lensH=lens.offsetHeight/2;lens.style.left=(x-lensW)+'px';lens.style.top=(y-lensH)+'px';var dispW=img.clientWidth,dispH=img.clientHeight;var zoom=_ivState.lensZoom;lens.style.backgroundImage='url("'+img.src+'")';lens.style.backgroundSize=(dispW*zoom)+'px '+(dispH*zoom)+'px';lens.style.backgroundPosition=-(x*zoom-lensW)+'px '+-(y*zoom-lensH)+'px';};overlay.onmouseleave=function(){lens.style.display='none';};}

/* ===== FIREBASE LISTENERS ===== */
function startListeners(){if(!db){toast('Firebase not initialized','error');return;}
db.ref('.info/connected').on('value',function(s){var connected=s.val()===true;updateConnUI(connected);if(connected&&!_loaderLoaded.connected){_loaderLoaded.connected=true;updateLoadingProgress('connected');}});
db.ref('folders').on('value',function(s){S.folders=s.val()||{};_dataLoadState.folders=true;invalidateCache();_dataVersion++;updateLoadingProgress('folders');debouncedForceRender();});
db.ref('files').on('value',function(s){S.files=s.val()||{};_dataLoadState.files=true;invalidateCache();_dataVersion++;updateLoadingProgress('files');debouncedForceRender();});
db.ref('images').on('value',function(s){S.images=s.val()||{};_dataLoadState.images=true;invalidateCache();_dataVersion++;updateLoadingProgress('images');debouncedForceRender();});
db.ref('onlineTools').on('value',function(s){S.onlineTools=s.val()||{};_dataLoadState.onlineTools=true;invalidateCache();_dataVersion++;updateLoadingProgress('onlineTools');debouncedForceRender();});
db.ref('settings').on('value',function(s){S.settings=Object.assign({registrationEnabled:true,websiteUrl:'https://mobileftp24.blogspot.com',faviconUrl:'',activeTheme:'light',redirectEnabled:false,redirectUrl:'',excludeUrls:[],dlStyle:'classic',fakeDownloadBtns:[],watermarkUrl:'',watermarkMode:'center',watermarkOpacity:8,showSubCatCount:true},s.val()||{});if(!S.settings.fakeDownloadBtns)S.settings.fakeDownloadBtns=[];if(!S.settings.excludeUrls)S.settings.excludeUrls=[];_dataLoadState.settings=true;invalidateCache();_dataVersion++;updateLoadingProgress('settings');applyFavicon();if(S.settings.activeTheme){document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme',S.settings.activeTheme);localStorage.setItem('MobileFTP24_theme',S.settings.activeTheme);updateThemeIcons();}debouncedForceRender();});
db.ref('emailSettings').on('value',function(s){S.emailSettings=Object.assign({enabled:false,serviceId:'',templateId:'',publicKey:'',fromName:'MobileFTP24 Admin'},s.val()||{});debouncedForceRender();});
db.ref('socialBar').on('value',function(s){S.socialBar=Object.assign({enabled:true,telegram:'',facebook:'',youtube:'',apps:'',chromeExtensions:''},s.val()||{});});
db.ref('footerPages').on('value',function(s){var v=s.val();if(v)S.footerPages=v;debouncedForceRender();});
db.ref('ads').on('value',function(s){S.ads=Object.assign({topAd:'',bottomAd:'',sideAdLeft:'',sideAdRight:'',footerTopAd:'',rightSidebarAd:'',rightSidebarAdEnabled:true},s.val()||{});debouncedForceRender();});
db.ref('homeAds').on('value',function(s){S.homeAds=Object.assign({enabled:false,code:''},s.val()||{});debouncedForceRender();});
db.ref('copyrightRequests').on('value',function(s){S.copyrightRequests=s.val()||{};updateNavBadges();debouncedForceRender();});
db.ref('brokenLinkReports').on('value',function(s){S.brokenLinkReports=s.val()||{};updateNavBadges();debouncedForceRender();});
db.ref('ratings').on('value',function(s){S.ratings=s.val()||{};_dataLoadState.ratings=true;updateLoadingProgress('ratings');debouncedForceRender();});
db.ref('analytics').on('value',function(s){var val=s.val()||{};var today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];if(val.lastDate!==today&&val.lastDate){db.ref('analytics/yesterdayVisits').set(val.todayVisits||0);db.ref('analytics/yesterdayDownloads').set(val.todayDownloads||0);db.ref('analytics/todayVisits').set(0);db.ref('analytics/todayDownloads').set(0);db.ref('analytics/lastDate').set(today);val.yesterdayVisits=val.todayVisits;val.yesterdayDownloads=val.todayDownloads;val.todayVisits=0;val.todayDownloads=0;val.lastDate=today;}else if(!val.lastDate){db.ref('analytics/lastDate').set(today);val.lastDate=today;}S.analytics=Object.assign({totalVisits:0,liveUsers:0,totalDownloads:0,todayVisits:0,yesterdayVisits:0,weeklyVisits:0,monthlyVisits:0,yearlyVisits:0,todayDownloads:0,yesterdayDownloads:0,weeklyDownloads:0,monthlyDownloads:0,yearlyDownloads:0,lastDate:today},val);debouncedForceRender();});
db.ref('visitors/history').on('value',function(s){S.visitorHistory=s.val()||{};});
db.ref('visitors/live').on('value',function(s){S.liveVisitors=s.val()||{};S.analytics.liveUsers=Object.keys(S.liveVisitors).length;debouncedForceRender();});
}

/* ===== AUTH ===== */
auth.onAuthStateChanged(function(user){if(user){db.ref('admins/'+user.uid).once('value').then(function(snap){var data=snap.val();if(!data){db.ref('admins/'+user.uid).set({name:user.displayName||'Admin',email:user.email,createdAt:Date.now()});data={name:user.displayName||'Admin',email:user.email};}S.admin={key:user.uid,name:data.name,email:data.email};sessionStorage.setItem('MobileFTP24_admin',JSON.stringify(S.admin));showPage('dashboard');});}else{S.admin=null;sessionStorage.removeItem('MobileFTP24_admin');if(S.page==='dashboard')showPage('signin');}});
async function signUp(){if(!S.settings.registrationEnabled){toast('Registration disabled','error');return;}var n=document.getElementById('su-name').value.trim(),e=document.getElementById('su-email').value.trim(),p=document.getElementById('su-password').value,c=document.getElementById('su-confirm').value;if(!n||!e||!p){toast('Fill all fields','error');return;}if(p.length<6){toast('Password min 6 chars','error');return;}if(p!==c){toast('Passwords mismatch','error');return;}try{var cred=await auth.createUserWithEmailAndPassword(e,p);await cred.user.updateProfile({displayName:n});toast('Account created!','success');}catch(er){toast('Failed: '+er.message,'error');}}
async function signIn(){var e=document.getElementById('si-email').value.trim(),p=document.getElementById('si-password').value;if(!e||!p){toast('Enter email & password','error');return;}try{await auth.signInWithEmailAndPassword(e,p);toast('Welcome back!','success');}catch(er){toast('Failed: '+er.message,'error');}}
function signOut(){auth.signOut();toast('Signed out','info');showPage('signin');}
async function forgotPassword(){var e=document.getElementById('fp-email').value.trim();if(!e){toast('Enter your email','error');return;}try{await auth.sendPasswordResetEmail(e);toast('Reset link sent to '+e,'success');showPage('signin');}catch(er){toast('Failed: '+er.message,'error');}}

/* ===== KEYBOARD LISTENERS ===== */
document.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){if(e.key==='Enter'&&e.target.tagName!=='TEXTAREA'&&e.target.tagName!=='INPUT'){if(S.page==='signin')signIn();if(S.page==='signup')signUp();if(S.page==='forgot')forgotPassword();}if(e.key==='Escape'){closeModal();ivClose();otClose();}});

/* ===== INITIALIZATION ===== */
function init(){
  initTheme();
  startListeners();
  if(S.admin&&S.admin.key){showPage('dashboard');}else{showPage('signin');}

  _loaderFallbackTimer=setTimeout(function(){
    if(!_loaderFadeOutStarted){
      var bar=document.getElementById('loader-progress-bar'),pct=document.getElementById('loader-percent'),status=document.getElementById('loader-status');
      if(bar)bar.style.width='100%';if(pct)pct.textContent='100%';if(status)status.textContent='Ready!';
      _loaderFadeOutStarted=true;
      setTimeout(function(){var loader=document.getElementById('app-loader');if(loader){loader.style.opacity='0';setTimeout(function(){loader.style.display='none';},600);}},400);
    }
  },10000);
}
init();
</script>
</html>

<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/hls.js@1.5.7"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css" />
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
<style>
:root,[data-theme="light"]{
--bg:#FAF9F7;--bg2:#F0EDE8;--fg:#1A1814;--fg2:#5C574F;--muted:#9C958B;
--accent:#D4850E;--accent-h:#B8700A;--accent-l:#FEF3E2;--accent-alpha:rgba(212,133,14,.3);
--card:#FFF;--card-h:#FBF9F6;--border:#E5E0D8;--shadow:rgba(26,24,20,.07);--glass:rgba(255,255,255,.78);
--danger:#C53030;--success:#2F855A;--player-bg:#0A0A0A;--ctrl-bg:rgba(0,0,0,.68);
--play-color:#FF6B35;--prev-next-color:#4ECDC4;--live-color:#E53E3E;--rw-color:#FFE66D;--vol-color:#A8E6CF;--pip-color:#FFD93D;--fs-color:#6C5CE7;--mute-color:#FD79A8;
}
[data-theme="dark"]{
--bg:#0E0D0B;--bg2:#1A1814;--fg:#F5F3EF;--fg2:#C4BFB5;--muted:#78716C;
--accent:#E8A317;--accent-h:#F5B731;--accent-l:#2A2210;--accent-alpha:rgba(232,163,23,.3);
--card:#181613;--card-h:#222018;--border:#2E2A24;--shadow:rgba(0,0,0,.35);--glass:rgba(14,13,11,.82);
--danger:#FC8181;--success:#68D391;--player-bg:#000;--ctrl-bg:rgba(0,0,0,.82);
--play-color:#FF8C5A;--prev-next-color:#5EDDD4;--live-color:#FC8181;--rw-color:#FFF080;--vol-color:#B8F0D9;--pip-color:#FFE566;--fs-color:#8B7FF0;--mute-color:#FF8FB8;
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--fg);min-height:100vh;transition:background .4s,color .4s;overflow-x:hidden}
h1,h2,h3,h4,h5{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;height:4px}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--muted);border-radius:2px}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
@keyframes pulse-b{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.5}}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(12px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
@keyframes modalIn{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(.95) translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1) translateY(0)}}
@keyframes playPulse{0%,100%{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1);opacity:.9}50%{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.1);opacity:.7}}

/* RGB Color Animation for Loading Message */
@keyframes rgbColor{
  0%{color:#ff0000;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,0,0,0.5)}
  14%{color:#ff8800;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,136,0,0.5)}
  28%{color:#ffff00;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,255,0,0.5)}
  42%{color:#00ff00;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(0,255,0,0.5)}
  57%{color:#00ffff;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(0,255,255,0.5)}
  71%{color:#0088ff;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(0,136,255,0.5)}
  85%{color:#8800ff;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(136,0,255,0.5)}
  100%{color:#ff0000;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,0,0,0.5)}
}
@keyframes rgbBorder{
  0%{border-color:#ff0000}
  14%{border-color:#ff8800}
  28%{border-color:#ffff00}
  42%{border-color:#00ff00}
  57%{border-color:#00ffff}
  71%{border-color:#0088ff}
  85%{border-color:#8800ff}
  100%{border-color:#ff0000}
}
@keyframes rgbBg{
  0%{background:rgba(255,0,0,0.15)}
  14%{background:rgba(255,136,0,0.15)}
  28%{background:rgba(255,255,0,0.15)}
  42%{background:rgba(0,255,0,0.15)}
  57%{background:rgba(0,255,255,0.15)}
  71%{background:rgba(0,136,255,0.15)}
  85%{background:rgba(136,0,255,0.15)}
  100%{background:rgba(255,0,0,0.15)}
}
@keyframes rgbPulse{
  0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}
  50%{transform:scale(1.05);opacity:0.8}
}

/* Network status indicator */
@keyframes networkPulse{
  0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(45,212,191,0.4)}
  50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(45,212,191,0)}
}
.network-good{color:#2dd4bf;animation:networkPulse 2s infinite}
.network-medium{color:#fbbf24}
.network-poor{color:#f87171}

#loading-screen{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:99999;background:var(--bg);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:opacity .5s}
#loading-screen.hide{opacity:0;pointer-events:none}
.ld-spin{width:42px;height:42px;border:3px solid var(--border);border-top-color:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;animation:spin .7s linear infinite}

#toast-c{position:fixed;top:14px;right:14px;z-index:100000;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px}
.toast{padding:11px 16px;border-radius:9px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:#fff;transform:translateX(120%);transition:transform .3s;max-width:320px;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.2)}
.toast.show{transform:translateX(0)}
.toast-s{background:#2F855A}.toast-e{background:#C53030}.toast-i{background:#2B6CB0}

#modal-ov{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:90000;background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px}
#modal-ov.show{display:flex}
.modal-b{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:22px;max-width:560px;width:100%;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;animation:modalIn .25s ease}
.modal-t{font-size:17px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:16px}

.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:8px 16px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:600;font-size:12px;border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;font-family:inherit}
.btn-p{background:var(--accent);color:#fff}.btn-p:hover{background:var(--accent-h);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px var(--accent-alpha)}
.btn-p:disabled{opacity:.6;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none;box-shadow:none}
.btn-o{background:transparent;color:var(--fg);border:1.5px solid var(--border)}.btn-o:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent)}
.btn-sm{padding:5px 11px;font-size:11px;border-radius:6px}
.btn-i{width:32px;height:32px;padding:0;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-radius:7px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--card);color:var(--fg);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;font-size:12px;flex-shrink:0}
.btn-i:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);background:var(--accent-l)}
.btn-danger{background:#C53030;color:#fff}.btn-danger:hover{background:#9B2C2C;transform:translateY(-1px)}
.btn-adult{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#E53E3E,#9B2C2C);color:#fff;font-size:13px;padding:10px 20px;border-radius:10px;gap:8px}
.btn-adult:hover{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FC8181,#E53E3E);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(229,62,62,.4)}

.navbar{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:1000;background:var(--glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:0 16px;height:52px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.nav-logo{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0}

.search-box{position:relative;flex:1;max-width:480px;margin:0 auto}
.search-input{width:100%;padding:7px 12px 7px 34px;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg);color:var(--fg);font-size:12px;font-family:inherit;transition:all .2s;outline:none}
.search-input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-alpha)}
.search-input::placeholder{color:var(--muted)}
.search-icon{position:absolute;left:11px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;pointer-events:none}
.search-clear{position:absolute;right:8px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;border:none;background:var(--border);color:var(--fg2);cursor:pointer;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;transition:all .15s}
.search-clear:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff}
.search-clear.show{display:flex}
.search-results{position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 6px);left:0;right:0;background:var(--card);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;box-shadow:0 8px 24px var(--shadow);max-height:400px;overflow-y:auto;display:none;z-index:1001;animation:fadeUp .2s ease}
.search-results.show{display:block}
.search-results-header{padding:10px 12px 8px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.search-result-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 12px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.search-result-item:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.search-result-item:hover{background:var(--accent-l)}
.search-result-item.active{background:var(--accent-l);border-left:3px solid var(--accent)}
.search-result-img{width:48px;height:28px;border-radius:5px;object-fit:cover;background:var(--bg2);flex-shrink:0}
.search-result-ph{width:48px;height:28px;border-radius:5px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--bg2),var(--border));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:var(--muted);flex-shrink:0;font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif}
.search-result-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.search-result-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.search-result-cat{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px}
.search-result-play{color:var(--accent);font-size:11px;flex-shrink:0;opacity:0;transition:opacity .15s}
.search-result-item:hover .search-result-play{opacity:1}
.search-no-results{padding:24px 12px;text-align:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px}
.search-no-results i{font-size:28px;margin-bottom:8px;opacity:.5;display:block}
.search-shortcut{display:inline-block;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);font-size:9px;font-weight:600;color:var(--muted);font-family:monospace;margin-left:4px}

/* ===== PC Desktop Layout ===== */
.home-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:190px 1fr 270px;height:calc(100vh - 52px);overflow:hidden}
.cat-side{border-right:1px solid var(--border);overflow-y:auto;padding:12px;background:var(--bg2)}
.cat-side h4{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:8px;padding:0 4px}
.cat-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:9px 10px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--fg2);margin-bottom:2px}
.cat-item:hover{background:var(--card);color:var(--fg)}
.cat-item.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff}
.cat-item .cat-cnt{margin-left:auto;font-size:10px;opacity:.7;min-width:18px;text-align:center}

.player-col{padding:14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;overflow:hidden}
.ch-side{border-left:1px solid var(--border);overflow-y:auto;padding:12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px}
.ch-side-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:4px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.fav-tab{padding:5px 12px;border-radius:14px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--card);color:var(--fg2);transition:all .15s;white-space:nowrap}
.fav-tab:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent)}
.fav-tab.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent)}

/* ===== MODERN PC CHANNEL CARD ===== */
.ch-scard{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:12px;
  padding:10px 12px;
  border-radius:12px;
  cursor:pointer;
  transition:all .25s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
  border:1.5px solid var(--border);
  flex-shrink:0;
  background:var(--card);
  box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04),0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
  position:relative;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.ch-scard::before{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;
  top:0;
  left:0;
  right:0;
  bottom:0;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,transparent 0%,rgba(255,255,255,.02) 100%);
  pointer-events:none;
  opacity:0;
  transition:opacity .3s;
}
.ch-scard:hover{
  border-color:var(--accent);
  background:var(--card-h);
  box-shadow:0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,.08),0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.06),0 0 0 1px var(--accent-alpha);
  transform:translateY(-2px);
}
.ch-scard:hover::before{
  opacity:1;
}
.ch-scard.active{
  border-color:var(--accent);
  background:var(--accent-l);
  box-shadow:0 8px 30px var(--accent-alpha),0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08),inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(212,133,14,.1);
  transform:translateY(-1px);
}

/* Image styles for PC */
.ch-scard .sc-img{
  width:64px;
  height:38px;
  border-radius:8px;
  object-fit:cover;
  background:var(--bg2);
  flex-shrink:0;
  box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.1);
  transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;
}
.ch-scard:hover .sc-img{
  box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.15);
}
.ch-scard .sc-ph{
  width:64px;
  height:38px;
  border-radius:8px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent-l),var(--bg2));
  display:none;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  font-size:18px;
  font-weight:800;
  color:var(--accent);
  flex-shrink:0;
  font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
  box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.08);
  border:1.5px solid var(--border);
}
.ch-scard .sc-ph.show-ph{
  display:flex;
}
.ch-scard .sc-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.ch-scard .sc-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;color:var(--fg)}
.ch-scard .sc-cat{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;font-weight:500}

.ch-scard .sc-fav{
  color:var(--muted);
  cursor:pointer;
  font-size:14px;
  flex-shrink:0;
  padding:6px;
  transition:all .2s;
  border-radius:8px;
  position:relative;
  z-index:2;
}
.ch-scard .sc-fav:hover{
  color:#E53E3E;
  background:rgba(229,62,62,.08);
  transform:scale(1.1);
}
.ch-scard .sc-fav.on{
  color:#E53E3E;
  animation:heartPulse .3s ease;
}
@keyframes heartPulse{
  0%{transform:scale(1)}
  50%{transform:scale(1.3)}
  100%{transform:scale(1)}
}

.ch-scard .sc-play{
  color:var(--accent);
  font-size:11px;
  flex-shrink:0;
  width:28px;
  height:28px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  background:var(--accent);
  color:#fff;
  border-radius:50%;
  box-shadow:0 2px 8px var(--accent-alpha);
  animation:pulse-b 2s infinite;
}

.ch-scard .sc-share{
  color:var(--muted);
  cursor:pointer;
  font-size:12px;
  flex-shrink:0;
  padding:6px;
  transition:all .2s;
  border-radius:8px;
  opacity:0;
  transform:translateX(-5px);
  position:relative;
  z-index:2;
}
.ch-scard:hover .sc-share{
  opacity:1;
  transform:translateX(0);
}
.ch-scard .sc-share:hover{
  color:var(--accent);
  background:var(--accent-l);
}

.player-wrap{position:relative;background:var(--player-bg);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;aspect-ratio:16/9;flex-shrink:0;cursor:pointer}
.player-wrap video{width:100%;height:100%;display:block;object-fit:contain;background:#000}
.p-load-msg{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:10;text-align:center;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s}
.p-load-msg.hide{opacity:0}
.p-load-msg .lm-text{
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:600;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.8);
  padding:14px 22px;
  border-radius:12px;
  backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
  border:2px solid transparent;
  animation:rgbColor 2s linear infinite, rgbBorder 2s linear infinite, rgbBg 2s linear infinite, rgbPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.p-load-msg .lm-text i{
  margin-right:8px;
  animation:spin 1.5s linear infinite;
}

/* ===== CENTER PLAY/PAUSE OVERLAY ===== */
.center-play-overlay{
  position:absolute;
  top:50%;
  left:50%;
  transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  z-index:20;
  width:70px;
  height:70px;
  border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.65);
  backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
  display:none;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  pointer-events:none;
  animation:playPulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
  border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);
}
.center-play-overlay i{
  font-size:32px;
  color:#fff;
  margin-left:4px;
}
.center-play-overlay.show{
  display:flex;
}
.center-play-overlay.is-paused i{
  margin-left:0;
}

.p-ov{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;transition:opacity .3s;pointer-events:none}
.player-wrap:hover .p-ov,.p-ov.force{opacity:1}
.p-ov:not(.force){opacity:0}
.ch-info-ov{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;padding:14px 16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(0,0,0,.7),transparent);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;transition:opacity .5s;pointer-events:none}
.ch-info-ov.hide{opacity:0}
.ch-info-ov img{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:7px;object-fit:cover;background:#222}
.ch-info-ov .cn{color:#fff;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.ch-info-ov .cc{color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-size:10px}
.ch-info-ov .share-btn-ov{margin-left:auto;pointer-events:all;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border:none;color:#fff;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;transition:background .2s}
.ch-info-ov .share-btn-ov:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.25)}

/* ===== SEEK BAR STYLES ===== */
.seek-wrap{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:10px;
  padding:6px 12px 4px;
  background:var(--ctrl-bg);
  backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
  pointer-events:all;
}
.seek-time{
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:600;
  font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
  min-width:48px;
  text-align:center;
  user-select:none;
}
.seek-bar{
  flex:1;
  height:20px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  cursor:pointer;
  position:relative;
  padding:8px 0;
}
.seek-bar:hover .seek-track{
  height:6px;
}
.seek-bar:hover .seek-handle{
  opacity:1;
  transform:translateY(-50%) scale(1);
}
.seek-track{
  position:relative;
  width:100%;
  height:4px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);
  border-radius:2px;
  transition:height .15s;
  overflow:visible;
}
.seek-buffered{
  position:absolute;
  top:0;
  left:0;
  height:100%;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.3);
  border-radius:2px;
  transition:width .1s;
}
.seek-progress{
  position:absolute;
  top:0;
  left:0;
  height:100%;
  background:var(--accent);
  border-radius:2px;
  transition:width .1s;
  z-index:1;
}
.seek-handle{
  position:absolute;
  top:50%;
  width:14px;
  height:14px;
  background:#fff;
  border-radius:50%;
  transform:translateY(-50%) scale(0);
  opacity:0;
  transition:opacity .15s,transform .15s;
  z-index:2;
  box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.3);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.seek-bar:hover .seek-handle{
  transform:translateY(-50%) scale(1);
  opacity:1;
}
.seek-tooltip{
  position:absolute;
  bottom:100%;
  left:50%;
  transform:translateX(-50%);
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.85);
  color:#fff;
  font-size:10px;
  font-weight:600;
  padding:4px 8px;
  border-radius:4px;
  white-space:nowrap;
  pointer-events:none;
  opacity:0;
  transition:opacity .15s;
  margin-bottom:8px;
  font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
}
.seek-bar:hover .seek-tooltip{
  opacity:1;
}

/* ===== PC PLAYER CONTROLS ===== */
.p-ctrls{padding:8px 12px;background:var(--ctrl-bg);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;pointer-events:all;flex-wrap:wrap}
.pb{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:7px;border:none;background:transparent;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;transition:all .12s;flex-shrink:0}
.pb:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.15)}
.pb.prev-next{color:var(--prev-next-color)}
.pb.prev-next:hover{background:rgba(78,205,196,.2)}
.pb.play-btn{color:var(--play-color);font-size:15px}
.pb.play-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,107,53,.2);transform:scale(1.05)}
.pb.live-b{font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:0 10px;width:auto;gap:4px;letter-spacing:.3px;color:var(--live-color)}
.pb.live-b:hover{background:rgba(229,62,62,.15)}
.pb.live-b .ld{width:6px;height:6px;background:var(--live-color);border-radius:50%;animation:pulse-b 1.5s infinite}
.pb.live-b.nl{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1)}
.pb.live-b.nl .ld{background:#666;animation:none}
.pb.rw-btn{color:var(--rw-color)}
.pb.rw-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,230,109,.15)}
.p-off{color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);font-size:10px;font-weight:600;font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;min-width:46px;text-align:center}
.p-div{width:1px;height:20px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);margin:0 2px;flex-shrink:0}
.vol-w{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px}
.vol-sl{-webkit-appearance:none;appearance:none;width:60px;height:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:2px;outline:none;cursor:pointer}
.vol-sl::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:11px;height:11px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--vol-color);cursor:pointer;border:none}
.vol-sl::-moz-range-thumb{width:11px;height:11px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--vol-color);cursor:pointer;border:none}
.pb.mute-btn{color:var(--mute-color)}
.pb.mute-btn:hover{background:rgba(253,121,168,.15)}
.pb.pip-btn{color:var(--pip-color)}
.pb.pip-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,217,61,.15)}
.pb.fs-btn{color:var(--fs-color)}
.pb.fs-btn:hover{background:rgba(108,92,231,.15)}

/* Network Quality Indicator */
.network-indicator{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:4px;
  font-size:10px;
  font-weight:600;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);
  padding:3px 8px;
  border-radius:12px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  cursor:default;
  transition:all .3s;
}
.network-indicator i{
  font-size:11px;
}

.p-buf{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(0,0,0,.35);z-index:5;transition:opacity .3s}
.p-buf.hide{opacity:0;pointer-events:none}
.buf-sp{width:42px;height:42px;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-top-color:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;animation:spin .7s linear infinite}
.p-err{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.7);z-index:6;color:#fff;text-align:center;padding:16px}
.p-err.hide{display:none}
.p-err i{font-size:32px;color:var(--accent)}
.p-err p{font-size:12px;max-width:240px}
.no-ch{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;aspect-ratio:16/9;background:var(--bg2);border-radius:12px;color:var(--muted);gap:8px;flex-shrink:0}
.no-ch i{font-size:36px}
.ads-c{min-height:90px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;border-radius:8px;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border)}
.ads-c:empty{display:none !important}

.player-wrap:fullscreen,.player-wrap:-webkit-full-screen{width:100vw;height:100vh;border-radius:0;aspect-ratio:auto}
.player-wrap:fullscreen video,.player-wrap:-webkit-full-screen video{object-fit:contain}
.player-wrap.ctrl-hidden .p-ov{opacity:0!important;pointer-events:none}
.player-wrap.ctrl-hidden .p-ov.force{opacity:0!important}
.player-wrap.ctrl-hidden .ch-info-ov{opacity:0!important}
.player-wrap:not(.ctrl-hidden) .p-ov{pointer-events:auto}
.player-wrap:fullscreen .p-ctrls{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0}
.player-wrap:fullscreen .seek-wrap{position:absolute;bottom:44px;left:0;right:0}

#fpip{position:fixed;z-index:99990;width:300px;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.45);background:#000;display:none;transition:opacity .3s,transform .3s;transform:scale(.9);opacity:0}
#fpip.show{display:block;opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}
#fpip-h{cursor:move;padding:6px 8px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.85);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;user-select:none}
#fpip-h .ft{color:#fff;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;flex:1;margin-right:6px}
#fpip-h .fb{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:5px;border:none;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:#fff;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;transition:background .15s}
#fpip-h .fb:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.25)}
#fpip-vc{aspect-ratio:16/9;background:#000;position:relative}
#fpip-vc video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;display:block}
#fpip-ctrl{padding:5px 8px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.85);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}
#fpip-ctrl .pb{width:28px;height:28px;font-size:11px}

.site-footer{padding:24px 16px 20px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg2);text-align:center}
.site-footer .fl{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:10px}
.site-footer .fd{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;max-width:650px;margin:0 auto 14px}
.site-footer .flinks{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:16px;margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center}
.site-footer .flinks a{font-size:11px;color:var(--fg2);text-decoration:none;font-weight:500;transition:color .2s}
.site-footer .flinks a:hover{color:var(--accent)}
.site-footer .fcopy{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)}
.sp{max-width:760px;margin:0 auto;padding:32px 16px}
.sp h2{font-size:24px;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:6px}
.sp .sp-sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;margin-bottom:28px}
.sp .sp-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:22px;margin-bottom:16px}
.sp h4{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--accent)}
.sp p,.sp li{font-size:13px;color:var(--fg2);line-height:1.8}
.sp ul{padding-left:18px;margin-bottom:10px}
.ci-box{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:14px;background:var(--accent-l);border-radius:9px;margin-bottom:20px}
.ci-box i{font-size:18px;color:var(--accent)}
.ci-box a{color:var(--accent);font-weight:600;font-size:13px;text-decoration:none}
.ci-box a:hover{text-decoration:underline}

.inp{width:100%;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg);color:var(--fg);font-size:12px;font-family:inherit;transition:border-color .2s;outline:none}
.inp:focus{border-color:var(--accent)}.inp::placeholder{color:var(--muted)}
textarea.inp{resize:vertical;min-height:80px}
.lbl{display:block;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--fg2);margin-bottom:4px}
.fg{margin-bottom:14px}

.share-modal-content{text-align:center}
.share-url-box{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin:12px 0}
.share-url-box input{flex:1;padding:8px 12px;border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg);color:var(--fg);font-size:11px;font-family:monospace;outline:none}
.share-url-box input:focus{border-color:var(--accent)}
.share-social-btns{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:center;margin-top:16px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.share-social-btn{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;border:none;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:16px;color:#fff;transition:transform .2s}
.share-social-btn:hover{transform:scale(1.1)}
.share-social-btn.whatsapp{background:#25D366}
.share-social-btn.telegram{background:#0088cc}
.share-social-btn.twitter{background:#1DA1F2}
.share-social-btn.facebook{background:#1877F2}
.share-social-btn.email-share{background:#EA4335}
.empty-s{text-align:center;padding:40px 16px;color:var(--muted)}
.empty-s i{font-size:38px;margin-bottom:12px;opacity:.5}
.empty-s p{font-size:12px;max-width:260px;margin:0 auto}

/* Adult Verification Modal */
.adult-modal-content{text-align:center;padding:10px 0}
.adult-modal-icon{font-size:48px;margin-bottom:16px;animation:pulse-b 2s infinite}
.adult-modal-title{font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--danger);margin-bottom:12px;font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif}
.adult-modal-warning{background:rgba(229,62,62,.1);border:2px solid var(--danger);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:20px}
.adult-modal-warning p{font-size:13px;color:var(--fg2);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:8px}
.adult-modal-warning p:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.adult-modal-age{font-size:36px;font-weight:900;color:var(--danger);font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;margin:8px 0}
.adult-modal-btns{display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:20px}
.adult-modal-info{margin-top:16px;padding:12px;background:var(--bg2);border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5}

/* ============================================ */
/* ===== MOBILE & TABLET LAYOUT (≤900px) ===== */
/* ============================================ */
@media(max-width:900px){

  /* Main container: vertical flex, no grid */
  .home-grid{
    display:flex !important;
    flex-direction:column !important;
    grid-template-columns:none !important;
    height:auto !important;
    overflow:visible !important;
  }

  /* 1st: Player at top */
  .player-col{
    order:1 !important;
    padding:10px 12px !important;
    overflow:visible !important;
    flex-shrink:0 !important;
  }

  /* 2nd: Categories horizontal strip */
  .cat-side{
    order:2 !important;
    display:flex !important;
    flex-direction:row !important;
    overflow-x:auto !important;
    overflow-y:hidden !important;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch !important;
    scrollbar-width:none !important;
    -ms-overflow-style:none !important;
    padding:10px 12px !important;
    gap:8px !important;
    background:var(--bg) !important;
    border-right:none !important;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border) !important;
    border-top:none !important;
    position:relative !important;
    flex-shrink:0 !important;
  }
  .cat-side::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none !important}
  .cat-side h4{display:none !important}
  .cat-side #cat-list{
    display:flex !important;
    flex-direction:row !important;
    gap:8px !important;
  }

  .cat-item{
    display:flex !important;
    flex-direction:row !important;
    align-items:center !important;
    gap:6px !important;
    padding:9px 16px !important;
    border-radius:22px !important;
    border:1.5px solid var(--border) !important;
    background:var(--card) !important;
    color:var(--fg2) !important;
    font-size:12px !important;
    font-weight:600 !important;
    white-space:nowrap !important;
    flex-shrink:0 !important;
    margin-bottom:0 !important;
    cursor:pointer !important;
    transition:all .2s !important;
  }
  .cat-item:hover{
    border-color:var(--accent) !important;
    color:var(--accent) !important;
  }
  .cat-item.active{
    background:var(--accent) !important;
    color:#fff !important;
    border-color:var(--accent) !important;
  }
  .cat-item .cat-cnt{
    margin-left:0 !important;
    background:rgba(0,0,0,.12) !important;
    padding:2px 8px !important;
    border-radius:10px !important;
    font-size:10px !important;
    font-weight:700 !important;
  }
  .cat-item.active .cat-cnt{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.3) !important;
  }

  /* 3rd: Channel grid below */
  .ch-side{
    order:3 !important;
    border-left:none !important;
    border-top:none !important;
    padding:12px !important;
    overflow:visible !important;
    max-height:none !important;
    flex:1 !important;
    display:flex !important;
    flex-direction:column !important;
  }

  .ch-side-head{
    margin-bottom:10px !important;
    flex-shrink:0 !important;
  }

  /* Force override inline style - 3 columns */
  #ch-list{
    display:grid !important;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr) !important;
    gap:10px !important;
    overflow:visible !important;
    overflow-y:visible !important;
    flex:unset !important;
    height:auto !important;
  }

  /* Channel card: vertical grid card with modern shadow */
  .ch-scard{
    display:flex !important;
    flex-direction:column !important;
    padding:0 !important;
    border:1.5px solid var(--border) !important;
    background:var(--card) !important;
    border-radius:12px !important;
    gap:0 !important;
    position:relative !important;
    overflow:hidden !important;
    transition:all .25s ease !important;
    flex-shrink:unset !important;
    cursor:pointer !important;
    box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08) !important;
  }
  .ch-scard:hover{
    border-color:var(--accent) !important;
    transform:translateY(-3px) !important;
    box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.15) !important;
  }
  .ch-scard.active{
    border-color:var(--accent) !important;
    background:var(--accent-l) !important;
    box-shadow:0 6px 20px var(--accent-alpha) !important;
    transform:translateY(-2px) !important;
  }

  /* Image area - hide placeholder by default */
  .ch-scard .sc-img{
    width:100% !important;
    height:80px !important;
    border-radius:0 !important;
    flex-shrink:0 !important;
    display:block !important;
    box-shadow:none !important;
  }
  .ch-scard .sc-ph{
    width:100% !important;
    height:80px !important;
    border-radius:0 !important;
    flex-shrink:0 !important;
    font-size:26px !important;
    display:none !important;
    border:none !important;
  }
  /* Show placeholder only when image fails */
  .ch-scard .sc-ph.show-ph{
    display:flex !important;
  }

  /* Info area */
  .ch-scard .sc-info{
    width:100% !important;
    padding:8px 10px !important;
    flex:unset !important;
    min-width:0 !important;
  }
  .ch-scard .sc-name{
    font-size:12px !important;
    font-weight:600 !important;
    white-space:nowrap !important;
    overflow:hidden !important;
    text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
    display:block !important;
    line-height:1.3 !important;
  }
  .ch-scard .sc-cat{
    font-size:10px !important;
    margin-top:2px !important;
  }

  /* Favorite button: top-right circle */
  .ch-scard .sc-fav{
    position:absolute !important;
    top:6px !important;
    right:6px !important;
    font-size:13px !important;
    padding:0 !important;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.92) !important;
    width:28px !important;
    height:28px !important;
    border-radius:50% !important;
    display:flex !important;
    align-items:center !important;
    justify-content:center !important;
    box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.18) !important;
    z-index:3 !important;
    flex-shrink:unset !important;
    transition:all .2s !important;
  }
  [data-theme="dark"] .ch-scard .sc-fav{
    background:rgba(0,0,0,.72) !important;
  }
  .ch-scard .sc-fav:hover{
    transform:scale(1.15) !important;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.92) !important;
  }

  /* Share button: top-left, show on hover */
  .ch-scard .sc-share{
    position:absolute !important;
    top:6px !important;
    left:6px !important;
    font-size:11px !important;
    padding:0 !important;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.92) !important;
    width:28px !important;
    height:28px !important;
    border-radius:50% !important;
    display:flex !important;
    align-items:center !important;
    justify-content:center !important;
    box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.18) !important;
    z-index:3 !important;
    opacity:0 !important;
    transition:all .2s !important;
    flex-shrink:unset !important;
  }
  [data-theme="dark"] .ch-scard .sc-share{
    background:rgba(0,0,0,.72) !important;
  }
  .ch-scard:hover .sc-share{
    opacity:1 !important;
  }

  /* Play icon: center overlay on image */
  .ch-scard .sc-play{
    position:absolute !important;
    top:36px !important;
    left:50% !important;
    transform:translate(-50%,-50%) !important;
    font-size:22px !important;
    background:rgba(0,0,0,.55) !important;
    color:#fff !important;
    width:38px !important;
    height:38px !important;
    border-radius:50% !important;
    display:none !important;
    align-items:center !important;
    justify-content:center !important;
    backdrop-filter:blur(4px) !important;
    z-index:2 !important;
    padding:0 !important;
    flex-shrink:unset !important;
    box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.2) !important;
  }
  .ch-scard:hover .sc-play,
  .ch-scard.active .sc-play{
    display:flex !important;
  }

  .empty-s{
    grid-column:1/-1 !important;
    padding:30px 10px !important;
  }

  .no-ch{
    aspect-ratio:16/9 !important;
    border-radius:10px !important;
  }

  .search-box{
    max-width:400px !important;
  }

  /* ===== MOBILE/TABLET PLAYER CONTROLS - MINI SIZE WITH COLORS ===== */
  .p-ctrls{
    padding:6px 8px !important;
    gap:4px !important;
    justify-content:space-around !important;
  }
  
  .pb{
    width:28px !important;
    height:28px !important;
    font-size:10px !important;
    border-radius:6px !important;
  }
  
  .pb.prev-next{
    color:var(--prev-next-color) !important;
  }
  
  .pb.play-btn{
    color:var(--play-color) !important;
    font-size:12px !important;
  }
  
  .pb.live-b{
    font-size:8px !important;
    padding:0 8px !important;
    height:24px !important;
    color:var(--live-color) !important;
  }
  
  .pb.rw-btn{
    color:var(--rw-color) !important;
  }
  
  .pb.mute-btn{
    color:var(--mute-color) !important;
  }
  
  .pb.pip-btn{
    color:var(--pip-color) !important;
  }
  
  .pb.fs-btn{
    color:var(--fs-color) !important;
  }
  
  .vol-sl{
    width:45px !important;
    height:2px !important;
  }
  
  .vol-sl::-webkit-slider-thumb{
    width:9px !important;
    height:9px !important;
  }
  
  .vol-sl::-moz-range-thumb{
    width:9px !important;
    height:9px !important;
  }
  
  .p-off{
    font-size:9px !important;
    min-width:38px !important;
  }
  
  .p-div{
    height:16px !important;
    margin:0 1px !important;
  }
  
  .seek-wrap{
    padding:4px 8px 3px !important;
    gap:6px !important;
  }
  
  .seek-time{
    font-size:9px !important;
    min-width:38px !important;
  }
  
  .seek-bar{
    height:16px !important;
  }
  
  .seek-track{
    height:3px !important;
  }
  
  .seek-bar:hover .seek-track{
    height:5px !important;
  }
  
  .seek-handle{
    width:12px !important;
    height:12px !important;
  }
  
  /* ===== MOBILE CENTER PLAY OVERLAY - BIG SIZE ===== */
  .center-play-overlay{
    width:90px !important;
    height:90px !important;
    border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,.3) !important;
  }
  
  .center-play-overlay i{
    font-size:40px !important;
    margin-left:6px !important;
  }
  
  .center-play-overlay.is-paused i{
    margin-left:0 !important;
  }

  /* ===== MOBILE LOADING MESSAGE - MINI SIZE ===== */
  .p-load-msg .lm-text{

    line-height:1.4 !important;
  }
  .p-load-msg .lm-text i{
    margin-right:6px !important;

  }

  /* Adult button mobile */
  .btn-adult{

    padding:8px 16px !important;
    gap:6px !important;
  }
  
  /* Network indicator mobile */
  .network-indicator{
    font-size:9px !important;
    padding:2px 6px !important;
  }
  .network-indicator i{
    font-size:10px !important;
  }
}

/* ===== Small phones (≤480px) ===== */
@media(max-width:480px){
  #ch-list{

  }

  .ch-scard .sc-img{

  }

  }
  .adult-modal-age{

  }
  .adult-modal-warning{
    padding:12px !important;
  }
  .adult-modal-warning p{

  }
  .btn-adult{

  }

/* ===== Medium tablets (601-900px): 3 columns ===== */
@media(min-width:601px) and (max-width:900px){
  #ch-list{
    grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr) !important;
    gap:12px !important;
  }

  .ch-scard .sc-img{

  }

    width:100px !important;
    height:100px !important;
  }
