        <div class="stat-g" id="stat-g"></div>
        <div class="card" style="padding:18px"><h4 style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px">Recent Channels</h4><div id="rec-ch"><p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">No channels yet.</p></div></div>
      </div>
      <!-- Settings -->
      <div class="adm-sec" id="s-settings">
        <h2 class="adm-h">Settings</h2><p class="adm-sub">Platform preferences</p>
        <div class="card" style="padding:18px;margin-bottom:16px">
          <h4 style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px">Appearance</h4>
          <div class="setting-row">
            <div class="setting-info"><div class="setting-title">Theme</div><div class="setting-desc">Default for all visitors</div></div>
            <div class="setting-action">
              <button class="btn btn-sm btn-o" id="st-l" onclick="saveTheme('light')"><i class="fas fa-sun"></i> Light</button>
              <button class="btn btn-sm btn-o" id="st-d" onclick="saveTheme('dark')"><i class="fas fa-moon"></i> Dark</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="setting-row">
            <div class="setting-info"><div class="setting-title">Accent Color</div><div class="setting-desc">Custom RGB color</div></div>
            <div class="setting-action">
              <div class="color-row">
                <input type="color" class="color-inp" id="st-color" value="#D4850E">
                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-p" onclick="saveAccent()"><i class="fas fa-save"></i> Apply</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="setting-row">
            <div class="setting-info"><div class="setting-title">Admin Registration</div><div class="setting-desc">Allow new admin accounts</div></div>
            <div class="setting-action"><label class="tg" onclick="event.stopPropagation()"><input type="checkbox" id="st-reg"><span class="tg-s"></span></label></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card" style="padding:18px">
          <h4 style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px">Advertisement</h4>
          <div class="setting-row">
            <div class="setting-info"><div class="setting-title">Show Ads</div><div class="setting-desc">Below player</div></div>
            <div class="setting-action"><label class="tg" onclick="event.stopPropagation()"><input type="checkbox" id="st-ads"><span class="tg-s"></span></label></div>
          </div>
          <div style="margin-top:16px">
            <label class="lbl">Ad Code</label>
            <textarea class="inp" id="st-adc" placeholder="Paste ad code..." rows="4"></textarea>
            <button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" style="margin-top:6px" onclick="saveAdsCode()"><i class="fas fa-save"></i> Save</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Categories -->
      <div class="adm-sec" id="s-categories">
        <h2 class="adm-h">Categories</h2><p class="adm-sub">Organize channels into groups</p>
        <div class="sec-toolbar">
          <div class="drag-hint" style="margin-bottom:0"><i class="fas fa-grip-vertical"></i> Long-press and drag to reorder</div>
          <div class="sec-toolbar-right">
            <span class="toolbar-sel-info" id="cat-sel-info"><i class="fas fa-check-square" style="color:var(--accent)"></i> <span id="cat-sel-count">0</span> selected</span>
            <button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" onclick="showAddCatModal()"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Add Category</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card" style="overflow:hidden">
          <table class="at" id="cat-tbl">
            <thead><tr>
              <th class="cb-col"><input type="checkbox" class="cb" id="sel-all-cat" onchange="toggleAllCats(this.checked)"></th>
              <th style="width:28px"></th><th>Name</th><th>Channels</th><th>Position</th><th>Actions</th>
            </tr></thead>
            <tbody id="cat-tb"></tbody>
          </table>
          <div class="empty-s" id="cat-emp" style="display:none"><i class="fas fa-folder-open"></i><p>No categories yet.</p></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Channels -->
      <div class="adm-sec" id="s-channels">
        <h2 class="adm-h">Channels</h2><p class="adm-sub">Manage live TV channels · <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)">Right-click for more options</span></p>
        <div class="sec-toolbar">
          <div class="drag-hint" style="margin-bottom:0"><i class="fas fa-grip-vertical"></i> Long-press and drag to reorder</div>
          <div class="sec-toolbar-right">
            <span class="toolbar-sel-info" id="ch-sel-info"><i class="fas fa-check-square" style="color:var(--accent)"></i> <span id="ch-sel-count">0</span> selected</span>
            <span class="uncat-badge" id="uncat-badge" style="display:none" onclick="showMoveUncategorizedModal()">
              <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle"></i> <span class="uncat-num" id="uncat-num">0</span> Uncategorized
              <i class="fas fa-arrow-right" style="font-size:8px;opacity:.5"></i> Move
            </span>
            <button class="btn btn-export btn-sm" onclick="exportChannels()" title="Export all channels as .m3u backup"><i class="fas fa-download"></i> Export .m3u</button>
            <button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" onclick="showAddChModal()"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Add Channel</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card" style="overflow-x:auto">
          <table class="at" id="ch-tbl">
            <thead><tr>
              <th class="cb-col"><input type="checkbox" class="cb" id="sel-all-ch" onchange="toggleAllChs(this.checked)"></th>
              <th style="width:28px"></th><th></th><th>Name</th><th>Category</th><th>URL</th><th>Actions</th>
            </tr></thead>
            <tbody id="ch-tb"></tbody>
          </table>
          <div class="empty-s" id="ch-emp" style="display:none"><i class="fas fa-tv"></i><p>No channels yet.</p></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Approval Queue -->
      <div class="adm-sec" id="s-approval">
        <h2 class="adm-h">Approval Queue</h2>
        <p class="adm-sub">Review uploaded channels before publishing to homepage · <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)">Right-click for more options</span></p>
        <div class="approval-header ah-waiting" id="approval-header">
          <div class="ah-icon"><i class="fas fa-hourglass-half"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="ah-count" id="pending-count">0</div>
            <div class="ah-label">Channels waiting for review</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="sec-toolbar">
          <div class="drag-hint" style="margin-bottom:0"><i class="fas fa-play-circle"></i> Play each channel to test, then Approve or Reject</div>
          <div class="sec-toolbar-right">
            <span class="toolbar-sel-info" id="pend-sel-info"><i class="fas fa-check-square" style="color:var(--accent)"></i> <span id="pend-sel-count">0</span> selected</span>
            <button class="btn btn-warn btn-sm" onclick="showUploadForReviewModal()"><i class="fas fa-upload"></i> Upload for Review</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card" style="overflow-x:auto">
          <table class="at" id="pend-tbl">
            <thead><tr>
              <th class="cb-col"><input type="checkbox" class="cb" id="sel-all-pend" onchange="toggleAllPend(this.checked)"></th>
              <th></th><th>Name</th><th>Target Category</th><th>URL</th><th>Uploaded</th><th>Actions</th>
            </tr></thead>
            <tbody id="pend-tb"></tbody>
          </table>
          <div class="empty-s" id="pend-emp" style="display:none"><i class="fas fa-clipboard-check"></i><p>No channels waiting for review. Upload a channel list to get started.</p></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Import / Export -->
      <div class="adm-sec" id="s-import">
        <h2 class="adm-h">Import / Export</h2>
        <p class="adm-sub">Upload M3U8, GitHub URL, auto-sync sources, or export backup</p>

        <!-- Export Section -->
        <div class="card" style="overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:16px">
          <div style="padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">
            <h4 style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px"><i class="fas fa-file-export" style="color:#2B6CB0"></i> Export & Backup</h4>
          </div>
          <div class="export-card" onclick="exportChannels()">
            <div class="ec-icon m3u"><i class="fas fa-file-audio"></i></div>
            <div class="ec-info">
              <div class="ec-title">Export All Channels (.m3u)</div>
              <div class="ec-desc">Download complete channel list as M3U playlist file — compatible with any IPTV player</div>
            </div>
            <i class="fas fa-chevron-right ec-arrow"></i>
          </div>
          <div class="export-card" onclick="exportChannelsByCategory()">
            <div class="ec-icon m3u"><i class="fas fa-folder-download"></i></div>
            <div class="ec-info">
              <div class="ec-title">Export by Category (.m3u)</div>
              <div class="ec-desc">Choose a specific category to export as a separate M3U file</div>
            </div>
            <i class="fas fa-chevron-right ec-arrow"></i>
          </div>
          <div class="export-card" onclick="exportSelectedChannels()" id="export-sel-card" style="display:none">
            <div class="ec-icon m3u" style="background:rgba(212,133,14,.1);color:var(--accent)"><i class="fas fa-check-double"></i></div>
            <div class="ec-info">
              <div class="ec-title">Export Selected (<span id="export-sel-count">0</span> channels)</div>
              <div class="ec-desc">Export only the currently selected channels from the Channels table</div>
            </div>
            <i class="fas fa-chevron-right ec-arrow"></i>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Auto-Sync Sources -->
        <div class="card" style="padding:18px;margin-bottom:16px">
          <h4 style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px"><i class="fas fa-link" style="color:var(--accent);margin-right:6px"></i>Saved Auto-Sync Sources</h4>
          <div id="gh-sources"><p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">No sources saved. Add one below.</p></div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px">
          <div class="card" style="padding:18px">
            <h4 style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px"><i class="fas fa-upload" style="color:var(--accent);margin-right:6px"></i>Upload M3U8</h4>
            <div class="upload-z" id="up-z" onclick="document.getElementById('m3f').click()">
              <i class="fas fa-cloud-upload-alt"></i><p style="font-size:12px">Click to select .m3u8 file</p><small style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)">Auto-parses name, URL, logo, category</small>
            </div>
            <input type="file" id="m3f" accept=".m3u,.m3u8" style="display:none">
            <div id="up-prog" style="display:none;margin-top:12px"><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:5px" id="up-st">Parsing...</div><div style="height:4px;background:var(--bg2);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden"><div id="up-bar" style="height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px;width:0%;transition:width .3s"></div></div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="card" style="padding:18px">
            <h4 style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px"><i class="fab fa-github" style="color:var(--accent);margin-right:6px"></i>Add GitHub Source</h4>
            <div class="fg"><label class="lbl">Raw File URL</label><input type="url" class="inp" id="gh-url" placeholder="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/.../playlist.m3u8"></div>
            <div class="fg"><label class="lbl">Category Override (optional)</label><select class="inp" id="gh-cat"><option value="">Auto-detect</option></select></div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:6px">
              <button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" onclick="handleGHImport()" id="gh-btn"><i class="fas fa-download"></i> Import Now</button>
              <button class="btn btn-o btn-sm" onclick="saveGHSource()"><i class="fas fa-clock"></i> Save & Auto-Sync</button>
            </div>
            <div id="gh-prog" style="display:none;margin-top:12px"><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:5px" id="gh-st">Fetching...</div><div style="height:4px;background:var(--bg2);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden"><div id="gh-bar" style="height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px;width:0%;transition:width .3s"></div></div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </main>
  </div>
</div>

<script type="module">
import { initializeApp } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/11.7.1/firebase-app.js";
import { getDatabase, ref, set, get, update, remove, push, onValue } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/11.7.1/firebase-database.js";

const fbC = {
  apiKey: "AIzaSyBYd8ijpl2op0MWU51DeLvVNKbgHw3wkOU",
  authDomain: "iptv-1120f.firebaseapp.com",
  databaseURL: "https://iptv-1120f-default-rtdb.firebaseio.com",
  projectId: "iptv-1120f",
  storageBucket: "iptv-1120f.firebasestorage.app",
  messagingSenderId: "777672486608",
  appId: "1:777672486608:web:1bb2cc830e6c7ee444b8d5",
  measurementId: "G-NT4E10B4WQ"
};
const app = initializeApp(fbC);
const db = getDatabase(app);

const S = {
  isAdmin: false, adminEmail: '', dbConnected: false,
  settings: { theme: 'light', accentColor: '#D4850E', adminRegistration: false, adsEnabled: false, adsCode: '' },
  cats: [], chs: [], ghSources: {}, pendingChs: []
};

var pipState = {
  hlsInstance: null, currentChId: null, currentChObj: null,
  isPlaying: false, isMuted: true, isDragging: false, isResizing: false,
  dragOffX: 0, dragOffY: 0, resizeStartW: 0, resizeStartH: 0, resizeStartX: 0, resizeStartY: 0
};

/* ===== Context Menu State ===== */
var ctxState = {
  visible: false,
  targetChIds: [],
  targetPendIds: [],
  ctxType: 'ch'
};

var importedUrlsCache = null;

function urlHash(url) {
  var h = 0; for (var i = 0; i < url.length; i++) { h = ((h << 5) - h) + url.charCodeAt(i); h = h & h; } return 'u' + Math.abs(h).toString(36);
}
function isPermError(err) {
  var msg = ''; if (err) { msg = err.message || err.toString() || ''; if (err.code) msg += ' ' + err.code; }
  return msg.indexOf('permission') !== -1 || msg.indexOf('Permission') !== -1 || msg.indexOf('PERMISSION_DENIED') !== -1;
}
function handleDBError(err, ctx) {
  console.error(ctx + ':', err);
  if (isPermError(err)) { showPermWarning(); return 'permission'; }
  toast(ctx + ': ' + (err.message || err), 'e'); return 'other';
}
var dbR = function(p) { return ref(db, p); };
var dbG = async function(p) {
  try { var s = await get(dbR(p)); S.dbConnected = true; updateDBStatusUI(true); return s.exists() ? s.val() : null; }
  catch (err) { var t = handleDBError(err, 'Read failed'); if (t === 'permission') updateDBStatusUI(false); throw err; }
};
var dbS = async function(p, v) {
  try { await set(dbR(p), v); S.dbConnected = true; updateDBStatusUI(true); return true; }
  catch (err) { handleDBError(err, 'Write failed'); return false; }
};
var dbU = async function(p, v) {
  try { await update(dbR(p), v); S.dbConnected = true; updateDBStatusUI(true); return true; }
  catch (err) { handleDBError(err, 'Update failed'); return false; }
};
var dbX = async function(p) {
  try { await remove(dbR(p)); return true; }
  catch (err) { handleDBError(err, 'Delete failed'); return false; }
};
var dbP = async function(p, v) {
  try { var r = push(dbR(p)); await set(r, v); S.dbConnected = true; updateDBStatusUI(true); return r.key; }
  catch (err) { handleDBError(err, 'Push failed'); return null; }
};

function updateDBStatusUI(c) {
  var el = document.getElementById('db-status-admin');
  if (el) { el.className = 'db-status ' + (c ? 'db-ok' : 'db-err'); el.innerHTML = '<span class="db-dot"></span>' + (c ? 'Connected' : 'No Access'); }
}
var permWarnShown = false;
function showPermWarning() {
  if (permWarnShown) return; permWarnShown = true;
  var el = document.getElementById('rules-warn'); if (el) el.style.display = 'block';
  toast('Database permission denied. See instructions below.', 'w');
}

function esc(s) { if (!s) return ''; var d = document.createElement('div'); d.textContent = s; return d.innerHTML; }
async function hashPwd(p) { var e = new TextEncoder().encode(p); var h = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', e); return Array.from(new Uint8Array(h)).map(function(b) { return b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0'); }).join(''); }
function catName(id, cats) { if (!id) return 'Uncategorized'; var c = (cats || S.cats).find(function(x) { return x.id === id; }); return c ? c.name : 'Unknown'; }
function timeAgo(ts) { if (!ts) return 'Never'; var d = Date.now() - ts; if (d < 60000) return 'Just now'; if (d < 3600000) return Math.floor(d / 60000) + 'm ago'; if (d < 86400000) return Math.floor(d / 3600000) + 'h ago'; return Math.floor(d / 86400000) + 'd ago'; }
function getBaseUrl() { var u = new URL(window.location.href); return (u.origin + u.pathname).replace('admin-dashboard.html', 'homepage.html'); }
function getChannelShareUrl(chId) { var b = getBaseUrl(); return b + (b.indexOf('?') !== -1 ? '&' : '?') + 'ch=' + encodeURIComponent(chId); }

function toast(m, t) {
  if (!t) t = 'i'; var e = document.createElement('div'); e.className = 'toast toast-' + t; e.textContent = m;
  document.getElementById('toast-c').appendChild(e);
  requestAnimationFrame(function() { e.classList.add('show'); });
  setTimeout(function() { e.classList.remove('show'); setTimeout(function() { e.remove(); }, 300); }, 4000);
}
window.toast = toast;
function showModal(h) { document.getElementById('modal-ct').innerHTML = '<button class="modal-close" onclick="hideModal()" title="Close"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button>' + h; document.getElementById('modal-ov').classList.add('show'); }
function hideModal() { document.getElementById('modal-ov').classList.remove('show'); }
window.showModal = showModal; window.hideModal = hideModal;

function applyAccent(hex) {
  if (!hex || hex.indexOf('#') !== 0 || hex.length !== 7) return;
  var r = parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16), g = parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16), b = parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16);
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent', hex);
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent-h', 'rgb('+Math.round(r*.82)+','+Math.round(g*.82)+','+Math.round(b*.82)+')');
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent-l', 'rgb('+Math.round(r+(255-r)*.88)+','+Math.round(g+(255-g)*.88)+','+Math.round(b+(255-b)*.88)+')');
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent-alpha', 'rgba('+r+','+g+','+b+',.3)');
}
function applyTheme(t) { document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', t); S.settings.theme = t; if (S.settings.accentColor) applyAccent(S.settings.accentColor); updateThemeButtons(t); }
function updateThemeButtons(t) {
  var tl = document.getElementById('st-l'), td = document.getElementById('st-d'); if (!tl || !td) return;
  if (t === 'light') { tl.style.cssText = 'background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent)'; td.style.cssText = 'background:transparent;color:var(--fg);border-color:var(--border)'; }
  else { td.style.cssText = 'background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent)'; tl.style.cssText = 'background:transparent;color:var(--fg);border-color:var(--border)'; }
}

function showView(n) { document.getElementById('v-login').style.display = n === 'login' ? 'block' : 'none'; document.getElementById('v-admin').style.display = n === 'admin' ? 'block' : 'none'; if (n === 'login') clearAllSelections(); }
window.showView = showView;
var activeSection = 'dashboard';
function getActiveSection() { return activeSection; }

/* ===== PIP Player ===== */
function pipPlayChannel(chOrId) {
  var ch;
  if (typeof chOrId === 'object' && chOrId !== null) { ch = chOrId; }
  else { ch = S.chs.find(function(c) { return c.id === chOrId; }); }
  if (!ch) { toast('Channel not found', 'e'); return; }
  if (ch._pendingId) {
    pipState.currentChId = null; pipState.currentChObj = ch;
    document.querySelectorAll('.pending-row-playing').forEach(function(r) { r.classList.remove('pending-row-playing'); });
    var pRow = document.querySelector('tr[data-pid="'+ch._pendingId+'"]');
    if (pRow) pRow.classList.add('pending-row-playing');
  } else {
    pipState.currentChId = ch.id; pipState.currentChObj = null;
  }
  var player = document.getElementById('pip-player'); var video = document.getElementById('pip-video');
  var overlay = document.getElementById('pip-overlay'); var buffer = document.getElementById('pip-buffer');
  var errorEl = document.getElementById('pip-error'); var nameEl = document.getElementById('pip-ch-name');
  var logoImg = document.getElementById('pip-ch-logo'); var logoLetter = document.getElementById('pip-ch-logo-letter');
  if (pipState.hlsInstance) { pipState.hlsInstance.destroy(); pipState.hlsInstance = null; }
  video.src = ''; video.load();
  overlay.classList.add('hidden'); buffer.classList.remove('show'); errorEl.classList.remove('show');
  document.getElementById('pip-progress-bar').style.width = '0%';
  nameEl.textContent = ch.name;
  if (ch.image) { logoImg.src = ch.image; logoImg.style.display = 'block'; logoLetter.style.display = 'none'; }
  else { logoImg.style.display = 'none'; logoLetter.style.display = 'flex'; logoLetter.textContent = ch.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase(); }
  player.style.display = 'block'; player.classList.remove('pip-exit');
  buffer.classList.add('show'); pipState.isPlaying = false; pipState.isMuted = true; video.muted = true;
  updatePipPlayBtn(); updatePipMuteBtn();
  var url = ch.url; var isHls = url.indexOf('.m3u8') !== -1;
  function handlePlayError() {
    pipState.isPlaying = true; updatePipPlayBtn();
    overlay.classList.remove('hidden');
    document.getElementById('pip-overlay-icon').className = 'fas fa-volume-mute';
    document.getElementById('pip-overlay-text').textContent = 'Click to unmute';
    overlay.style.pointerEvents = 'auto'; overlay.style.cursor = 'pointer';
    overlay.onclick = function() { video.muted = false; pipState.isMuted = false; updatePipMuteBtn(); overlay.classList.add('hidden'); overlay.style.pointerEvents = 'none'; overlay.onclick = null; };
  }
  function doPlay() {
    buffer.classList.remove('show');
    video.play().then(function() {
      pipState.isPlaying = true; updatePipPlayBtn();
      setTimeout(function() { video.muted = false; pipState.isMuted = false; updatePipMuteBtn(); }, 300);
    }).catch(handlePlayError);
  }
  if (isHls && Hls.isSupported()) {
    var hls = new Hls({ enableWorker: true, lowLatencyMode: true, maxBufferLength: 10, maxMaxBufferLength: 30 });
    pipState.hlsInstance = hls; hls.loadSource(url); hls.attachMedia(video);
    hls.on(Hls.Events.MANIFEST_PARSED, doPlay);
    hls.on(Hls.Events.ERROR, function(event, data) {
      if (data.fatal) {
        buffer.classList.remove('show');
        if (data.type === Hls.ErrorTypes.MEDIA_ERROR) { hls.recoverMediaError(); return; }
        document.getElementById('pip-error-text').textContent = data.type === Hls.ErrorTypes.NETWORK_ERROR ? 'Network error - stream unavailable' : 'Failed to load stream';
        errorEl.classList.add('show'); pipState.isPlaying = false; updatePipPlayBtn();
      }
    });
  } else if (isHls && video.canPlayType('application/vnd.apple.mpegurl')) {
    video.src = url;
    video.addEventListener('loadedmetadata', function onMeta() { video.removeEventListener('loadedmetadata', onMeta); doPlay(); });
    video.addEventListener('error', function() { buffer.classList.remove('show'); document.getElementById('pip-error-text').textContent = 'Failed to load stream'; errorEl.classList.add('show'); pipState.isPlaying = false; updatePipPlayBtn(); });
  } else {
    video.src = url;
    video.addEventListener('loadeddata', function onLoaded() { video.removeEventListener('loadeddata', onLoaded); doPlay(); });
    video.addEventListener('error', function() { buffer.classList.remove('show'); document.getElementById('pip-error-text').textContent = 'Failed to load stream. Check the URL.'; errorEl.classList.add('show'); pipState.isPlaying = false; updatePipPlayBtn(); });
  }
  video.ontimeupdate = function() {
    if (video.duration && isFinite(video.duration)) { document.getElementById('pip-progress-bar').style.width = (video.currentTime / video.duration * 100) + '%'; }
    else { var w = parseFloat(document.getElementById('pip-progress-bar').style.width) || 0; document.getElementById('pip-progress-bar').style.width = (w >= 100 ? 0 : w + 0.5) + '%'; }
  };
}
window.pipPlayChannel = pipPlayChannel;

function pipTogglePlay() {
  var video = document.getElementById('pip-video'); var overlay = document.getElementById('pip-overlay');
  if (pipState.isPlaying) {
    video.pause(); pipState.isPlaying = false;
    overlay.classList.remove('hidden');
    document.getElementById('pip-overlay-icon').className = 'fas fa-play-circle';
    document.getElementById('pip-overlay-text').textContent = 'Paused';
    overlay.style.pointerEvents = 'auto'; overlay.style.cursor = 'pointer';
    overlay.onclick = function() { pipTogglePlay(); overlay.onclick = null; };
  } else {
    video.play().then(function() { pipState.isPlaying = true; overlay.classList.add('hidden'); overlay.style.pointerEvents = 'none'; overlay.onclick = null; }).catch(function() { toast('Playback failed', 'e'); });
  }
  updatePipPlayBtn();
}
window.pipTogglePlay = pipTogglePlay;
function pipToggleMute() { var v = document.getElementById('pip-video'); v.muted = !v.muted; pipState.isMuted = v.muted; updatePipMuteBtn(); }
window.pipToggleMute = pipToggleMute;
function pipTogglePiP() {
  var v = document.getElementById('pip-video');
  if (document.pictureInPictureElement) document.exitPictureInPicture().catch(function() {});
  else if (v.requestPictureInPicture) v.requestPictureInPicture().catch(function() { toast('PiP not available', 'w'); });
  else toast('PiP not supported', 'w');
}
window.pipTogglePiP = pipTogglePiP;
function pipSeek(e) { var v = document.getElementById('pip-video'); if (v.duration && isFinite(v.duration)) { var r = e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect(); v.currentTime = ((e.clientX - r.left) / r.width) * v.duration; } }
window.pipSeek = pipSeek;
function pipClose() {
  var p = document.getElementById('pip-player'); var v = document.getElementById('pip-video');
  p.classList.add('pip-exit'); v.pause();
  if (pipState.hlsInstance) { pipState.hlsInstance.destroy(); pipState.hlsInstance = null; }
  v.src = ''; pipState.currentChId = null; pipState.currentChObj = null; pipState.isPlaying = false;
  document.querySelectorAll('.pending-row-playing').forEach(function(r) { r.classList.remove('pending-row-playing'); });
  if (document.pictureInPictureElement) document.exitPictureInPicture().catch(function() {});
  setTimeout(function() { p.style.display = 'none'; p.classList.remove('pip-exit'); }, 200);
}
window.pipClose = pipClose;
function updatePipPlayBtn() { var b = document.getElementById('pip-play-btn'); if (b) b.innerHTML = pipState.isPlaying ? '<i class="fas fa-pause"></i>' : '<i class="fas fa-play"></i>'; }
function updatePipMuteBtn() {
  var b = document.getElementById('pip-mute-btn'); if (b) {
    b.innerHTML = pipState.isMuted ? '<i class="fas fa-volume-mute"></i>' : '<i class="fas fa-volume-up"></i>';
    pipState.isMuted ? b.classList.add('active') : b.classList.remove('active');
  }
}

/* PIP Drag & Resize */
(function() {
  var header = document.getElementById('pip-header'); var player = document.getElementById('pip-player'); var rh = document.getElementById('pip-resize');
  header.addEventListener('pointerdown', function(e) {
    if (e.target.closest('.pip-btn')) return; e.preventDefault();
    pipState.isDragging = true; var r = player.getBoundingClientRect();
    pipState.dragOffX = e.clientX - r.left; pipState.dragOffY = e.clientY - r.top; header.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
  });
  header.addEventListener('pointermove', function(e) {
    if (!pipState.isDragging) return; e.preventDefault();
    var x = Math.max(0, Math.min(e.clientX - pipState.dragOffX, window.innerWidth - player.offsetWidth));
    var y = Math.max(0, Math.min(e.clientY - pipState.dragOffY, window.innerHeight - player.offsetHeight));
    player.style.left = x + 'px'; player.style.top = y + 'px'; player.style.right = 'auto'; player.style.bottom = 'auto';
  });
  header.addEventListener('pointerup', function() { pipState.isDragging = false; });
  header.addEventListener('pointercancel', function() { pipState.isDragging = false; });
  rh.addEventListener('pointerdown', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); pipState.isResizing = true;
    pipState.resizeStartW = player.offsetWidth; pipState.resizeStartH = player.offsetHeight;
    pipState.resizeStartX = e.clientX; pipState.resizeStartY = e.clientY; rh.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
  });
  rh.addEventListener('pointermove', function(e) {
    if (!pipState.isResizing) return; e.preventDefault();
    player.style.width = Math.max(240, pipState.resizeStartW + e.clientX - pipState.resizeStartX) + 'px';
  });
  rh.addEventListener('pointerup', function() { pipState.isResizing = false; });
  rh.addEventListener('pointercancel', function() { pipState.isResizing = false; });
})();

/* ===== Context Menu - Unified System ===== */
function positionCtxMenu(menu, x, y) {
  var mw = menu.offsetWidth, mh = menu.offsetHeight;
  if (x + mw > window.innerWidth - 8) x = window.innerWidth - mw - 8;
  if (y + mh > window.innerHeight - 8) y = window.innerHeight - mh - 8;
  if (x < 4) x = 4; if (y < 4) y = 4;
  menu.style.left = x + 'px'; menu.style.top = y + 'px';
}

function showChContextMenu(x, y, chIds) {
  ctxState.targetChIds = chIds.slice();
  ctxState.targetPendIds = [];
  ctxState.ctxType = 'ch';
  ctxState.visible = true;
  var menu = document.getElementById('ctx-menu');
  var isSingle = chIds.length === 1;
  var ch = isSingle ? S.chs.find(function(c) { return c.id === chIds[0]; }) : null;
  var html = '';
  if (isSingle && ch) {
    html += '<button class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxChPlay()"><i class="fas fa-play" style="color:var(--success)"></i> Play / Test</button>';
    html += '<button class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxChEdit()"><i class="fas fa-pen" style="color:var(--accent)"></i> Edit Channel</button>';
    html += '<button class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxChCopyLink()"><i class="fas fa-link" style="color:var(--fg2)"></i> Copy Share Link</button>';
  }
  html += '<button class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxChMove()"><i class="fas fa-folder-open" style="color:var(--accent)"></i> Move to Category' + (chIds.length > 1 ? ' <span class="ctx-badge">' + chIds.length + '</span>' : '') + '</button>';
  if (chIds.length > 1) html += '<button class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxChSelectAll()"><i class="fas fa-check-double" style="color:var(--fg2)"></i> Select All Matching</button>';
  html += '<div class="ctx-sep"></div>';
  html += '<button class="ctx-item danger" onclick="ctxChDelete()"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i> Delete' + (chIds.length > 1 ? ' <span class="ctx-badge" style="background:rgba(197,48,48,.12);color:var(--danger)">' + chIds.length + '</span>' : '') + '</button>';
  menu.innerHTML = html; menu.style.display = 'block';
  positionCtxMenu(menu, x, y);
}

function showPendContextMenu(x, y, pendIds) {
  ctxState.targetPendIds = pendIds.slice();
  ctxState.targetChIds = [];
  ctxState.ctxType = 'pend';
  ctxState.visible = true;
  var menu = document.getElementById('ctx-menu');
  var isSingle = pendIds.length === 1;
  var ch = isSingle ? S.pendingChs.find(function(c) { return c._pendingId === pendIds[0]; }) : null;
  var html = '';
  if (isSingle && ch) {
    html += '<button class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxPendPlay()"><i class="fas fa-play" style="color:var(--success)"></i> Play / Test</button>';
  }
  html += '<button class="ctx-item success" onclick="ctxPendApprove()"><i class="fas fa-check"></i> Approve & Publish' + (pendIds.length > 1 ? ' <span class="ctx-badge" style="background:rgba(47,133,90,.12);color:var(--success)">' + pendIds.length + '</span>' : '') + '</button>';
  if (pendIds.length > 1) html += '<button class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxPendSelectAll()"><i class="fas fa-check-double" style="color:var(--fg2)"></i> Select All in Queue</button>';
  html += '<div class="ctx-sep"></div>';
  html += '<button class="ctx-item danger" onclick="ctxPendReject()"><i class="fas fa-times"></i> Reject & Delete' + (pendIds.length > 1 ? ' <span class="ctx-badge" style="background:rgba(197,48,48,.12);color:var(--danger)">' + pendIds.length + '</span>' : '') + '</button>';
  menu.innerHTML = html; menu.style.display = 'block';
  positionCtxMenu(menu, x, y);
}

function hideContextMenu() { var m = document.getElementById('ctx-menu'); m.style.display = 'none'; ctxState.visible = false; ctxState.targetChIds = []; ctxState.targetPendIds = []; }
window.hideContextMenu = hideContextMenu;

/* ===== Context Menu Actions - Channels =====
   IMPORTANT: Save IDs to local vars BEFORE calling hideContextMenu(),
   because hideContextMenu() clears ctxState arrays. */
window.ctxChPlay = function() {
  var ids = ctxState.targetChIds.slice(); hideContextMenu();
  if (ids.length === 1) pipPlayChannel(ids[0]);
};
window.ctxChEdit = function() {
  var ids = ctxState.targetChIds.slice(); hideContextMenu();
  if (ids.length === 1) editCh(ids[0]);
};
window.ctxChCopyLink = function() {
  var ids = ctxState.targetChIds.slice(); hideContextMenu();
  if (ids.length === 1) copyChUrl(ids[0]);
};
window.ctxChMove = function() {
  var ids = ctxState.targetChIds.slice(); hideContextMenu();
  showMoveToCategoryModal(ids);
};
window.ctxChSelectAll = function() {
  var ids = ctxState.targetChIds.slice(); hideContextMenu();
  ids.forEach(function(id) { var cb = document.querySelector('.ch-cb[data-id="'+id+'"]'); if (cb) cb.checked = true; });
  updateChSelState(); toast(ids.length + ' channels selected', 'i');
};
window.ctxChDelete = function() {
  var ids = ctxState.targetChIds.slice(); hideContextMenu();
  if (!ids.length) return;
  if (ids.length === 1) { deleteCh(ids[0]); return; }
  if (!confirm('Delete ' + ids.length + ' selected channels?')) return;
  var doDelete = async function() { for (var i = 0; i < ids.length; i++) { await dbX('channels/' + ids[i]); } toast('Deleted ' + ids.length + ' channels', 's'); clearAllSelections(); }; doDelete();
};

/* ===== Context Menu Actions - Pending/Approval Queue
   IMPORTANT: Save IDs to local vars BEFORE calling hideContextMenu(). */
window.ctxPendPlay = function() {
  var ids = ctxState.targetPendIds.slice(); hideContextMenu();
  if (ids.length === 1) {
    var ch = S.pendingChs.find(function(c) { return c._pendingId === ids[0]; });
    if (ch) pipPlayChannel(ch);
  }
};
window.ctxPendApprove = async function() {
  var ids = ctxState.targetPendIds.slice(); hideContextMenu();
  if (!ids.length) return;
  if (ids.length === 1) { approvePending(ids[0]); return; }
  if (!confirm('Approve and publish ' + ids.length + ' channels to homepage?')) return;
  var ok = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < ids.length; i++) {
    var ch = S.pendingChs.find(function(c) { return c._pendingId === ids[i]; });
    if (!ch) continue;
    var entry = { name: ch.name, url: ch.url, image: ch.image || '', category: ch.targetCategory || '', order: S.chs.length + ok };
    var key = await dbP('channels', entry);
    if (key) { await dbX('pendingChannels/' + ids[i]); ok++; }
  }
  clearAllSelections(); toast('Approved and published ' + ok + ' channel' + (ok === 1 ? '' : 's'), 's');
};
window.ctxPendReject = async function() {
  var ids = ctxState.targetPendIds.slice(); hideContextMenu();
  if (!ids.length) return;
  if (ids.length === 1) { rejectPending(ids[0]); return; }
  if (!confirm('Reject and delete ' + ids.length + ' channel' + (ids.length === 1 ? '' : 's') + '?\n\nThis cannot be undone.')) return;
  var ok = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < ids.length; i++) {
    var pid = ids[i];
    var ch = S.pendingChs.find(function(c) { return c._pendingId === pid; });
    var chName = ch ? ch.name : pid;
    var success = await dbX('pendingChannels/' + pid);
    if (success) { ok++; console.log('Rejected pending channel:', chName, 'key:', pid); }
    else { console.error('Failed to reject pending channel:', chName, 'key:', pid); }
  }
  clearAllSelections(); toast('Rejected and deleted ' + ok + ' channel' + (ok === 1 ? '' : 's'), 'i');
};
window.ctxPendSelectAll = function() {
  hideContextMenu();
  document.querySelectorAll('.pend-cb').forEach(function(cb) { cb.checked = true; });
  updatePendSelState();
  toast(S.pendingChs.length + ' channels selected', 'i');
};

/* ===== Context Menu Event Listeners ===== */
document.getElementById('ch-tbl').addEventListener('contextmenu', function(e) {
  e.preventDefault(); var row = e.target.closest('tr[data-id]'); if (!row) { hideContextMenu(); return; }
  var chId = row.dataset.id; var checkedIds = getSelectedChIds();
  showChContextMenu(e.clientX, e.clientY, checkedIds.indexOf(chId) !== -1 ? checkedIds.slice() : [chId]);
});
document.getElementById('pend-tbl').addEventListener('contextmenu', function(e) {
  e.preventDefault(); var row = e.target.closest('tr[data-pid]'); if (!row) { hideContextMenu(); return; }
  var pid = row.dataset.pid; var checkedIds = getSelectedPendIds();
  showPendContextMenu(e.clientX, e.clientY, checkedIds.indexOf(pid) !== -1 ? checkedIds.slice() : [pid]);
});
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) { if (ctxState.visible && !e.target.closest('#ctx-menu')) hideContextMenu(); });
document.addEventListener('scroll', function() { if (ctxState.visible) hideContextMenu(); }, true);

/* ===== Move To Category Modal ===== */
var ctxMoveIds = [];
window.showMoveToCategoryModal = function(chIds) {
  ctxMoveIds = chIds; var chs = chIds.map(function(id) { return S.chs.find(function(c) { return c.id === id; }); }).filter(Boolean);
  if (!chs.length) return; if (!S.cats.length) { toast('No categories exist yet.', 'w'); return; }
  var co = ''; S.cats.forEach(function(c) { co += '<option value="'+c.id+'">'+esc(c.name)+'</option>'; });
  showModal(
    '<h3 class="modal-t"><i class="fas fa-folder-open" style="color:var(--accent);margin-right:6px"></i>Move to Category</h3>' +
    '<p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:14px">Move ' + chs.length + ' channel' + (chs.length === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' to:</p>' +
    '<div class="modal-ch-preview">' + buildChPreviewHtml(chs) + '</div>' +
    '<div class="fg"><label class="lbl">Target Category</label><select class="inp" id="m-bcat">' + co + '</select></div>' +
    '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:18px">' +
    '<button class="btn btn-o btn-sm" onclick="hideModal()">Cancel</button>' +
    '<button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" onclick="executeCtxMove()"><i class="fas fa-check"></i> Move</button></div>'
  );
};
window.executeCtxMove = async function() {
  var catId = document.getElementById('m-bcat').value; if (!catId) { toast('Select a category', 'e'); return; }
  var catLabel = catName(catId); var btn = document.querySelector('#modal-ct .btn-p');
  if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Moving...'; }
  var ok = 0; for (var i = 0; i < ctxMoveIds.length; i++) { if (await dbU('channels/' + ctxMoveIds[i], { category: catId })) ok++; }
  hideModal(); clearAllSelections(); toast('Moved ' + ok + ' channel' + (ok === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' to "' + catLabel + '"', 's');
};

/* ===== EXPORT FUNCTIONS ===== */
function generateM3UContent(channels) {
  var m3u = '#EXTM3U\n';
  channels.forEach(function(ch) {
    var logo = ch.image || '';
    var cat = ch.category ? catName(ch.category) : 'Uncategorized';
    m3u += '#EXTINF:-1 tvg-logo="' + logo + '" group-title="' + cat + '",' + ch.name + '\n';
    m3u += ch.url + '\n';
  });
  return m3u;
}

function downloadM3UFile(content, filename) {
  var blob = new Blob([content], { type: 'application/x-mpegurl;charset=utf-8' });
  var url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  var a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url;
  a.download = filename;
  document.body.appendChild(a);
  a.click();
  document.body.removeChild(a);
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}

window.exportChannels = function() {
  if (!S.chs.length) { toast('No channels to export', 'w'); return; }
  var content = generateM3UContent(S.chs);
  var date = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  var filename = 'streamvault-backup-' + date + '.m3u';
  downloadM3UFile(content, filename);
  toast('Exported ' + S.chs.length + ' channels as ' + filename, 's');
};

window.exportChannelsByCategory = function() {
  if (!S.chs.length) { toast('No channels to export', 'w'); return; }
  if (!S.cats.length) { toast('No categories exist. Use "Export All" instead.', 'w'); return; }
  var co = '';
  S.cats.forEach(function(c) {
    var count = S.chs.filter(function(ch) { return ch.category === c.id; }).length;
    co += '<option value="'+c.id+'">'+esc(c.name)+' (' + count + ' channels)</option>';
  });
  var uncatCount = S.chs.filter(function(ch) { return !ch.category; }).length;
  if (uncatCount > 0) co += '<option value="">Uncategorized (' + uncatCount + ' channels)</option>';
  showModal(
    '<h3 class="modal-t"><i class="fas fa-folder-download" style="color:#2B6CB0;margin-right:6px"></i>Export by Category</h3>' +
    '<div class="fg"><label class="lbl">Select Category</label><select class="inp" id="m-exp-cat" style="font-size:13px;padding:10px 12px;font-weight:600">' + co + '</select></div>' +
    '<div id="m-exp-preview" style="margin-top:8px"></div>' +
    '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:18px">' +
    '<button class="btn btn-o btn-sm" onclick="hideModal()">Cancel</button>' +
    '<button class="btn btn-export btn-sm" onclick="executeExportByCat()"><i class="fas fa-download"></i> Export</button></div>'
  );
  setTimeout(function() {
    var sel = document.getElementById('m-exp-cat');
    if (sel) sel.onchange = function() { updateExportCatPreview(); };
    updateExportCatPreview();
  }, 100);
};

function updateExportCatPreview() {
  var sel = document.getElementById('m-exp-cat');
  var preview = document.getElementById('m-exp-preview');
  if (!sel || !preview) return;
  var catId = sel.value;
  var filtered = catId ? S.chs.filter(function(ch) { return ch.category === catId; }) : S.chs.filter(function(ch) { return !ch.category; });
  if (!filtered.length) { preview.innerHTML = '<p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">No channels in this category.</p>'; return; }
  preview.innerHTML = '<p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--fg);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:8px">' + filtered.length + ' channels will be exported</p>' +
    '<div class="modal-ch-preview" style="max-height:140px">' + buildChPreviewHtml(filtered, 6) + '</div>';
}
window.updateExportCatPreview = updateExportCatPreview;

window.executeExportByCat = function() {
  var catId = document.getElementById('m-exp-cat').value;
  var filtered = catId ? S.chs.filter(function(ch) { return ch.category === catId; }) : S.chs.filter(function(ch) { return !ch.category; });
  if (!filtered.length) { toast('No channels to export', 'w'); return; }
  var catLabel = catId ? catName(catId) : 'Uncategorized';
  var content = generateM3UContent(filtered);
  var safeName = catLabel.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g, '-').toLowerCase();
  var date = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  downloadM3UFile(content, 'streamvault-' + safeName + '-' + date + '.m3u');
  hideModal();
  toast('Exported ' + filtered.length + ' channels from "' + catLabel + '"', 's');
};

window.exportSelectedChannels = function() {
  var selectedIds = getSelectedChIds();
  if (!selectedIds.length) { toast('No channels selected in the Channels table', 'w'); return; }
  var filtered = S.chs.filter(function(ch) { return selectedIds.indexOf(ch.id) !== -1; });
  if (!filtered.length) { toast('No matching channels found', 'w'); return; }
  var content = generateM3UContent(filtered);
  var date = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  downloadM3UFile(content, 'streamvault-selected-' + date + '.m3u');
  toast('Exported ' + filtered.length + ' selected channels', 's');
};

/* ===== Firebase Listeners ===== */
function setupListeners() {
  var onErr = function(err) { handleDBError(err, 'Listener error'); };
  onValue(dbR('settings'), function(snap) {
    if (snap.exists()) {
      var d = snap.val(); S.settings = Object.assign({}, S.settings, d); applyTheme(S.settings.theme);
      var rc = document.getElementById('st-reg'); if (rc && document.activeElement !== rc) rc.checked = !!S.settings.adminRegistration;
      var ac = document.getElementById('st-ads'); if (ac && document.activeElement !== ac) ac.checked = !!S.settings.adsEnabled;
      var at = document.getElementById('st-adc'); if (at && document.activeElement !== at) at.value = S.settings.adsCode || '';
      if (S.settings.accentColor) { var ci = document.getElementById('st-color'); if (ci) ci.value = S.settings.accentColor; applyAccent(S.settings.accentColor); }
      updateThemeButtons(S.settings.theme);
    }
    S.dbConnected = true; updateDBStatusUI(true);
  }, onErr);
  onValue(dbR('categories'), function(snap) {
    S.cats = snap.exists() ? Object.entries(snap.val()).map(function(e) { return Object.assign({ id: e[0] }, e[1]); }).sort(function(a, b) { return (a.order || 0) - (b.order || 0); }) : [];
    renderCatTable(); updateGHCatSel(); renderStats(); updateUncatBadge();
  }, onErr);
  onValue(dbR('channels'), function(snap) {
    S.chs = snap.exists() ? Object.entries(snap.val()).map(function(e) { return Object.assign({ id: e[0] }, e[1]); }).sort(function(a, b) { return (a.order || 0) - (b.order || 0); }) : [];
    renderChTable(); renderStats(); renderRecent(); updateUncatBadge(); updateExportSelCard();
  }, onErr);
  onValue(dbR('githubUrls'), function(snap) {
    S.ghSources = snap.exists() ? snap.val() : {}; renderGHSources(); renderStats();
  }, onErr);
  onValue(dbR('pendingChannels'), function(snap) {
    S.pendingChs = snap.exists() ? Object.entries(snap.val()).map(function(e) {
      var ch = Object.assign({ id: e[0], _pendingId: e[0] }, e[1]);
      return ch;
    }) : [];
    renderPendingTable(); updatePendingBadge(); renderStats();
  }, onErr);
}

/* ===== Auth ===== */
function checkSession() { var s = localStorage.getItem('sv_adm'); if (s) { try { var d = JSON.parse(s); S.isAdmin = true; S.adminEmail = d.email; return true; } catch(e) { localStorage.removeItem('sv_adm'); } } return false; }
async function adminLogin(em, pw) {
  var h = await hashPwd(pw); var a = await dbG('admins');
  if (a === null || a === undefined) { toast('No admin accounts found. Create one first.', 'e'); return false; }
  var found = Object.values(a).find(function(x) { return x.email === em && x.password === h; });
  if (found) { S.isAdmin = true; S.adminEmail = em; localStorage.setItem('sv_adm', JSON.stringify({ email: em })); return true; }
  toast('Invalid email or password', 'e'); return false;
}
async function adminSignup(em, pw) {
  var st = null, a = null; try { st = await dbG('settings'); } catch(e) {} try { a = await dbG('admins'); } catch(e) {}
  var has = a && Object.keys(a).length > 0;
  if (!has || (st && st.adminRegistration)) {
    if (a && Object.values(a).find(function(x) { return x.email === em; })) { toast('Email already registered', 'e'); return false; }
    var h = await hashPwd(pw); var key = await dbP('admins', { email: em, password: h, createdAt: Date.now() });
    if (!key) return false; S.isAdmin = true; S.adminEmail = em; localStorage.setItem('sv_adm', JSON.stringify({ email: em })); toast('Account created successfully', 's'); return true;
  }
  toast('Registration is disabled by admin', 'e'); return false;
}
function adminLogout() { S.isAdmin = false; S.adminEmail = ''; localStorage.removeItem('sv_adm'); pipClose(); showView('login'); toast('Logged out', 'i'); }

document.getElementById('f-login').onsubmit = async function(e) {
  e.preventDefault(); var btn = document.getElementById('btn-login'); btn.disabled = true; btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Signing in...';
  try { var ok = await adminLogin(document.getElementById('l-email').value.trim(), document.getElementById('l-pwd').value); if (ok) { showView('admin'); renderAdmin(); toast('Welcome back', 's'); } }
  catch(err) { if (isPermError(err)) showPermWarning(); else toast('Login error: ' + (err.message||err), 'e'); }
  finally { btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-sign-in-alt"></i> Sign In'; }
};
document.getElementById('f-signup').onsubmit = async function(e) {
  e.preventDefault(); var em = document.getElementById('s-email').value.trim(), pw = document.getElementById('s-pwd').value, cf = document.getElementById('s-cfm').value;
  if (pw !== cf) { toast('Passwords do not match', 'e'); return; } if (pw.length < 6) { toast('Password must be at least 6 characters', 'e'); return; }
  var btn = document.getElementById('btn-signup'); btn.disabled = true; btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Creating...';
  try { var ok = await adminSignup(em, pw); if (ok) { showView('admin'); renderAdmin(); } }
  catch(err) { if (isPermError(err)) showPermWarning(); else toast('Signup error: ' + (err.message||err), 'e'); }
  finally { btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-user-plus"></i> Create Account'; }
};
document.getElementById('sh-signup').onclick = function() {
  document.getElementById('f-login').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('f-signup').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('l-sw1').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('l-sw2').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('l-sub').textContent = 'Create a new admin account';
};
document.getElementById('sh-login').onclick = function() {
  document.getElementById('f-login').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('f-signup').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('l-sw1').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('l-sw2').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('l-sub').textContent = 'Sign in to manage your LiveTV platform';
};
async function checkRegStatus() {
  try { var st = await dbG('settings'); var a = await dbG('admins'); var has = a && Object.keys(a).length > 0;
    if (!has) { document.getElementById('f-login').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('f-signup').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('l-sw1').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('l-sw2').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('l-sub').textContent = 'Create the first admin account'; }
    else if (!(st && st.adminRegistration)) { document.getElementById('sh-signup').style.display = 'none'; }
  } catch (err) {}
}
document.getElementById('a-logout').onclick = adminLogout;
document.getElementById('a-home').onclick = function() { window.open(getBaseUrl(), '_blank'); };

/* ===== Section Navigation ===== */
document.querySelectorAll('.s-link[data-s]').forEach(function(l) {
  l.onclick = function() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.s-link[data-s]').forEach(function(x) { x.classList.remove('active'); });
    l.classList.add('active'); document.querySelectorAll('.adm-sec').forEach(function(x) { x.classList.remove('active'); });
    document.getElementById('s-' + l.dataset.s).classList.add('active'); activeSection = l.dataset.s; clearAllSelections();
  };
});

function renderAdmin() {
  renderStats(); renderCatTable(); renderChTable(); renderGHSources(); renderPendingTable(); applyTheme(S.settings.theme);
  var rc = document.getElementById('st-reg'); if (rc) rc.checked = !!S.settings.adminRegistration;
  var ac = document.getElementById('st-ads'); if (ac) ac.checked = !!S.settings.adsEnabled;
  var at = document.getElementById('st-adc'); if (at) at.value = S.settings.adsCode || '';
  if (S.settings.accentColor) { var ci = document.getElementById('st-color'); if (ci) ci.value = S.settings.accentColor; }
  updateThemeButtons(S.settings.theme); updateUncatBadge(); updatePendingBadge(); updateExportSelCard();
}
function renderStats() {
  document.getElementById('stat-g').innerHTML =
    '<div class="stat-c"><div class="sn">' + S.chs.length + '</div><div class="sl">Channels</div></div>' +
    '<div class="stat-c"><div class="sn">' + S.cats.length + '</div><div class="sl">Categories</div></div>' +
    '<div class="stat-c"><div class="sn">' + S.chs.filter(function(c) { return c.image; }).length + '</div><div class="sl">With Logo</div></div>' +
    '<div class="stat-c"><div class="sn" style="color:#B7791F">' + S.pendingChs.length + '</div><div class="sl">Pending Review</div></div>';
}
function renderRecent() {
  var el = document.getElementById('rec-ch'); var r = S.chs.slice(-5).reverse();
  if (!r.length) { el.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">No channels yet.</p>'; return; }
  el.innerHTML = r.map(function(ch) {
    return '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)">' +
      (ch.image ? '<img src="'+esc(ch.image)+'" style="width:32px;height:20px;border-radius:3px;object-fit:cover" onerror="this.style.display=\'none\'">' : '') +
      '<div style="flex:1"><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600">'+esc(ch.name)+'</div><div style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted)">'+catName(ch.category)+'</div></div></div>';
  }).join('');
}
function updateUncatBadge() {
  var badge = document.getElementById('uncat-badge'); var numEl = document.getElementById('uncat-num'); if (!badge || !numEl) return;
  var uncat = S.chs.filter(function(c) { return !c.category; });
  if (uncat.length > 0) { badge.style.display = 'inline-flex'; numEl.textContent = uncat.length; } else { badge.style.display = 'none'; }
}
function updatePendingBadge() {
  var badge = document.getElementById('pending-badge'); var count = S.pendingChs.length;
  if (!badge) return;
  if (count > 0) { badge.style.display = 'flex'; badge.textContent = count > 99 ? '99+' : count; }
  else { badge.style.display = 'none'; }
  var pc = document.getElementById('pending-count'); if (pc) pc.textContent = count;
}
function updateExportSelCard() {
  var card = document.getElementById('export-sel-card');
  var countEl = document.getElementById('export-sel-count');
  if (!card || !countEl) return;
  var selCount = getSelectedChIds().length;
  if (selCount > 0) { card.style.display = 'flex'; countEl.textContent = selCount; }
  else { card.style.display = 'none'; }
}

/* ===== Settings ===== */
window.saveTheme = async function(t) { var btn = document.getElementById(t === 'light' ? 'st-l' : 'st-d'); if (btn) btn.disabled = true; var ok = await dbS('settings/theme', t); if (ok) toast('Theme updated', 's'); if (btn) btn.disabled = false; };
window.saveAccent = async function() { var c = document.getElementById('st-color').value; var ok = await dbS('settings/accentColor', c); if (ok) toast('Accent color updated', 's'); };
function setupSettingsEventListeners() {
  var rc = document.getElementById('st-reg');
  if (rc) rc.addEventListener('change', async function(e) { e.preventDefault(); var nv = this.checked; var ok = await dbS('settings/adminRegistration', nv); if (ok) { toast('Registration ' + (nv ? 'enabled' : 'disabled'), 's'); this.checked = nv; } else { this.checked = !nv; } });
  var ac = document.getElementById('st-ads');
  if (ac) ac.addEventListener('change', async function(e) { e.preventDefault(); var nv = this.checked; var ok = await dbS('settings/adsEnabled', nv); if (ok) { toast('Ads ' + (nv ? 'enabled' : 'disabled'), 's'); this.checked = nv; } else { this.checked = !nv; } });
}
window.saveAdsCode = async function() { var code = document.getElementById('st-adc').value; var ok = await dbS('settings/adsCode', code); if (ok) toast('Ad code saved', 's'); };

/* ===== Selection / Bulk System ===== */
function getSelectedCatIds() { return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.cat-cb:checked')).map(function(c) { return c.dataset.id; }); }
function getSelectedChIds() { return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.ch-cb:checked')).map(function(c) { return c.dataset.id; }); }
function getSelectedPendIds() { return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.pend-cb:checked')).map(function(c) { return c.dataset.pid; }); }
function updateCatSelState() {
  var cbs = document.querySelectorAll('.cat-cb'); var allCb = document.getElementById('sel-all-cat');
  var info = document.getElementById('cat-sel-info'); var count = document.getElementById('cat-sel-count');
  if (!allCb || !cbs.length) return;
  var checked = Array.from(cbs).filter(function(c) { return c.checked; }).length;
  allCb.checked = checked === cbs.length; allCb.indeterminate = checked > 0 && checked < cbs.length;
  cbs.forEach(function(cb) { var row = cb.closest('tr'); if (row) { if (cb.checked) row.classList.add('row-selected'); else row.classList.remove('row-selected'); } });
  if (info && count) { if (checked > 0) { info.classList.add('show'); count.textContent = checked; } else { info.classList.remove('show'); } }
  updateBulkBar();
}
function updateChSelState() {
  var cbs = document.querySelectorAll('.ch-cb'); var allCb = document.getElementById('sel-all-ch');
  var info = document.getElementById('ch-sel-info'); var count = document.getElementById('ch-sel-count');
  if (!allCb || !cbs.length) return;
  var checked = Array.from(cbs).filter(function(c) { return c.checked; }).length;
  allCb.checked = checked === cbs.length; allCb.indeterminate = checked > 0 && checked < cbs.length;
  cbs.forEach(function(cb) { var row = cb.closest('tr'); if (row) { if (cb.checked) row.classList.add('row-selected'); else row.classList.remove('row-selected'); } });
  if (info && count) { if (checked > 0) { info.classList.add('show'); count.textContent = checked; } else { info.classList.remove('show'); } }
  updateBulkBar(); updateExportSelCard();
}
function updatePendSelState() {
  var cbs = document.querySelectorAll('.pend-cb'); var allCb = document.getElementById('sel-all-pend');
  var info = document.getElementById('pend-sel-info'); var count = document.getElementById('pend-sel-count');
  if (!allCb || !cbs.length) return;
  var checked = Array.from(cbs).filter(function(c) { return c.checked; }).length;
  allCb.checked = checked === cbs.length; allCb.indeterminate = checked > 0 && checked < cbs.length;
  cbs.forEach(function(cb) { var row = cb.closest('tr'); if (row) { if (cb.checked) row.classList.add('row-selected'); else row.classList.remove('row-selected'); } });
  if (info && count) { if (checked > 0) { info.classList.add('show'); count.textContent = checked; } else { info.classList.remove('show'); } }
  updateBulkBar();
}
function updateBulkBar() {
  var bar = document.getElementById('bulk-bar'); var text = document.getElementById('bb-text');
  var delBtn = document.getElementById('bb-del-btn'); var catBtn = document.getElementById('bb-cat-btn');
  var approveBtn = document.getElementById('bb-approve-btn'); var rejectBtn = document.getElementById('bb-reject-btn');
  var sec = getActiveSection(); var catIds = getSelectedCatIds(); var chIds = getSelectedChIds(); var pendIds = getSelectedPendIds();
  var count = 0, label = '';
  delBtn.style.display = 'none'; catBtn.style.display = 'none'; approveBtn.style.display = 'none'; rejectBtn.style.display = 'none';
  if (sec === 'categories' && catIds.length > 0) {
    count = catIds.length; label = count + (count === 1 ? ' category' : ' categories');
    var childCount = S.chs.filter(function(ch) { return catIds.indexOf(ch.category) !== -1; }).length;
    if (childCount > 0) label += ' + ' + childCount + ' channel' + (childCount === 1 ? '' : 's');
    delBtn.style.display = 'inline-flex';
  } else if (sec === 'channels' && chIds.length > 0) {
    count = chIds.length; label = count + (count === 1 ? ' channel' : ' channels');
    catBtn.style.display = 'inline-flex'; delBtn.style.display = 'inline-flex';
  } else if (sec === 'approval' && pendIds.length > 0) {
    count = pendIds.length; label = count + (count === 1 ? ' channel' : ' channels') + ' pending';
    approveBtn.style.display = 'inline-flex'; rejectBtn.style.display = 'inline-flex';
  }
  if (count > 0) { bar.style.display = 'flex'; text.textContent = label; }
  else { bar.style.display = 'none'; }
}
window.toggleAllCats = function(checked) { document.querySelectorAll('.cat-cb').forEach(function(cb) { cb.checked = checked; }); updateCatSelState(); };
window.toggleAllChs = function(checked) { document.querySelectorAll('.ch-cb').forEach(function(cb) { cb.checked = checked; }); updateChSelState(); };
window.toggleAllPend = function(checked) { document.querySelectorAll('.pend-cb').forEach(function(cb) { cb.checked = checked; }); updatePendSelState(); };
window.clearAllSelections = function() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.cat-cb, .ch-cb, .pend-cb').forEach(function(cb) { cb.checked = false; });
  ['sel-all-cat','sel-all-ch','sel-all-pend'].forEach(function(id) { var el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) { el.checked = false; el.indeterminate = false; } });
  document.querySelectorAll('.row-selected').forEach(function(r) { r.classList.remove('row-selected'); });
  document.querySelectorAll('.pending-row-playing').forEach(function(r) { r.classList.remove('pending-row-playing'); });
  ['cat-sel-info','ch-sel-info','pend-sel-info'].forEach(function(id) { var el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.classList.remove('show'); });
  document.getElementById('bulk-bar').style.display = 'none';
  updateExportSelCard();
};

window.bulkDelete = async function() {
  var sec = getActiveSection();
  if (sec === 'categories') {
    var catIds = getSelectedCatIds(); if (!catIds.length) return;
    var childCount = S.chs.filter(function(ch) { return catIds.indexOf(ch.category) !== -1; }).length;
    var msg = 'Delete ' + catIds.length + ' categor' + (catIds.length === 1 ? 'y' : 'ies') + '?';
    if (childCount > 0) msg += '\n\nThis will ALSO delete all ' + childCount + ' channel' + (childCount === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' inside them.';
    if (!confirm(msg)) return;
    var chDel = S.chs.filter(function(ch) { return catIds.indexOf(ch.category) !== -1; }).map(function(ch) { return ch.id; });
    for (var i = 0; i < chDel.length; i++) { await dbX('channels/' + chDel[i]); }
    for (var i = 0; i < catIds.length; i++) { await dbX('categories/' + catIds[i]); }
    clearAllSelections(); toast('Deleted ' + catIds.length + ' categories and ' + chDel.length + ' channels', 's');
  } else if (sec === 'channels') {
    var chIds = getSelectedChIds(); if (!chIds.length) return;
    if (!confirm('Delete ' + chIds.length + ' channel' + (chIds.length === 1 ? '' : 's') + '?')) return;
    for (var i = 0; i < chIds.length; i++) { await dbX('channels/' + chIds[i]); }
    clearAllSelections(); toast('Deleted ' + chIds.length + ' channels', 's');
  }
};

function buildChPreviewHtml(channels, maxShow) {
  if (!maxShow) maxShow = 10; var html = ''; var show = channels.slice(0, maxShow);
  for (var i = 0; i < show.length; i++) {
    var ch = show[i];
    var imgHtml = ch.image ? '<img src="'+esc(ch.image)+'" onerror="this.style.display=\'none\'">' : '<div class="mch-letter">'+esc(ch.name.charAt(0))+'</div>';
    var catLabel = ch.category ? catName(ch.category) : (ch.targetCategory ? catName(ch.targetCategory) : '<span style="color:#B7791F">Uncategorized</span>');
    html += '<div class="modal-ch-item">' + imgHtml + '<div class="mch-name">'+esc(ch.name)+'</div><div class="mch-cat">'+catLabel+'</div></div>';
  }
  if (channels.length > maxShow) html += '<div class="modal-more">...and ' + (channels.length - maxShow) + ' more</div>';
  return html;
}

window.showBulkCatModal = function() { var chIds = getSelectedChIds(); if (!chIds.length) { toast('No channels selected', 'e'); return; } showMoveToCategoryModal(chIds); };

window.showMoveUncategorizedModal = function() {
  var uncatChs = S.chs.filter(function(c) { return !c.category; });
  if (!uncatChs.length) return; if (!S.cats.length) { toast('No categories exist yet.', 'w'); return; }
  var co = ''; S.cats.forEach(function(c) { co += '<option value="'+c.id+'">'+esc(c.name)+'</option>'; });
  showModal(
    '<h3 class="modal-t"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle" style="color:#B7791F;margin-right:6px"></i>Move Uncategorized</h3>' +
    '<p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:14px">Move <strong style="color:var(--fg)">' + uncatChs.length + '</strong> uncategorized channel' + (uncatChs.length === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' to:</p>' +
    '<div class="modal-ch-preview">' + buildChPreviewHtml(uncatChs, 8) + '</div>' +
    '<div class="fg"><label class="lbl">Select Category</label><select class="inp" id="m-bcat" style="font-size:13px;padding:10px 12px;font-weight:600">' + co + '</select></div>' +
    '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:18px">' +
    '<button class="btn btn-o btn-sm" onclick="hideModal()">Cancel</button>' +
    '<button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" id="btn-move-uncat" onclick="executeMoveUncategorized()"><i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i> Move All</button></div>'
  );
};
window.executeMoveUncategorized = async function() {
  var catId = document.getElementById('m-bcat').value; if (!catId) { toast('Select a category', 'e'); return; }
  var catLabel = catName(catId); var uncatChs = S.chs.filter(function(c) { return !c.category; });
  if (!uncatChs.length) { hideModal(); return; }
  var uncatIds = uncatChs.map(function(c) { return c.id; });
  var moveBtn = document.getElementById('btn-move-uncat');
  if (moveBtn) { moveBtn.disabled = true; moveBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Moving...'; }
  var ok = 0; for (var i = 0; i < uncatIds.length; i++) { if (await dbU('channels/' + uncatIds[i], { category: catId })) ok++; }
  hideModal(); toast('Moved ' + ok + ' channel' + (ok === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' to "' + catLabel + '"', 's');
};

/* ===== Category CRUD ===== */
window.showAddCatModal = function() {
  showModal(
    '<h3 class="modal-t">Add Category</h3>' +

    '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:16px">' +
    '<button class="btn btn-o btn-sm" onclick="hideModal()">Cancel</button>' +
    '<button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" onclick="addCat()"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Add</button></div>'
  );
  setTimeout(function() { var el = document.getElementById('m-cn'); if (el) el.focus(); }, 100);
};
window.addCat = async function() {
  var n = document.getElementById('m-cn'); if (!n || !n.value.trim()) { toast('Enter a name', 'e'); return; }
  var key = await dbP('categories', { name: n.value.trim(), order: S.cats.length });
  if (key) { hideModal(); toast('Category added', 's'); } else { toast('Failed to add category', 'e'); }
};
window.deleteCat = async function(id) {
  var cat = S.cats.find(function(c) { return c.id === id; });
  var childCount = S.chs.filter(function(ch) { return ch.category === id; }).length;
  var msg = 'Delete category "' + (cat ? cat.name : '') + '"?';
  if (childCount > 0) msg += '\n\nWARNING: This will also permanently delete all ' + childCount + ' channel' + (childCount === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' inside this category.';
  if (!confirm(msg)) return;
  var chIds = S.chs.filter(function(ch) { return ch.category === id; }).map(function(ch) { return ch.id; });
  for (var i = 0; i < chIds.length; i++) { await dbX('channels/' + chIds[i]); }
  var ok = await dbX('categories/' + id); if (ok) toast('Deleted category and ' + chIds.length + ' channels', 's');
};
window.moveCat = function(id, dir) {
  var idx = S.cats.findIndex(function(c) { return c.id === id; }); if (idx === -1) return;
  var ni = idx + dir; if (ni < 0 || ni >= S.cats.length) return;
  var o1 = S.cats[idx].order !== undefined ? S.cats[idx].order : idx;
  var o2 = S.cats[ni].order !== undefined ? S.cats[ni].order : ni;
  dbU('categories/' + S.cats[idx].id, { order: o2 }); dbU('categories/' + S.cats[ni].id, { order: o1 });
};

/* ===== Edit Category Modal ===== */
window.editCat = function(id) {
  var cat = S.cats.find(function(c) { return c.id === id; }); if (!cat) return;
  var chs = S.chs.filter(function(c) { return c.category === id; });
  var otherCats = S.cats.filter(function(c) { return c.id !== id; });
  var chListHtml = '';
  if (chs.length) {
    chListHtml = '<div class="cat-ch-list">' + chs.map(function(ch) {
      var imgHtml = ch.image ? '<img src="'+esc(ch.image)+'" onerror="this.style.display=\'none\'">' : '<div style="width:44px;height:26px;background:var(--bg2);border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);flex-shrink:0">'+esc(ch.name.charAt(0))+'</div>';
      return '<div class="cat-ch-item" data-chid="'+ch.id+'">' +
        '<input type="checkbox" class="cb cat-ch-move-cb" data-chid="'+ch.id+'" style="margin-right:2px" onchange="updateCatMoveState()">' +
        imgHtml + '<div class="cc-name">'+esc(ch.name)+'</div>' +
        '<button class="btn-i" style="width:26px;height:26px;font-size:10px;color:var(--success);flex-shrink:0" onclick="pipPlayChannel(\''+ch.id+'\')" title="Play"><i class="fas fa-play"></i></button>' +
        '<button class="btn-i" style="width:26px;height:26px;font-size:10px;color:var(--danger);flex-shrink:0" onclick="deleteChFromCat(\''+ch.id+'\')" title="Delete"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button></div>';
    }).join('') + '</div>';
  } else { chListHtml = '<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;margin-top:12px">No channels in this category.</p>'; }
  var moveHtml = '';
  if (chs.length > 0 && otherCats.length > 0) {
    var otherOpts = ''; otherCats.forEach(function(c) { otherOpts += '<option value="'+c.id+'">'+esc(c.name)+'</option>'; });
    moveHtml = '<div class="move-section-modal" id="move-section">' +
      '<div class="move-label"><i class="fas fa-exchange-alt" style="color:var(--accent);margin-right:4px"></i>Move Selected Channels to Another Category</div>' +
      '<div class="move-row"><input type="checkbox" class="cb" id="cat-move-all" onchange="toggleAllCatMoveChs(this.checked)" style="margin-right:4px"><select class="inp" id="cat-move-target" style="flex:1"><option value="">Select target category...</option>' + otherOpts + '</select>' +
      '<button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" onclick="executeCatMove(\''+id+'\')" id="btn-cat-move" disabled><i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i> Move</button></div></div>';
  }
  var uploadHtml = '<div class="upload-section-modal">' +
    '<h4><i class="fas fa-cloud-upload-alt" style="color:var(--accent)"></i> Upload Channel List for Review</h4>' +
    '<p style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:10px">Upload a .m3u8 file. Channels will go to the <strong>Approval Queue</strong> where you can test them live before publishing.</p>' +
    '<div class="upload-z-sm" id="cat-upload-z" onclick="document.getElementById(\'cat-m3f\').click()">' +
    '<i class="fas fa-file-upload"></i><p>Click to select .m3u8 file</p></div>' +
    '<input type="file" id="cat-m3f" accept=".m3u,.m3u8" style="display:none">' +
    '<div id="cat-upload-prog" style="display:none;margin-top:8px"><div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px" id="cat-upload-st">Parsing...</div><div style="height:3px;background:var(--bg2);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden"><div id="cat-upload-bar" style="height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px;width:0%;transition:width .3s"></div></div></div></div>';

  showModal(
    '<h3 class="modal-t">Edit Category: ' + esc(cat.name) + '</h3>' +
    '<div class="fg"><label class="lbl">Name</label><input type="text" class="inp" id="m-ecn" value="'+esc(cat.name)+'"></div>' +
    '<h4 style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;margin-top:4px">Channels (' + chs.length + ')</h4>' + chListHtml + moveHtml + uploadHtml +
    '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:18px">' +
    '<button class="btn btn-o btn-sm" onclick="hideModal()">Cancel</button>' +
    '<button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" onclick="saveCatEd(\''+id+'\')"><i class="fas fa-save"></i> Save Name</button></div>'
  );
  setTimeout(function() {
    var el = document.getElementById('m-ecn'); if (el) el.focus();
    var fileInput = document.getElementById('cat-m3f');
    if (fileInput) { fileInput.onchange = function() { handleCatUpload(this, id); }; }
    var upZone = document.getElementById('cat-upload-z');
    if (upZone) {
      upZone.addEventListener('dragover', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); this.style.borderColor = 'var(--accent)'; this.style.background = 'var(--accent-l)'; });
      upZone.addEventListener('dragleave', function() { this.style.borderColor = ''; this.style.background = ''; });
      upZone.addEventListener('drop', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault(); this.style.borderColor = ''; this.style.background = '';
        var f = e.dataTransfer.files[0];
        if (f && (f.name.endsWith('.m3u') || f.name.endsWith('.m3u8'))) { handleCatUpload({ files: [f], value: '' }, id); }
        else { toast('Please drop a .m3u or .m3u8 file', 'e'); }
      });
    }
  }, 100);
};

window.toggleAllCatMoveChs = function(checked) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.cat-ch-move-cb').forEach(function(cb) { cb.checked = checked; });
  updateCatMoveState();
};
window.updateCatMoveState = function() {
  var cbs = document.querySelectorAll('.cat-ch-move-cb');
  var allCb = document.getElementById('cat-move-all');
  var btn = document.getElementById('btn-cat-move');
  var sel = document.getElementById('cat-move-target');
  var checked = Array.from(cbs).filter(function(c) { return c.checked; }).length;
  if (allCb) { allCb.checked = checked === cbs.length; allCb.indeterminate = checked > 0 && checked < cbs.length; }
  if (btn) btn.disabled = !(checked > 0 && sel && sel.value);
  if (sel) sel.onchange = function() { if (btn) btn.disabled = !(checked > 0 && this.value); };
};

window.executeCatMove = async function(fromCatId) {
  var targetId = document.getElementById('cat-move-target').value;
  if (!targetId) { toast('Select a target category', 'e'); return; }
  var selectedChIds = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.cat-ch-move-cb:checked')).map(function(cb) { return cb.dataset.chid; });
  if (!selectedChIds.length) { toast('Select channels to move', 'e'); return; }
  var targetLabel = catName(targetId);
  var btn = document.getElementById('btn-cat-move');
  if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i>'; }
  var ok = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < selectedChIds.length; i++) {
    if (await dbU('channels/' + selectedChIds[i], { category: targetId })) ok++;
  }
  toast('Moved ' + ok + ' channel' + (ok === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' to "' + targetLabel + '"', 's');
  hideModal();
};

async function handleCatUpload(input, catId) {
  var file = input.files ? input.files[0] : null; if (!file) return;
  if (input.value !== undefined) input.value = '';
  var prog = document.getElementById('cat-upload-prog');
  var bar = document.getElementById('cat-upload-bar');
  var st = document.getElementById('cat-upload-st');
  if (prog) prog.style.display = 'block';
  if (bar) bar.style.width = '20%';
  if (st) st.textContent = 'Reading file...';
  try {
    var text = await file.text();
    if (bar) bar.style.width = '50%';
    if (st) st.textContent = 'Parsing...';
    var parsed = parseM3U8(text);
    if (bar) bar.style.width = '70%';
    if (!parsed.length) { toast('No valid channels found in file', 'e'); if (prog) prog.style.display = 'none'; return; }
    if (st) st.textContent = 'Sending ' + parsed.length + ' channels to Approval Queue...';
    if (bar) bar.style.width = '85%';
    var added = 0;
    for (var i = 0; i < parsed.length; i++) {
      var ch = parsed[i];
      var entry = { name: ch.name, url: ch.url, image: ch.image || '', targetCategory: catId, status: 'pending', uploadedAt: Date.now() };
      var key = await dbP('pendingChannels', entry);
      if (key) added++;
    }
    if (bar) bar.style.width = '100%';
    if (st) st.textContent = 'Done! ' + added + ' channels added to Approval Queue.';
    toast(added + ' channels uploaded for review', 's');
    setTimeout(function() { if (prog) prog.style.display = 'none'; }, 3000);
  } catch (e) { toast('Upload error: ' + e.message, 'e'); if (prog) prog.style.display = 'none'; }
}

window.saveCatEd = async function(id) {
  var n = document.getElementById('m-ecn'); if (!n || !n.value.trim()) { toast('Name is required', 'e'); return; }
  var ok = await dbU('categories/' + id, { name: n.value.trim() }); if (ok) { hideModal(); toast('Updated', 's'); }
};

  if (!S.cats.length) { tbl.style.display = 'none'; emp.style.display = 'block'; return; }
  tbl.style.display = 'table'; emp.style.display = 'none';

    var pendCnt = S.pendingChs.filter(function(p) { return p.targetCategory === c.id; }).length;

    return '<tr data-id="'+c.id+'">' +
      '<td class="cb-col"><input type="checkbox" class="cb cat-cb" data-id="'+c.id+'" onchange="updateCatSelState()"></td>' +

      '<td style="font-weight:600">'+esc(c.name)+pendBadge+'</td><td>'+cnt+'</td><td>'+(c.order !== undefined ? c.order : i)+'</td>' +
      '<td><div class="act-b">' +
      '<button class="btn-i" style="width:26px;height:26px;font-size:9px" onclick="moveCat(\''+c.id+'\',-1)" title="Up"><i class="fas fa-arrow-up"></i></button>' +
      '<button class="btn-i" style="width:26px;height:26px;font-size:9px" onclick="moveCat(\''+c.id+'\',1)" title="Down"><i class="fas fa-arrow-down"></i></button>' +
      '<button class="btn-i" style="width:26px;height:26px;font-size:10px" onclick="editCat(\''+c.id+'\')" title="Edit"><i class="fas fa-pen"></i></button>' +
      '<button class="btn-i" style="width:26px;height:26px;font-size:10px;color:var(--danger)" onclick="deleteCat(\''+c.id+'\')" title="Delete"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>' +
      '</div></td></tr>';
  }).join('');
  var sac = document.getElementById('sel-all-cat'); if (sac) { sac.checked = false; sac.indeterminate = false; }
  var ci = document.getElementById('cat-sel-info'); if (ci) ci.classList.remove('show');
}

    '<div class="fg"><label class="lbl">Logo URL</label><input type="url" class="inp" id="m-chi" value="'+(ie ? esc(pf.image||'') : '')+'" placeholder="https://.../logo.png"></div>' +

  );

window.deleteCh = async function(id) { if (!confirm('Delete this channel?')) return; var ok = await dbX('channels/' + id); if (ok) toast('Deleted', 's'); };
window.moveCh = function(id, dir) {

  var ni = idx + dir; if (ni < 0 || ni >= f.length) return;
  var o1 = f[idx].order !== undefined ? f[idx].order : idx; var o2 = f[ni].order !== undefined ? f[ni].order : ni;
  dbU('channels/' + f[idx].id, { order: o2 }); dbU('channels/' + f[ni].id, { order: o1 });
};

'<img class="cth" src="'+esc(ch.image)+'" onerror="this.style.display=\'none\'">' : '<div style="width:50px;height:30px;background:var(--bg2);border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted)">'+esc(ch.name.charAt(0))+'</div>';

window.copyChUrl = function(chId) {
  var url = getChannelShareUrl(chId);
  if (navigator.clipboard) { navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(function() { toast('Share link copied!', 's'); }).catch(function() { toast('Failed to copy', 'e'); }); }
  else { var ta = document.createElement('textarea'); ta.value = url; document.body.appendChild(ta); ta.select(); document.execCommand('copy'); document.body.removeChild(ta); toast('Share link copied!', 's'); }
};
