function renderPendingTable() {
  var tb = document.getElementById('pend-tb'), emp = document.getElementById('pend-emp'), tbl = document.getElementById('pend-tbl');
  var pc = document.getElementById('pending-count');
  if (!S.pendingChs.length) { tbl.style.display = 'none'; emp.style.display = 'block'; if (pc) pc.textContent = '0'; return; }
  tbl.style.display = 'table'; emp.style.display = 'none';
  if (pc) pc.textContent = S.pendingChs.length;
  tb.innerHTML = S.pendingChs.map(function(ch) {
    var su = ch.url.length > 30 ? ch.url.substring(0, 30) + '...' : ch.url;
    var imgHtml = ch.image ? '<img class="cth" src="'+esc(ch.image)+'" onerror="this.style.display=\'none\'">' : '<div style="width:50px;height:30px;background:var(--bg2);border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted)">'+esc(ch.name.charAt(0))+'</div>';
    var catLabel = ch.targetCategory ? catName(ch.targetCategory) : '<span style="color:#B7791F">None</span>';
    var isPlaying = pipState.currentChObj && pipState.currentChObj._pendingId === ch._pendingId;
    var statusHtml = '<span class="pending-status pending-waiting"><i class="fas fa-clock" style="font-size:7px"></i> Waiting</span>';
    if (isPlaying) statusHtml = '<span class="pending-status pending-playing"><i class="fas fa-play" style="font-size:7px"></i> Testing</span>';
    return '<tr data-pid="'+ch._pendingId+'"'+(isPlaying ? ' class="pending-row-playing"' : '')+'>' +
      '<td class="cb-col"><input type="checkbox" class="cb pend-cb" data-pid="'+ch._pendingId+'" onchange="updatePendSelState()"></td>' +
      '<td>'+imgHtml+'</td>' +
      '<td><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px"><span style="font-weight:600">'+esc(ch.name)+'</span>'+statusHtml+'</div></td>' +
      '<td><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--fg2)">'+catLabel+'</span></td>' +
      '<td><span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);word-break:break-all" title="'+esc(ch.url)+'">'+esc(su)+'</span></td>' +
      '<td style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);white-space:nowrap">'+timeAgo(ch.uploadedAt)+'</td>' +
      '<td><div class="act-b">' +
      '<button class="btn-i" style="width:28px;height:28px;font-size:10px;color:var(--success);'+(isPlaying?'background:var(--accent-l);border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent)':'')+'" onclick="pipPlayPending(\''+ch._pendingId+'\')" title="Play / Test"><i class="fas fa-play"></i></button>' +
      '<button class="btn-i" style="width:28px;height:28px;font-size:10px;color:var(--success)" onclick="approvePending(\''+ch._pendingId+'\')" title="Approve & Publish"><i class="fas fa-check"></i></button>' +
      '<button class="btn-i" style="width:28px;height:28px;font-size:10px;color:var(--danger)" onclick="rejectPending(\''+ch._pendingId+'\')" title="Reject & Delete"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button>' +
      '</div></td></tr>';
  }).join('');
  var sap = document.getElementById('sel-all-pend'); if (sap) { sap.checked = false; sap.indeterminate = false; }
  var psi = document.getElementById('pend-sel-info'); if (psi) psi.classList.remove('show');
}

/* Play a pending channel in PIP */
window.pipPlayPending = function(pendingId) {
  var ch = S.pendingChs.find(function(c) { return c._pendingId === pendingId; });
  if (ch) pipPlayChannel(ch);
};

/* Approve single pending -> move to live channels */
window.approvePending = async function(pendingId) {
  var ch = S.pendingChs.find(function(c) { return c._pendingId === pendingId; });
  if (!ch) { toast('Channel not found', 'e'); return; }
  var catId = ch.targetCategory || '';
  var catLabel = catId ? catName(catId) : 'Uncategorized';
  var entry = { name: ch.name, url: ch.url, image: ch.image || '', category: catId, order: S.chs.length };
  var key = await dbP('channels', entry);
  if (key) {
    var delOk = await dbX('pendingChannels/' + pendingId);
    if (delOk) {
      toast('Approved "' + ch.name + '" -> ' + catLabel, 's');
    } else {
      console.error('Approved but failed to delete pending:', pendingId);
      toast('Approved "' + ch.name + '" but cleanup may be delayed', 'w');
    }
  } else {
    toast('Failed to approve', 'e');
  }
};

/* Reject single pending -> delete from Firebase
   This is the FIX: uses the pendingId directly with dbX()
   to remove from pendingChannels/{pendingId} path */
window.rejectPending = async function(pendingId) {
  var ch = S.pendingChs.find(function(c) { return c._pendingId === pendingId; });
  if (!ch) return;
  if (!confirm('Reject and delete "' + ch.name + '"? This cannot be undone.')) return;

  var deletePath = 'pendingChannels/' + pendingId;
  console.log('Attempting to reject/delete pending channel:', ch.name, 'path:', deletePath, 'key:', pendingId);

  var ok = await dbX(deletePath);
  if (ok) {
    toast('Rejected and deleted "' + ch.name + '"', 'i');
  } else {
    console.error('dbX returned false for path:', deletePath);
    toast('Failed to delete. Check console for details.', 'e');
  }
};

/* Bulk approve selected pending */
window.bulkApprove = async function() {
  var pendIds = getSelectedPendIds();
  if (!pendIds.length) return;
  if (!confirm('Approve and publish ' + pendIds.length + ' channel' + (pendIds.length === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' to homepage?')) return;
  var ok = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < pendIds.length; i++) {
    var ch = S.pendingChs.find(function(c) { return c._pendingId === pendIds[i]; });
    if (!ch) continue;
    var entry = { name: ch.name, url: ch.url, image: ch.image || '', category: ch.targetCategory || '', order: S.chs.length + ok };
    var key = await dbP('channels', entry);
    if (key) {
      var delOk = await dbX('pendingChannels/' + pendIds[i]);
      if (delOk) ok++;
      else console.error('Bulk approve: failed to delete pending after publish:', pendIds[i]);
    }
  }
  clearAllSelections();
  toast('Approved and published ' + ok + ' channel' + (ok === 1 ? '' : 's'), 's');
};

/* Bulk reject selected pending
   FIX: Each deletion uses the pendingId directly */
window.bulkReject = async function() {
  var pendIds = getSelectedPendIds();
  if (!pendIds.length) return;
  if (!confirm('Reject and delete ' + pendIds.length + ' channel' + (pendIds.length === 1 ? '' : 's') + '? This cannot be undone.')) return;
  var ok = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < pendIds.length; i++) {
    var pid = pendIds[i];
    var ch = S.pendingChs.find(function(c) { return c._pendingId === pid; });
    var chName = ch ? ch.name : pid;
    console.log('Bulk reject: deleting', chName, 'at pendingChannels/' + pid);
    var success = await dbX('pendingChannels/' + pid);
    if (success) { ok++; }
    else { console.error('Bulk reject: FAILED to delete', chName, 'at pendingChannels/' + pid); }
  }
  clearAllSelections();
  toast('Rejected and deleted ' + ok + ' channel' + (ok === 1 ? '' : 's'), 'i');
};

/* ===== Upload for Review Modal (from Approval Queue page) ===== */
window.showUploadForReviewModal = function() {
  if (!S.cats.length) { toast('Create at least one category first', 'w'); return; }
  var co = '<option value="">Uncategorized</option>';
  S.cats.forEach(function(c) { co += '<option value="'+c.id+'">'+esc(c.name)+'</option>'; });
  showModal(
    '<h3 class="modal-t"><i class="fas fa-cloud-upload-alt" style="color:var(--accent);margin-right:6px"></i>Upload Channel List for Review</h3>' +
    '<p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:14px">Channels will be uploaded to the <strong style="color:var(--fg)">Approval Queue</strong> — not published to homepage until you approve them.</p>' +
    '<div class="fg"><label class="lbl">Target Category</label><select class="inp" id="m-rev-cat">'+co+'</select></div>' +
    '<div class="upload-z" id="rev-upload-z" onclick="document.getElementById(\'rev-m3f\').click()">' +
    '<i class="fas fa-file-upload"></i><p style="font-size:12px">Click to select .m3u8 file</p>' +
    '<small style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)">All channels will go to Approval Queue for testing</small></div>' +
    '<input type="file" id="rev-m3f" accept=".m3u,.m3u8" style="display:none">' +
    '<div id="rev-upload-prog" style="display:none;margin-top:12px"><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:5px" id="rev-upload-st">Parsing...</div><div style="height:4px;background:var(--bg2);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden"><div id="rev-upload-bar" style="height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px;width:0%;transition:width .3s"></div></div></div>' +
    '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:18px">' +
    '<button class="btn btn-o btn-sm" onclick="hideModal()">Cancel</button></div>'
  );
  setTimeout(function() {
    var fileInput = document.getElementById('rev-m3f');
    if (fileInput) { fileInput.onchange = function() { handleReviewUpload(this); }; }
    var upZone = document.getElementById('rev-upload-z');
    if (upZone) {
      upZone.addEventListener('dragover', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); this.style.borderColor = 'var(--accent)'; this.style.background = 'var(--accent-l)'; });
      upZone.addEventListener('dragleave', function() { this.style.borderColor = ''; this.style.background = ''; });
      upZone.addEventListener('drop', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault(); this.style.borderColor = ''; this.style.background = '';
        var f = e.dataTransfer.files[0];
        if (f && (f.name.endsWith('.m3u') || f.name.endsWith('.m3u8'))) { handleReviewUpload({ files: [f], value: '' }); }
        else { toast('Please drop a .m3u or .m3u8 file', 'e'); }
      });
    }
  }, 100);
};

async function handleReviewUpload(input) {
  var file = input.files ? input.files[0] : null; if (!file) return;
  if (input.value !== undefined) input.value = '';
  var prog = document.getElementById('rev-upload-prog');
  var bar = document.getElementById('rev-upload-bar');
  var st = document.getElementById('rev-upload-st');
  var catSel = document.getElementById('m-rev-cat');
  if (prog) prog.style.display = 'block';
  if (bar) bar.style.width = '20%';
  if (st) st.textContent = 'Reading file...';
  try {
    var text = await file.text();
    if (bar) bar.style.width = '50%';
    if (st) st.textContent = 'Parsing...';
    var parsed = parseM3U8(text);
    if (bar) bar.style.width = '70%';
    if (!parsed.length) { toast('No valid channels found in file', 'e'); if (prog) prog.style.display = 'none'; return; }
    var catId = catSel ? catSel.value : '';
    if (st) st.textContent = 'Sending ' + parsed.length + ' channels to Approval Queue...';
    if (bar) bar.style.width = '85%';
    var added = 0;
    for (var i = 0; i < parsed.length; i++) {
      var ch = parsed[i];
      var entry = { name: ch.name, url: ch.url, image: ch.image || '', targetCategory: catId, status: 'pending', uploadedAt: Date.now() };
      var key = await dbP('pendingChannels', entry);
      if (key) added++;
    }
    if (bar) bar.style.width = '100%';
    if (st) st.textContent = 'Done! ' + added + ' channels added to Approval Queue.';
    toast(added + ' channels uploaded for review', 's');
    setTimeout(function() { if (prog) prog.style.display = 'none'; }, 3000);
  } catch (e) { toast('Upload error: ' + e.message, 'e'); if (prog) prog.style.display = 'none'; }
}

/* ===== M3U8 Parser ===== */
function parseM3U8(content) {
  var lines = content.split('\n'), channels = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    var line = lines[i].trim();
    if (line.indexOf('#EXTINF') === 0) {
      var name = '', logo = '', group = '';
      var lm = line.match(/tvg-logo="([^"]*)"/); if (lm) logo = lm[1];
      var gm = line.match(/group-title="([^"]*)"/); if (gm) group = gm[1];
      var ci = line.lastIndexOf(','); if (ci !== -1) name = line.substring(ci + 1).trim();
      var url = '';
      for (var j = i + 1; j < lines.length; j++) { var nl = lines[j].trim(); if (nl && nl.indexOf('#') !== 0) { url = nl; break; } }
      if (name && url) channels.push({ name: name, url: url, image: logo, category: group });
    }
  }
  return channels;
}

/* ===== Smart Import Functions ===== */
function buildExistingUrlMap() {
  var map = {};
  for (var i = 0; i < S.chs.length; i++) {
    var ch = S.chs[i]; if (ch.url) { var h = urlHash(ch.url); if (!map[h]) map[h] = { exists: true, channel: ch, hash: h }; }
  }
  return map;
}
function classifyImportChannels(parsed, existingMap, catOverride) {
  var newChannels = [], existsChannels = [], deletedChannels = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < parsed.length; i++) {
    var ch = parsed[i]; var h = urlHash(ch.url);
    if (existingMap[h]) { if (existingMap[h].exists) existsChannels.push(ch); else deletedChannels.push(ch); }
    else newChannels.push(ch);
  }
  return { newChannels: newChannels, existsChannels: existsChannels, deletedChannels: deletedChannels };
}
function showReimportModal(deletedChannels, newChannels, allParsed, catOverride, sourceUrl) {
  var maxShow = 15; var html = '';
  html += '<h3 class="modal-t"><i class="fas fa-undo" style="color:var(--accent);margin-right:6px"></i>Previously Removed Channels Found</h3>';
  html += '<p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px">' + deletedChannels.length + ' channel' + (deletedChannels.length === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' were previously in your database but were deleted.</p>';
  html += '<p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--fg);margin-bottom:14px;font-weight:600">Select which ones to re-add:</p>';
  html += '<div style="max-height:280px;overflow-y:auto;margin-bottom:14px">';
  var show = deletedChannels.slice(0, maxShow);
  for (var i = 0; i < show.length; i++) {
    var ch = show[i];
    var imgHtml = ch.image ? '<img src="'+esc(ch.image)+'" onerror="this.style.display=\'none\'">' : '<div class="ri-letter">'+esc(ch.name.charAt(0))+'</div>';
    html += '<div class="reimport-item checked" data-idx="'+i+'" onclick="toggleReimportItem(this)">' + imgHtml +
      '<div class="ri-info"><div class="ri-name">'+esc(ch.name)+'</div><div class="ri-url">'+esc(ch.url)+'</div></div>' +
      '<input type="checkbox" class="ri-check" data-idx="'+i+'" checked onchange="toggleReimportCheck(this)"></div>';
  }
  if (deletedChannels.length > maxShow) html += '<div class="modal-more">...and ' + (deletedChannels.length - maxShow) + ' more</div>';
  html += '</div>';
  html += '<div style="padding:10px 12px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(47,133,90,.08);border:1px solid rgba(47,133,90,.2);margin-bottom:14px">' +
    '<div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--success)"><i class="fas fa-check-circle" style="margin-right:4px"></i> ' + newChannels.length + ' new channel' + (newChannels.length === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' will be imported automatically</div></div>';
  html += '<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:18px">' +
    '<button class="btn btn-o btn-sm" onclick="hideModal()">Skip & Import New Only</button>' +
    '<button class="btn btn-p btn-sm" id="btn-reimport" onclick="executeReimport()"><i class="fas fa-plus-circle"></i> Re-add Selected & Import New</button></div>';
  showModal(html);
  window._reimportData = { deletedChannels: deletedChannels, newChannels: newChannels, allParsed: allParsed, catOverride: catOverride, sourceUrl: sourceUrl };
}
window.toggleReimportItem = function(el) { var cb = el.querySelector('.ri-check'); if (cb) cb.checked = !cb.checked; el.classList.toggle('checked', cb ? cb.checked : false); };
window.toggleReimportCheck = function(cb) { var item = cb.closest('.reimport-item'); if (item) item.classList.toggle('checked', cb.checked); };
window.executeReimport = async function() {
  var data = window._reimportData; if (!data) { hideModal(); return; }
  var selectedReimport = [];
  document.querySelectorAll('.ri-check:checked').forEach(function(cb) { var idx = parseInt(cb.dataset.idx); if (!isNaN(idx) && data.deletedChannels[idx]) selectedReimport.push(data.deletedChannels[idx]); });
  var btn = document.getElementById('btn-reimport');
  if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Importing...'; }
  var toImport = data.newChannels.concat(selectedReimport);
  await importChannelsDirect(toImport, data.catOverride, data.sourceUrl);
  hideModal();
  var total = toImport.length;
  var msg = 'Imported ' + total + ' channel' + (total === 1 ? '' : 's');
  if (data.newChannels.length > 0 && selectedReimport.length > 0) msg += ' (' + data.newChannels.length + ' new + ' + selectedReimport.length + ' re-added)';
  else if (selectedReimport.length > 0) msg += ' (re-added from file)';
  toast(msg, 's');
  if (!data.sourceUrl) { for (var i = 0; i < toImport.length; i++) { if (importedUrlsCache) importedUrlsCache[urlHash(toImport[i].url)] = true; } }
};

async function importChannelsDirect(channels, catOverride, sourceUrl) {
  var groups = [], groupSet = {};
  channels.forEach(function(c) { var g = catOverride || c.category; if (g && !groupSet[g]) { groupSet[g] = true; groups.push(g); } });
  var catMap = {};
  for (var gi = 0; gi < groups.length; gi++) {
    var g = groups[gi], ex = null;
    for (var ci = 0; ci < S.cats.length; ci++) { if (S.cats[ci].name.toLowerCase() === g.toLowerCase()) { ex = S.cats[ci]; break; } }
    if (!ex) { var nid = await dbP('categories', { name: g, order: S.cats.length }); if (nid) { catMap[g] = nid; S.cats.push({ id: nid, name: g, order: S.cats.length }); } }
    else { catMap[g] = ex.id; }
  }
  var order = S.chs.length;
  for (var pi = 0; pi < channels.length; pi++) {
    var ch = channels[pi]; var catGroup = catOverride || ch.category;
    var cid = catGroup ? (catMap[catGroup] || '') : '';
    var entry = { name: ch.name, url: ch.url, image: ch.image || '', category: cid, order: order++ };
    if (sourceUrl) entry.sourceUrl = sourceUrl;
    await dbP('channels', entry);
    if (importedUrlsCache) importedUrlsCache[urlHash(ch.url)] = true;
  }
}

/* ===== M3U8 Upload with Smart Import (direct import) ===== */
window.handleUpload = async function(input) {
  var file = input.files ? input.files[0] : null; if (!file) return;
  if (input.value !== undefined) input.value = '';
  var prog = document.getElementById('up-prog'), bar = document.getElementById('up-bar'), st = document.getElementById('up-st');
  prog.style.display = 'block'; bar.style.width = '20%'; st.textContent = 'Reading file...';
  try {
    var text = await file.text(); bar.style.width = '50%'; st.textContent = 'Parsing...';
    var parsed = parseM3U8(text); bar.style.width = '60%'; st.textContent = 'Found ' + parsed.length + ' channels. Checking duplicates...';
    if (!parsed.length) { toast('No valid channels found in file', 'e'); prog.style.display = 'none'; return; }
    buildImportCache();
    var existingMap = buildExistingUrlMap();
    var result = classifyImportChannels(parsed, existingMap, '');
    bar.style.width = '75%';
    if (result.deletedChannels.length > 0) {
      st.textContent = result.newChannels.length + ' new, ' + result.existsChannels.length + ' existing, ' + result.deletedChannels.length + ' previously removed';
      bar.style.width = '90%'; prog.style.display = 'none';
      showReimportModal(result.deletedChannels, result.newChannels, parsed, '', null);
      toast('Found ' + result.newChannels.length + ' new + ' + result.deletedChannels.length + ' previously removed', 'i');
    } else if (result.newChannels.length === 0) {
      st.textContent = 'All ' + parsed.length + ' channels already exist'; bar.style.width = '100%';
      toast('All ' + parsed.length + ' channels already exist.', 'w');
      setTimeout(function() { prog.style.display = 'none'; }, 3000);
    } else {
      st.textContent = 'Importing ' + result.newChannels.length + ' new channels...'; bar.style.width = '85%';
      await importChannelsDirect(result.newChannels, '', null);
      bar.style.width = '100%';
      st.textContent = 'Imported ' + result.newChannels.length + ' new channels!' + (result.existsChannels.length > 0 ? ' (' + result.existsChannels.length + ' duplicates skipped)' : '');
      toast('Imported ' + result.newChannels.length + ' new channels', 's');
      setTimeout(function() { prog.style.display = 'none'; }, 3000);
    }
  } catch (e) { toast('Upload error: ' + e.message, 'e'); prog.style.display = 'none'; }
};
document.getElementById('m3f').addEventListener('change', function() { handleUpload(this); });

/* ===== GitHub Import ===== */
window.handleGHImport = async function() {
  var url = document.getElementById('gh-url').value.trim(); if (!url) { toast('Enter a URL', 'e'); return; }
  var prog = document.getElementById('gh-prog'), bar = document.getElementById('gh-bar'), st = document.getElementById('gh-st'), btn = document.getElementById('gh-btn');
  prog.style.display = 'block'; bar.style.width = '10%'; st.textContent = 'Fetching...'; btn.disabled = true;
  try {
    var resp = await fetch(url); if (!resp.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + resp.status);
    var text = await resp.text(); bar.style.width = '50%'; st.textContent = 'Parsing...';
    var parsed = parseM3U8(text); bar.style.width = '60%'; st.textContent = 'Found ' + parsed.length + '. Checking...';
    var oc = document.getElementById('gh-cat').value;
    if (oc) parsed.forEach(function(ch) { ch.category = oc; });
    if (!parsed.length) { toast('No valid channels found', 'e'); prog.style.display = 'none'; btn.disabled = false; return; }
    buildImportCache();
    var existingMap = buildExistingUrlMap();
    var result = classifyImportChannels(parsed, existingMap, oc);
    bar.style.width = '75%';
    if (result.deletedChannels.length > 0) {
      bar.style.width = '90%'; prog.style.display = 'none'; btn.disabled = false;
      showReimportModal(result.deletedChannels, result.newChannels, parsed, oc, url);
    } else if (result.newChannels.length === 0) {
      bar.style.width = '100%'; toast('All ' + parsed.length + ' channels already exist.', 'w');
      setTimeout(function() { prog.style.display = 'none'; }, 3000);
    } else {
      st.textContent = 'Importing ' + result.newChannels.length + '...'; bar.style.width = '85%';
      await importChannelsDirect(result.newChannels, oc, url);
      bar.style.width = '100%';
      st.textContent = 'Imported ' + result.newChannels.length + '!' + (result.existsChannels.length > 0 ? ' (' + result.existsChannels.length + ' skipped)' : '');
      toast('Imported ' + result.newChannels.length + ' new channels', 's');
      setTimeout(function() { prog.style.display = 'none'; }, 3000);
    }
  } catch (e) { toast('Import error: ' + e.message, 'e'); prog.style.display = 'none'; }
  btn.disabled = false;
};

/* ===== Import History Cache ===== */
function buildImportCache() {
  importedUrlsCache = {};
  try { var hist = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sv_import_history') || '{}'); for (var k in hist) importedUrlsCache[k] = true; } catch(e) {}
  for (var i = 0; i < S.chs.length; i++) { if (S.chs[i].url) importedUrlsCache[urlHash(S.chs[i].url)] = true; }
}
function saveImportHistory(urls) {
  try {
    var hist = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('sv_import_history') || '{}');
    for (var i = 0; i < urls.length; i++) hist[urlHash(urls[i])] = { time: Date.now() };
    var keys = Object.keys(hist);
    if (keys.length > 5000) { keys.sort(function(a, b) { return (hist[a].time || 0) - (hist[b].time || 0); }); for (var j = 0; j < keys.length - 5000; j++) delete hist[keys[j]]; }
    localStorage.setItem('sv_import_history', JSON.stringify(hist));
  } catch(e) {}
}
var _origImportDirect = importChannelsDirect;
importChannelsDirect = async function(channels, catOverride, sourceUrl) {
  var urls = channels.map(function(c) { return c.url; });
  await _origImportDirect(channels, catOverride, sourceUrl);
  saveImportHistory(urls);
};

/* ===== GitHub Auto-Sync ===== */
window.saveGHSource = async function() {
  var url = document.getElementById('gh-url').value.trim(); if (!url) { toast('Enter a URL', 'e'); return; }
  var cat = document.getElementById('gh-cat').value;
  var key = await dbP('githubUrls', { url: url, category: cat || '', enabled: true, lastUpdated: 0, addedAt: Date.now() });
  if (key) { toast('Source saved. Auto-syncs every 15 minutes.', 's'); document.getElementById('gh-url').value = ''; document.getElementById('gh-cat').value = ''; }
  else { toast('Failed to save source', 'e'); }
};
function renderGHSources() {
  var el = document.getElementById('gh-sources'); var keys = Object.keys(S.ghSources);
  if (!keys.length) { el.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">No sources saved.</p>'; return; }
  el.innerHTML = keys.map(function(id) {
    var s = S.ghSources[id];
    return '<div class="gh-src-item"><div style="flex:1;min-width:0"><div class="gh-url">'+esc(s.url)+'</div><div class="gh-meta">'+(s.category||'Auto')+' | '+timeAgo(s.lastUpdated)+' | '+(s.enabled ? '<span style="color:var(--success)">Active</span>' : '<span style="color:var(--danger)">Disabled</span>')+'</div></div><div class="act-b"><label class="tg" style="flex-shrink:0" onclick="event.stopPropagation()"><input type="checkbox" '+(s.enabled?'checked':'')+' onchange="toggleGHSource(\''+id+'\',this.checked)"><span class="tg-s"></span></label><button class="btn-i" style="width:26px;height:26px;font-size:10px" onclick="refreshGHSource(\''+id+'\')" title="Refresh"><i class="fas fa-sync-alt"></i></button><button class="btn-i" style="width:26px;height:26px;font-size:10px;color:var(--danger)" onclick="deleteGHSource(\''+id+'\')" title="Delete"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button></div></div>';
  }).join('');
}
window.toggleGHSource = async function(id, en) { if (!await dbU('githubUrls/' + id, { enabled: en })) toast('Failed to update', 'e'); };
window.deleteGHSource = async function(id) { if (!confirm('Delete this source?')) return; if (await dbX('githubUrls/' + id)) toast('Source removed', 's'); };
window.refreshGHSource = async function(id) {
  var s = S.ghSources[id]; if (!s) return; toast('Refreshing...', 'i');
  try {
    var resp = await fetch(s.url); if (!resp.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + resp.status);
    var text = await resp.text(); var parsed = parseM3U8(text);
    if (s.category) parsed.forEach(function(ch) { ch.category = s.category; });
    buildImportCache(); var existingMap = buildExistingUrlMap();
    var result = classifyImportChannels(parsed, existingMap, s.category);
    if (result.newChannels.length > 0) await importChannelsDirect(result.newChannels, s.category, s.url);
    if (await dbU('githubUrls/' + id, { lastUpdated: Date.now() })) toast('Refreshed: ' + parsed.length + ' processed', 's');
  } catch (e) { toast('Error: ' + e.message, 'e'); }
};

function updateGHCatSel() {
  var sel = document.getElementById('gh-cat'); if (!sel) return; var cv = sel.value;
  var html = '<option value="">Auto-detect</option>';
  S.cats.forEach(function(c) { html += '<option value="'+c.id+'"'+(c.id === cv ? ' selected' : '')+'>'+esc(c.name)+'</option>'; });
  sel.innerHTML = html;
}

/* ===== Drag Sort ===== */
var dragState = { active: false, row: null, ghost: null, tbody: null, type: null, offsetY: 0, timer: null };
function initDragHandlers() {
  document.addEventListener('pointermove', function(e) {
    if (!dragState.active || !dragState.row) return; e.preventDefault();
    if (dragState.ghost) dragState.ghost.style.top = (e.clientY - dragState.offsetY) + 'px';
    var tbody = dragState.tbody; if (!tbody) return;
    var rows = Array.from(tbody.querySelectorAll('tr[data-id]'));
    for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
      var row = rows[i]; if (row === dragState.row) continue;
      var rect = row.getBoundingClientRect(); var midY = rect.top + rect.height / 2;
      if (e.clientY < midY) { if (dragState.row.nextSibling !== row) tbody.insertBefore(dragState.row, row); return; }
    }
    var lastRow = rows[rows.length - 1];
    if (lastRow && lastRow !== dragState.row) { if (dragState.row !== tbody.lastElementChild) tbody.appendChild(dragState.row); }
  }, { passive: false });
  var handleDragEnd = function() {
    clearTimeout(dragState.timer); if (!dragState.active) return; dragState.active = false;
    if (dragState.row) {
      dragState.row.style.opacity = ''; dragState.row.style.background = ''; dragState.row.classList.remove('drag-ready');
      var tbody = dragState.tbody, type = dragState.type;
      if (tbody) {
        var rows = Array.from(tbody.querySelectorAll('tr[data-id]')); var updates = [];
        for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) { if (rows[i].dataset.id) updates.push({ id: rows[i].dataset.id, order: i }); }
        var saveAll = async function() { for (var j = 0; j < updates.length; j++) { var item = updates[j]; if (type === 'cat') await dbU('categories/' + item.id, { order: item.order }); else if (type === 'ch') await dbU('channels/' + item.id, { order: item.order }); } toast('Order updated', 's'); };
        saveAll();
      }
    }
    if (dragState.ghost) { dragState.ghost.remove(); dragState.ghost = null; }
    document.body.style.cursor = ''; document.body.style.userSelect = '';
    if (dragState.tbody) dragState.tbody.style.touchAction = '';
    dragState.row = null; dragState.tbody = null; dragState.type = null;
  };
  document.addEventListener('pointerup', handleDragEnd); document.addEventListener('pointercancel', handleDragEnd);
}
function attachTableDrag(tbody, type) {
  if (!tbody) return;
  tbody.addEventListener('pointerdown', function(e) {
    if (e.button !== 0 && e.pointerType === 'mouse') return;
    if (e.target.closest('button, label, .tg, .act-b, input, select, a, .cb-col')) return;
    var row = e.target.closest('tr'); if (!row || !row.dataset.id) return;
    var rect = row.getBoundingClientRect(); dragState.offsetY = e.clientY - rect.top; dragState.tbody = tbody; dragState.type = type;
    dragState.timer = setTimeout(function() {
      dragState.active = true; dragState.row = row;
      var ghost = row.cloneNode(true);
      ghost.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;z-index:10000;width:'+rect.width+'px;opacity:0.95;pointer-events:none;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.3);background:var(--card);border:2px solid var(--accent);border-radius:8px;left:'+rect.left+'px;top:'+(e.clientY-dragState.offsetY)+'px';
      ghost.className = 'drag-ghost'; document.body.appendChild(ghost); dragState.ghost = ghost;
      row.style.opacity = '0.25'; row.style.background = 'var(--accent-l)'; row.classList.add('drag-ready');
      tbody.style.touchAction = 'none'; document.body.style.cursor = 'grabbing'; document.body.style.userSelect = 'none';
    }, 500);
  });
}

/* ===== Drag & Drop Upload (main import) ===== */
var upZ = document.getElementById('up-z');
if (upZ) {
  upZ.addEventListener('dragover', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); this.style.borderColor = 'var(--accent)'; this.style.background = 'var(--accent-l)'; });
  upZ.addEventListener('dragleave', function() { this.style.borderColor = ''; this.style.background = ''; });
  upZ.addEventListener('drop', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault(); this.style.borderColor = ''; this.style.background = '';
    var f = e.dataTransfer.files[0];
    if (f && (f.name.endsWith('.m3u') || f.name.endsWith('.m3u8'))) { handleUpload({ files: [f], value: '' }); }
    else { toast('Please drop a .m3u or .m3u8 file', 'e'); }
  });
}

/* ===== Keyboard ===== */
document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
  if (e.key === 'Escape') {
    if (document.getElementById('modal-ov').classList.contains('show')) { hideModal(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
    if (ctxState.visible) { hideContextMenu(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
    var bar = document.getElementById('bulk-bar'); if (bar && bar.style.display !== 'none') { clearAllSelections(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
    var pip = document.getElementById('pip-player'); if (pip && pip.style.display !== 'none') { pipClose(); e.preventDefault(); return; }
  }
});

/* ===== Init ===== */
async function init() {
  if (checkSession()) { showView('admin'); } else { showView('login'); }
  initDragHandlers(); setupSettingsEventListeners();
  var dragObserver = new MutationObserver(function() {
    var catTb = document.getElementById('cat-tb'); var chTb = document.getElementById('ch-tb');
    if (catTb && !catTb._dragBound) { attachTableDrag(catTb, 'cat'); catTb._dragBound = true; }
    if (chTb && !chTb._dragBound) { attachTableDrag(chTb, 'ch'); chTb._dragBound = true; }
  });
  dragObserver.observe(document.getElementById('v-admin'), { childList: true, subtree: true });
  try {
    setupListeners();
    if (!S.isAdmin) { await checkRegStatus(); } else { renderAdmin(); }
    applyTheme(S.settings.theme); startGHAutoUpdate();
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Database init error:', err);
    if (isPermError(err)) { showPermWarning(); } else { toast('Connection issue: ' + (err.message || err), 'e'); }
  }
  var ls = document.getElementById('loading-screen'); ls.classList.add('hide'); setTimeout(function() { ls.remove(); }, 500);
}

function startGHAutoUpdate() {
  setInterval(async function() {
    var keys = Object.keys(S.ghSources);
    for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
      var s = S.ghSources[keys[i]];
      if (!s || !s.enabled) continue;
      var last = s.lastUpdated || 0;
      if (Date.now() - last < 15 * 60 * 1000) continue;
      try {
        var resp = await fetch(s.url); if (!resp.ok) continue;
        var text = await resp.text(); var parsed = parseM3U8(text);
        if (s.category) parsed.forEach(function(ch) { ch.category = s.category; });
        buildImportCache(); var existingMap = buildExistingUrlMap();
        var result = classifyImportChannels(parsed, existingMap, s.category);
        if (result.newChannels.length > 0) await importChannelsDirect(result.newChannels, s.category, s.url);
        await dbU('githubUrls/' + keys[i], { lastUpdated: Date.now() });
        console.log('Auto-synced ' + keys[i] + ': ' + result.newChannels.length + ' new imported');
      } catch(e) { console.error('Auto-sync error for ' + keys[i] + ':', e); }
    }
  }, 5 * 60 * 1000);
}

init();
</script>
</body>
</html>

about.content:
MobileFTP24 is a modern file management system designed to help you organize, share, and manage your files efficiently.

Built with simplicity and power in mind, MobileFTP24 provides an intuitive interface for managing folders, files, and download links. Whether you are distributing software, sharing resources, or organizing digital assets, MobileFTP24 makes it easy.

Key Features:
• Nested folder structure for organized file management
• Multiple download links per file for different versions
• Link-only entries for external resources
• Admin dashboard for full control
• Real-time updates powered by Firebase
